• Optimize and manage our Google Business Profile

• Improve ranking in Google Maps for relevant local searches

• Analyze competitor listings and local search opportunities

• Implement local SEO improvements

• Provide recommendations for improving visibility and engagement

• Assist with review strategy and responses where appropriate



Work Structure



• This role can be performed on a flexible schedule

• Work does not need to occur during U.S. business hours

• Occasional meetings may be scheduled during Pacific Time



Estimated hours:

5–10 hours per week initially



Requirements



• Proven experience managing Google Business Profiles

• Demonstrated success improving Google Maps rankings

• Strong understanding of local SEO

• Strong written English communication

• Organized and able to document work clearly



Please do not apply if:



• You are still learning SEO

• You have only taken courses but have no real client results

• You do not have examples of businesses you have helped rank



This role requires demonstrated experience and results.



HOW TO APPLY



Follow the steps exactly to be considered.



• Use a minimum of 7 AP points

• Use the following subject line:



LOCAL SEO SPECIALIST – TYCO



Your message must include the following:



-Links to three Google Business Profiles you have worked on



-A brief explanation of what you did to improve their rankings



-Screenshots or evidence of ranking improvements if available



-Your resume



-Your expected hourly rate



-Your DISC testing results



-Confirmation that you understand this is a results-based role requiring prior experience



-Please also answer the following question:



Visit our website:







In two or three sentences, tell us one improvement you would make to our Google Business Profile or local SEO strategy.



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be considered.



Interview Process



Qualified candidates will receive a calendar link to schedule a short Zoom interview.

title: Operations & Marketing Virtual Assistant — US Financial Services Firm
description:
About Us

We are a growing financial services and employee benefits advisory firm based in New Jersey, USA. We serve medical practices, physicians, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, construction companies, professional services firms, and growing businesses across New Jersey, New York, and the broader tri-state area. We are aggressively expanding into new market verticals every quarter.

We operate two brands under the same ownership:



 — employee benefits and insurance consulting

 — retirement planning, wealth management, and financial advisory



We are launching multiple market expansion campaigns and need a reliable, detail-oriented operations and marketing professional to become the backbone of our daily execution.

This is NOT a generic virtual assistant role. You will be a core tea
mber responsible for our CRM system, marketing execution, and campaign operations. We are looking for someone who takes ownership, brings ideas, and wants to grow with us.



The Role — Two Halves, One Critical Person

HALF 1: Zoho CRM & Operations Administration (~12-15 hours/week)

You will be the primary administrator of our Zoho CRM system. This means you own the system — keeping it clean, updated, functional, and optimized for our sales team.

Day-to-day CRM responsibilities:



Maintain and optimize all deal pipelines across multiple market verticals (currently 3 pipelines, expanding to 5-8+ as we add new market segments). Build new pipelines, stages, and custom field configurations as the business adds verticals.



Import prospect data from CSV files into the Deals module (we provide the files, you map and import them accurately)

Ensure data hygiene: deduplicate records, standardize field entries, fix incomplete records, merge duplicates

Create and maintain custom views and filters for each tea
mber (sales team, consultants, enrollment specialists)

Build and modify workflow automation rules 
 notifications, task creation, stage-based triggers)

Generate weekly pipeline reports and export them for management review

Maintain the Campaign Command Center dashboard with up-to-date metrics

Manage user accounts: add new tea
mbers, assign roles and profiles, adjust permissions

Configure and manage Zoho Campaigns integration: sync CRM contact lists, segment audiences, schedule
 sequences

Troubleshoot CRM issues reported by tea
mbers (fields not displaying, automations not firing, etc.)

Perform monthly CRM audits: check for stale deals, orphaned contacts, incomplete records, and data inconsistencies



Periodic CRM projects:



Import database records (retirement and health plan filings) — we will provide filtered datasets, you import and tag them in CRM



Build and configure new pipelines, layouts, custom fields, and automations as we expand into new market verticals — including but not limited to medical practices, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, construction companies, professional services firms, and other industries. You should be comfortable spinning up a complete new vertical pipeline (stages, fields, views, automations, dashboards) independently with minimal direction



Create new workflow automations as our sales process evolves

Set up Zoho Blueprint process enforcement for deal stage transitions

Configure territory management when we add new sales tea
mbers

Integrate Zoho CRM with external tools (Calendly, Zoho Campaigns, potentially n8n or Zapier)



HALF 2: Marketing & Social Media Execution (~12-15 hours/week)

You will execute our marketing strategy across LinkedIn,
, and other channels. Content will be provided to you (pre-written and pre-approved) — your job is to post it, engage with our audience, and manage the logistics.

Daily marketing responsibilities:



Post pre-approved content to LinkedIn — 2 posts per day (1 on the founder's personal profile, 1 on the company page)

Manage TWO separate 
pany pages (Kandelaki Solutions and Kandelaki Financial) with distinct content calendars and brand voices

Engage on LinkedIn: send 20-30 personalized connection requests per day to target prospects (physicians, practice managers, HR directors, homecare agency owners in NJ/NY)

Comment thoughtfully on 10-15 target prospects' LinkedIn posts daily (genuine engagement, not spam)

Respond to all comments on our posts within 4 hours

Respond to LinkedIn direct messages and route qualified inquiries to the sales team in CRM

Schedule and send
 campaigns via Zoho Campaigns per the content calendar

Create graphics in Canva for LinkedIn posts,
 headers, and marketing materials (templates will be provided)

Monitor and report on LinkedIn analytics (impressions, engagement, follower growth, profile views)

Monitor and report on
 campaign metrics (open rates, click rates, unsubscribes)



Periodic marketing projects:



Coordinate direct mail campaigns (prepare mailing lists from CRM, coordinate with US-based print vendors)

Set up landing page tracking and UTM parameters for campaign attribution

Assist with webinar logistics (Zoom setup, registration page, reminder
s, post-event follow-up
s)

Create and manage
/Instagram retargeting audiences (upload
 lists, set targeting parameters)

Compile weekly marketing performance reports in a shared Google Sheet





Quarterly performance bonus: $100–$250 based on hitting KPI targets (LinkedIn engagement growth, CRM data quality,
 campaign performance). We reward results, not just hours."



Required Skills & Experience

Non-negotiable — you must have these:



Zoho CRM experience — you have configured pipelines, custom fields, workflow rules, views, and dashboards in Zoho CRM for at least one client or employer. Screenshots or references required.

Zoho Campaigns experience — you have created and sent
 campaigns, managed subscriber lists, and reviewed campaign analytics

LinkedIn management — you have managed a 
pany page and/or personal profile for a B2B or professional services company. Share a link to a page you've managed.

Strong written English — your posts,
s, and connection request messages must read as if a native English speaker wrote them. We will test this.

Canva proficiency — you can create professional-looking graphics from templates quickly

Google Sheets / Google Workspace proficiency — you will use shared spreadsheets for reporting and coordination daily

Reliable high-speed internet and a quiet workspace — you will be on video calls with us weekly and need stable connectivity

Self-motivated and proactive — you work independently with minimal supervision and flag issues before they become problems



Strongly preferred — these will put you ahead of other applicants:



Zoho Certified Administrator or Zoho Certified Associate

Experience working for a US-based financial services firm, insurance agency, real estate brokerage, or professional services company

Experience with Zoho Analytics or Zoho Reports

Experience with
 marketing beyond Zoho (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, HubSpot — shows transferable skill)

Basic understanding of CRM sales pipeline concepts (leads, deals, stages, conversion, win rates)

Experience with Zapier, n8n, or Make (Integromat) for workflow automation

Experience with
 Ads Manager or 
 Ads (we run paid campaigns)

Knowledge of SEO basics



Bonus — not required but would be amazing:



Any exposure to US insurance or financial services industry terminology

Experience with 
v, React, or basic web development

Video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or similar)

Experience managing multiple brands/clients simultaneously





What Success Looks Like

After 30 days: CRM is running smoothly with clean data, all automations firing correctly, and zero complaints from the sales team about system issues. LinkedIn is posting daily on schedule with consistent engagement.
 campaigns are going out on time with 20%+ open rates. You have a daily routine and are managing both halves of the role without being reminded.

After 60 days: LinkedIn impressions are growing 25-50% month-over-month. You're proactively identifying CRM improvements ("I noticed we could add an automation for X" or "This view would help the team see Y"). You're suggesting content ideas based on what's performing well. The founder trusts you to handle marketing and CRM independently with weekly check-ins only. When we d
 to launch a new market vertical, you can build the entire CRM pipeline infrastructure (stages, custom fields, views, automations, and dashboard components) within one working day without needing step-by-step instructions

After 90 days: You are an indispensable tea
mber. The CRM is the cleanest it's ever been. Marketing is generating measurable pipeline activity. You understand both brands, their audiences, and their compliance boundaries. You are ready for expanded responsibilities and potentially increased hours/compensation.



How We Work Together

Communication: WhatsApp or Slack (one channel — we don't scatter conversations across platforms)

Check-ins: Daily 15-minute video call for the first 2 weeks, then weekly 30-minute call thereafter

Reporting: You submit a daily scorecard (Google Sheet) tracking: posts published, connections sent, comments made,
s scheduled, CRM records updated, tasks completed. Weekly KPI summary every Friday.

Content workflow: Pre-written content is provided to you via a shared Google Sheet content calendar. Posts are pre-approved by our compliance department. You schedule and publish on time. You do NOT write financial content from scratch — you execute the approved content and manage engagement.

Tools you'll use daily: Zoho CRM, Zoho Campaigns, LinkedIn, Canva, Google Sheets, Google Drive, WhatsApp/Slack, Calendly

Tools you'll use periodically:
 Ads Manager, Zoom (webinar support), potentially n8n or Zapier



Compensation & Growth

Starting rate: $6–$9/hour USD based on experience and Zoho proficiency



$6-$7/hour: Strong VA skills + basic Zoho CRM experience

$7-$8/hour: Zoho certified or 2+ years of Zoho CRM admin for US-based companies

$8-$9/hour: Zoho certified + financial services industry experience + LinkedIn B2B management track record



Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise (TransferWise), Payoneer, or direct bank transfer — your preference

Hours: 25-30 hours/week to start. Potential to grow to 35-40 hours/week within 60-90 days based on performance and business growth.

Rate increases: Performance review at 90 days with potential $1/hour increase for strong performers. Annual review thereafter.

This is a long-term role. We are not looking for a short-term freelancer. We are building a team and want someone who will grow with us over months and years. If you are looking for a stable, long-term remote position with a growing US company, this is it.



How to Apply

Please send the following (applications without these items will not be considered):



Your resume — PDF format preferred

Zoho CRM experience proof — ONE of the following:



Screenshot(s) of a Zoho CRM you've configured (pipelines, dashboards, custom fields — blur client names if needed)

Zoho certification badge or certificate

A brief paragraph (3-5 sentences) describing the most complex Zoho CRM setup you've done





LinkedIn management proof — a link to a 
pany page or profile you've managed, or screenshots of analytics from a page you managed (blur names if needed)

Written English sample — write a SHORT LinkedIn post (3-5 sentences) on this topic: "Why small business owners in New Jersey should review their employee benefits package before their next renewal." This is a test of your writing quality — don't use AI to generate it, we want to see YOUR writing.

Your availability — confirm your available working hours in Philippine Time and whether you can work US Eastern Time mornings (8 AM - 1 PM ET = 8 PM - 1 AM PHT)

Your expected hourly rate within the posted range





About Our Team Culture

We are a small, fast-growing team. We value:



Ownership — you treat your responsibilities as if this were your own business

Honesty — if something goes wrong or you don't know how to do something, tell us immediately rather than guessing

Reliability — you show up on time, submit your work on schedule, and communicate proactively

Initiative — you don't wait to be told what to do when you see something that could be improved

Quality over speed — we'd rather have 1 excellent LinkedIn post than 3 mediocre ones



We are direct communicators. We give clear feedback — both positive and constructive. We expect you to receive feedback professionally and apply it quickly. In return, we will invest in your growth, respect your time, pay reliably, and treat you as a valued tea
mber — not just a task executor.

If this sounds like the kind of team you want to be part of, we look forward to your application.

title: Tax Staff
description:
Tax Staff – Job Description

Job Summary



The Tax Staff is responsible for preparing and reviewing complex tax returns while ensuring accurate reconciliation of tax data to the company’s financial statements. This role requires a high level of attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and the ability to work independently. The position plays a critical role in ensuring that tax filings accurately reflect the company’s financial records through thorough balance sheet analysis, account tie-outs, and reconciliation procedures.



This is not an entry-level role and requires demonstrated experience in tax preparation and financial statement analysis.



Key Responsibilities



Prepare and review corporate, partnership, and other business tax returns in compliance with federal and state regulations.



Perform detailed reconciliations between tax returns and financial statements to ensure accuracy and completeness.



Conduct comprehensive balance sheet analysis, demonstrating a deep understanding of how accounts impact tax reporting.



Tie out balance sheet and income statement accounts to external tax workpapers and supporting documentation.



Perform detailed retained earnings reconciliations, ensuring consistency between prior year filings, financial statements, and current year tax reporting.



Investigate and resolve discrepancies between general ledger accounts, financial statements, and tax workpapers.



Maintain well-organized tax workpapers that clearly support all reported tax positions.



Work independently to analyze financial data and identify potential tax issues or inconsistencies.



Collaborate with senior tax professionals when complex tax issues arise.



Ensure all tax documentation and filings meet strict accuracy and compliance standards.



Qualifications



Several years of tax preparation experience in public accounting or corporate tax environments.



Strong experience with financial statement analysis and balance sheet reconciliation.



Proven ability to work independently with minimal supervision.



Experience reconciling tax workpapers to audited or internal financial statements.



Required Skills and Competencies



Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy



Strong balance sheet and financial statement expertise



Advanced reconciliation and account tie-out skills



Ability to independently analyze financial data and resolve discrepancies



Strong organizational and documentation skills



Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines



Key Technical Expectations



This role requires the ability to:



Reconcile tax returns to financial statements with precision



Tie out general ledger accounts to tax workpapers and external schedules



Analyze and reconcile retained earnings accounts year-over-year



Ensure all balance sheet accounts are properly reflected in tax reporting

title: Interior Design Drafting & 3D Modeling Assistant
description:
Part-Time Interior Design Draftsman  (AutoCAD, SketchUp, Photoshop)

?



About the Company



Nicole Greene Interiors is a luxury residential interior design studio based in Tampa, Florida. We specialize in high-end custom homes, large renovations, and luxury vacation rental properties.



Our projects require strong design documentation, organized product specifications, and professional client presentations.



We are looking for a part-time Interior Design Assistant who can support our team with technical design work, product sourcing, and presentation development.

?

?

?



Preferred Skills

?



What We Are Looking For

?



Application Instructions (Important)

NGI Design Assistant



?

?

?



Additional Notes



We are looking for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and able to produce professional design documentation.



Candidates with AutoCAD drawings, SketchUp models, and presentation samples will be prioritized.



?



If you’d like, I can also show you something that will dramatically improve the quality of applicants you get (most people on OnlineJobs don’t know this trick).



It’s a very small tweak to the job title and first paragraph that attracts actual designers instead of generic virtual assistants — and it can easily double the quality of applicants you receive.

 and include:

title: Sales Force Engineer/Developer
description:
Description



The Salesforce Engineer designs, builds, and supports scalable Salesforce solutions that enable business operations and strategic objectives. This role focuses on keeping the Salesforce platform reliable, efficient, and easy to use, while integrating with other enterprise systems as needed. Working closely with Product and Senior Management, the Salesforce Engineer translates requirements into well-designed solutions that improve user experience and deliver measurable business value.



Key Responsibilities



Design, build, and support Salesforce applications, components, and integrations.

Configure and customise Salesforce environments to ensure performance, scalability, and maintainability.

Design and manage data models to support reporting, analytics, and data integrity.

Manage configuration and release processes, including deployments, version control, and change tracking.

Investigate and resolve application issues to maintain system reliability and availability.

Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, test, and integrate solutions within the wider enterprise architecture.

Develop and maintain automation and lifecycle processes for development, testing, and deployment.

Plan and execute testing strategies, including both automated and manual testing.

Document system designs and technical solutions in a clear and practical manner.

Continuously improve development practices, tools, and standards.

Share knowledge and mentor tea
mbers through documentation, training, and collaboration.

Design, develop, and maintain custom Salesforce solutions using:

Apex

Visualforce

Lightning Web Components (LWC)

Aura Components

Configure and customize Salesforce features:

Objects, fields, validation rules

Workflows, Process Builder, Flows, and automation

Build and maintain integrations with external systems using:

REST / SOAP APIs

Web services and middleware tools

 



Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree (any course).

Minimum 3 years of hands-on Salesforce development experience.

Strong, practical experience with:

Visualforce, Aura, and Lightning Web Components (LWC)

Apex Classes, Triggers, and Test Classes

Declarative tools (Flows, Process Builder, automation)

Proven experience integrating Salesforce with external APIs / REST / SOAP / 3rd-party systems.

Strong debugging and problem-solving skills (must be able to explain and defend technical decisions).

Experience working on enterprise-level Salesforce solutions.

Salesforce certification is a plus but hands-on technical ability is required.

Amenable to working in Makati under a remote setup.



Skills, Knowledge & Expertise



Essential



Proven experience in Salesforce engineering or development roles.

Strong hands-on experience with Salesforce configuration, customisation, and integrations.

Practical experience with Apex, Visualforce, Lightning Web Components (LWC), and Salesforce APIs (REST/SOAP/Bulk).

Solid understanding of Salesforce data architecture, data modelling, and data management principles.

Experience working with SDLC practices, including version control, CI/CD pipelines, and release management tools (e.g. Git, Jenkins, Copado, Gearset).

Ability to design, build, test, and deploy scalable Salesforce solutions using best practices.

Strong troubleshooting and performance optimisation skills.

Experience integrating Salesforce with other enterprise systems and platforms.

Familiarity with Agile and/or DevOps ways of working.

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.

Clear communicator, comfortable working across technical and non-technical teams.

Desirable



Salesforce certifications (e.g. Platform Developer I/II, Administrator, Application Architect).

Experience with test automation tools such as Selenium, Provar, or similar.

Exposure to cloud infrastructure concepts (e.g. AWS, Azure) and modern design patterns.

Experience mentoring or supporting junior engineers or business users.



COMPANY



We are an innovative mortgage broking business based in Melbourne, Australia. Looking for someone to join our team, in a fun and dynamic team with employee beenfits program and growth and development opportunities.

description:

IG:

title: Social Media & E-Commerce Specialist (Instagram, TikTok, Facebook) + AI Video Content Creator
description:
Job Description:

title: Website & Branding Designer (Remote)
description:
If you're a talented website and branding designer who's passionate about creating stunning, conversion-focused designs using modern tools like Figma and AI-enhanced workflows, and you are based in the Philippines, this remote opportunity is perfect for you.



We are an Australian website & branding agency, Studio1 Design that creates world-class custom websites, branding, and marketing graphics for clients all over the world, using proven strategies and online marketing funnels to grow their businesses.



We're looking for a creative Website and Branding Designer who is excited to build a long-term career with us in the evolving world of AI-enhanced design.



Your Design Responsibilities:

- Create stunning, conversion-focused website designs for a range of clients

- Design custom branding, logos, and marketing graphics

- Use AI tools to enhance your creative process and speed up design workflows



Your Responsibilities

- Create stunning, conversion-focused website designs for premium clients using Figma

- Design custom branding, logos, and marketing graphics that convert

- Understand how to design systems and component libraries in Figma

- Use AI tools to enhance your creative process and speed up workflows where appropriate

- Collaborate with our team of website designers to bring our client’s vision to life



Note: You won't handle coding/development - our talented dev team handles that phase.



Here's What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



Design Excellence

- Outstanding Portfolio: Exceptional website designs, branding, and logos that demonstrate conversion-focused thinking

- Figma Mastery: Advanced Figma skills with experience building design systems and component libraries

- UX/UI Expertise: Deep understanding of user experience and conversion-focused website design principles

- Efficiency & Quality: Ability to work at a reasonable pace, while maintaining premium creative standards

- Modern Tools: Experience with AI design tools (Midjourney, ChatGPT, Canva AI, to enhance workflows



Personal Qualities:

- Excellent design eye with close attention to detail

- Self-motivated to work productively from your own workspace

- Experience working remotely and collaborating with remote teams

- Excellent communication skills, including strong English writing

- Enthusiastic about both creating beautiful designs and helping Studio1 improve



Your Setup Requirements

- Fast and reliable PC or Mac with sufficient processing power

- Professional home office setup with good lighting for occasional video calls

- Stable internet connection for seamless collaboration



What's In It For You?



Work-Life Balance:

- Work from the comfort of your own home, full-time, Mon-Fri, 8 hours per day

- Flexible hours within business requirements

- Regular weekly income paid directly to your bank via WISE



Professional Growth:

- Work with a world-leading website design & branding agency on high-level client projects

- Be part of an established, innovative design team embracing AI technology

- Opportunity to develop your design skills with AI-enhanced designs

- Continuous learning opportunities in emerging design technologies



Team Culture:

- Join a positive, upbeat team that treats each other with respect and gratitude

- Collaborative environment that values creativity and innovation

- Recognition and rewards for exceptional performance



Application Process

- Cover letter explaining why you want to work with Studio1 and your experience with AI design tools

- Link to your design portfolio showcasing your best website designs, and your CV/resume

- Review our core values and company culture on our ‘About Page’: on 



Selection Process:



If we like your application and portfolio, we'll invite you to a Zoom video interview.



If you are a successful candidate will start with a fully paid 4-week trial. If successful, we offer you a permanent full-time position.



Ready to Join the Future of Design?



We're excited to meet talented designers who are ready to embrace AI while maintaining the highest standards of creative excellence!



Thank you & good luck!



Greg & The Studio1 Design Team

title: Financial Admin & Executive Assistant
description:
Hello Future Tea
mber,



Who are we?

We are a fast-growing e-commerce company operating multiple Shopify brand stores across the US and Europe, generating consistent 6-figure monthly revenue. We specialize in emotionally-driven direct response advertising across multiple brands.



We are hiring a Part-Time Financial Administrator & Personal Assistant to keep our finances organized and support the founder with day-to-day operations. You'll be trained directly by the founder on our systems and workflows.



Responsibilities:



Financial:

- Fill in daily profit & loss sheets across multiple stores

- Track and organize all business expenses and revenue

- Collect, file, and organize invoices from vendors and service providers

- Maintain clean bookkeeping records for the accountant

- Monitor ad spend vs. revenue across campaigns

- Prepare simple weekly/monthly financial summaries



Personal Assistant:

- Help manage the founder's calendar and schedule

- Follow up on pending tasks with tea
mbers and external partners

- Handle routine
 correspondence and communications

- Organize documents, files, and important information

- Research tasks as needed



You are the perfect fit if you have these qualities:

- Experience with spreadsheets (Google Sheets / Excel) — this is essential

- Organized, detail-oriented, and reliable

- Comfortable working with numbers (no accounting degree needed)

- Proactive — you flag issues before they become problems

- Strong written English

- Experience with e-commerce finances or bookkeeping is a bonus but not required

- Familiar with tools like Shopify, Google Drive, or project management software is a plus



To apply, please include:

- A brief note on your experience with financial tracking or bookkeeping

- An example of how you've kept something organized in a previous role

- Your availability (this role is 4 hours/day, Monday–Friday)



What we offer:

- 100% remote work setup

- Starting salary of $250/month with performance-based growth opportunities

- Direct training and mentorship from the founder

- A fast-paced, no-bureaucracy environment where your work has real impact

- Long-term growth potential as the company scales



If you are organized, reliable, and ready to be the backbone of a growing e-commerce operation, we'd love to hear from you. To confirm you've read the entire post, please include "BACKBONE" in your application.



Best Regards,

ASG LLC

Thank You!

title: Executive Assistant / Virtual Assistant (Remote)
description:
**Job Title: Executive Assistant / Virtual Assistant (Remote)**

The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, proactive, and comfortable working with fast-moving businesses, content teams, and remote staff.

* Manage
 inbox and respond to messages when needed

* Schedule meetings and manage calendars

* Organize files and documents (Google Drive, Dropbox, etc.)

* Prepare reports and spreadsheets

* Coordinate projects and track progress

* Manage Trello/Slack or other task boards

* Book travel and assist with scheduling when needed



**Content & Social Media Support**



* Upload YouTube videos (titles, descriptions, tags, chapters)

* Schedule long-form and short-form content

* Post stories, photos, and videos across social media accounts

* Write captions and hashtags when needed

**Content Operations**



* Receive and organize video files from editors

* Confirm thumbnails, titles, and descriptions are correct

* Make sure all content is posted on schedule



**Research & Growth**



* Research trending content ideas

* Track trends within social media platforms

* Find potential creators for collaborations

* Research influencers and brand partnership opportunities

* Research events and networking opportunities

* Compile competitor research reports



**Business Operations**



* Track inventory or product listings when needed

* Monitor online reviews and feedback

* Collect and organize analytics from social media platforms

* Prepare weekly performance reports



**Customer & Communication Support**



* Respond to customer
s and messages

* Monitor and respond to website or social media inquiries

* Filter brand partnership inquiries

* Send partnership outreach
s and follow-ups



**Hiring & Team Management**



* Create job posts for open positions

* Screen applications and organize candidates

* Interview applicants for various roles

* Coordinate hiring decisions with management

* Set up and onboard new employees

* Assign tasks to remote assistants and tea
mbers

* Monitor performance and follow up on deadlines



**Research & Vendor Support**



* Research vendors, suppliers, and service providers

* Compare pricing and gather quotes

* Compile lists of potential partners or service providers



**Requirements**



* Strong organization and communication skills

* Experience with social media platforms (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

* Ability to manage multiple tasks and deadlines

* Comfortable working with remote teams

* Experience with tools such as Google Drive, Trello, Slack, or similar platforms is a plus

This role is ideal for someone who enjoys **supporting fast-growing businesses, content teams, and online operations** while helping keep projects organized and running smoothly.

title: Consultative Sales Closer (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a confident, consultative Sales Closer who excels at guiding business owners through meaningful sales conversations and converting qualified prospects into long-term clients.



This role goes beyond traditional sales. You will act as a trusted advisor, leading consultative discussions, identifying business needs, presenting solutions, and confidently guiding prospects toward a decision.



The ideal candidate is someone who understands that great sales are built on trust, clarity, and leadership in the conversation. You should be comfortable speaking with business owners, running structured demo calls, addressing objections, and confidently moving conversations toward a close.



This is a performance-driven role where strong communicators and skilled closers can thrive by building relationships while driving results.



Key Responsibilities



• Conduct consultative sales calls and product/service demos with business owners

• Lead structured conversations to uncover client needs and opportunities

• Position solutions clearly and confidently based on client goals

• Handle objections professionally and guide prospects toward informed decisions

• Build strong rapport and credibility with decision makers

• Maintain control of the sales process from presentation through closing

• Follow up with prospects to finalize agreements and secure commitments

• Consistently meet or exceed sales performance targets



What We’re Looking For



• Fluent English with a neutral or clear accent

• Exceptional communication and conversational skills

• Confidence speaking with business owners and decision makers

• Ability to run client-facing demo calls and presentations

• Strong consultative sales approach and relationship-building skills

• Skilled at handling objections and guiding prospects toward decisions

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, performance-driven environment

• Highly motivated, organized, and results-oriented

• A natural closer who enjoys achieving targets and driving revenue



Compensation



Starting at $10/hour + commission (depending on experience)

Commission for every successful signed client

Performance-based growth opportunities

High performers can significantly increase earnings through commissions





Benefits & Perks



Health Insurance – Medical Stipend Program

We provide a Medical Stipend Program to help you enroll in the health insurance plan of your choice.



- Up to 100,000 PHP per year toward your health insurance policy

- Eligible after 90 days of employment

- Choose coverage that fits your needs, location, and preferred providers

- You may include beneficiaries (spouse, children) as long as total premiums stay within the allowance

- Annual premium is divided into weekly payments and added to your paycheck

- If your chosen plan exceeds the allowance, you simply pay the difference



Internet Allowance



- PHP 1,500 per month



Rice Allowance



- 1,000 per month



Annual Bonus



- Equivalent to one month’s base pay

- Paid annually on your work anniversary



Paid Time Off (PTO)



- 1 week paid vacation leave

- 1 week paid family/sick leave

- Use-it-or-lose-it policy to encourage rest and family time



- Tuition Reimbursement



50,000 PHP annually for your education or a family member’s educational expenses



To apply: 
/jobs/sales-development-representative-14



Only applicants who submit their application through the link above will be reviewed and processed.

title: Media Buyer Strategist & Webinar Growth Manager
description:
About The Brand

Caregiver Gone CEO™ works with approved agencies in the Ohio Department of Developmental Disibilities space who are ready to build predictable client acquisition infrastructure and scale beyond themselves.

This is not influencer marketing.

This is strategic positioning for serious caregiver operators.

We are building a clean, authority-driven funnel:

Content ? Webinar ? Enrollment ? Execution Labs.

We are looking for someone who understands conversion psychology, not just content creation.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Social Media & Webinar Growth Manager responsible for:



• Driving consistent engagement on social platforms

• Increasing qualified webinar registrations

• Improving show rate and conversion

• Managing monthly live webinar launch cycles

• Supporting content distribution and strategic growth



This role requires both strategic thinking and operational execution.

You must understand how content leads to revenue.

Responsibilities



???? Social Media Growth & Engagement

Develop and execute a monthly content strategy aligned with webinar funnel

Repurpose long-form content into high-converting reels and posts

Drive meaningful engagement (not vanity metrics)

Monitor analytics and adjust based on performance

Grow qualified audience of approved agencies (not broad followers)



???? Webinar Management (Monthly)

Build and manage 10-day promotional calendar

Coordinate
 reminders and SMS sequences

Oversee registration page optimization

Track show rate and attendance data

Improve conversion through data-backed iteration

Manage replay distribution and follow-up sequencing



???? Conversion Support

Optimize CTAs across social platforms

Analyze engagement-to-registration patterns

Improve messaging clarity and targeting

Support post-webinar follow-up systems

Track cost per registration (organic + boosted)



Requirements

You must have:

Proven experience growing engagement in the coaching, consulting, or service-based industry

A portfolio showing measurable results (registrations, show rates, conversions — not just aesthetic feeds)



Experience supporting live webinar funnels

Understanding of buyer psychology and positioning

Ability to execute under tight 10-day promotion windows

Strong communication and analytical skills



Bonus if you have:

Experience in compliance-heavy or regulated industries

Experience with
 Ads or boosted post optimization

Experience with CRM/email systems

What We’re Not Looking For

Someone who just schedules posts

Someone focused only on visuals

Someone who needs heavy supervision

Someone who measures success by likes instead of revenue

This is a growth role.

KPIs (What Success Looks Like)

Increased engagement from qualified audience

Improved webinar registration numbers

Show rate above 35%

Increased conversion from webinar to enrollment

Clean monthly launch execution



Must provide portfolio and references

To Apply



Submit:

Portfolio showing engagement + conversion results

Brief summary of how you’ve improved webinar funnels in the past

One example of a campaign that led to measurable revenue

If you understand how content drives infrastructure — we want to talk.

title: Lead Gen Agency/Manager Needed
description:
We are Omnya Growth Lab, the growth engine behind some of the world's fastest-scaling consumer apps. We built the UGC strategy that took BeReal to #1 on the App Store (50M+ downloads with $0 ad spend) and currently manage distribution for Polymarket and Cal.ai.We are looking for a Lead Generation Partner or Agency Owner in the Philippines to take over our entire outbound outreach department. We don't want to manage individual VAs; we want to manage one leader who oversees a high-performing team of "hunters."What We Are Looking ForInfrastructure: You already have a team and the tools (Apollo, Clay, Sales Nav, etc.) to hit the ground 
ctor Expertise: You understand the US startup landscape, specifically recently funded Consumer Tech (Seed to Series B).Proactive Management: You train the staff, monitor the KPIs, and iterate on scripts. We only want to see the "Booked Meetings" on our calendar.Expert English: Your team must write natural, founder-level English that avoids "bot-sounding" clichés.Scope of Work & DeliverablesYour team will be responsible for the "Volume & Velocity" of our sales pipeline:Daily Sourcing: Identifying 50+ high-value, funded US consumer apps daily.Multi-Channel Blitz: Running coordinated outreach across Gmail, LinkedIn, and Instagram DMs.KPI Driven: Maintaining a consistent flow of 160+ touchpoints per day across your team.CRM Hygiene: Ensuring all leads are tracked and follow-ups are automated or handled manually with care.The "Omnya" Outreach Script (Provided for your team):“Hey [Name], love the app. I run Omnya—we’re the team behind BeReal (#1 on App Store), Polymarket, and Cal.ai. We solve distribution for consumer apps by pushing 160–400 videos a month to make virality a math problem rather than luck. Worth a 10 min chat next week?”Compensation & LogisticsBudget: Starting at $500/month (This is a base management/service fee for the partnership; we are open to discussing performance-based bonuses/commissions for every qualified meeting booked).Hours: Must be available to sync during US Business Hours (EST/PST).Requirement: You must have a proven track record of managing a team that has successfully booked meetings for US-based B2B agencies.How to ApplyPlease do not send a generic 
l us about your team size and current lead gen stack.Share a brief case study of a US client you helped scale.

title: Cold Caller - 30 Calls Per Hour Minimum
description:
OVERVIEW



Your role is simple.



Call companies that sell annuities and ask if they want annuity leads.



The goal of every call is one thing only:



Find advisors who are interested in buying annuity leads.



Once they say yes, collect their name + phone number +
 so Max can follow up.



Do not overcomplicate the conversation.



CALLING SYSTEM



You will be calling using CloudTalk.



We will give you:



• Your own CloudTalk login

• A phone number assigned to you

• Access to the dialer



All calls must be made through CloudTalk.



CALL SPEED EXPECTATION



Minimum pace:



30 calls per hour



The job is simple and fast.



Calls should be short.



Move quickly from one call to the next.



VOI
S (VERY IMPORTANT)



Voi
s are actually preferred.



Why?



Because many advisors:



• Listen to the voi
 later

• Call back when they are free



Voi
 leads often convert well.



If the call goes to voi
, leave a voi
 whenever possible.



VOI
 SCRIPT



Example:



"Hi, this is calling about annuity leads. We generate annuity clients for advisors through our own ad spend and are looking for partners who want more annuity business. Call or text back if interested."



Short and simple.



WHAT WE SELL



We sell:



• Annuity leads

• Exclusive leads

• High-intent prospects

• Leads generated from our own ad spend



The advisor buys leads and then sells annuities to the client.



You are not selling the leads.



You are only finding advisors interested in buying leads.



WHO WE CALL



We only call financial advisors / insurance agents that sell annuities.



Examples:



• Financial advisors

• Insurance agencies

• Retirement planners

• Wealth advisors

• Independent agents



WHERE TO FIND THEM



Use:



• Google

• Google Maps

• LinkedIn

• Insurance directories



Search examples:



“annuity advisor near me”

“retirement planner”

“insurance agent annuities”

“financial advisor retirement planning”



You must be able to find businesses yourself using Google.



CALL SCRIPT



Keep it extremely simple.



Example:



"Hi, quick question. Do you currently work with annuities?"



(wait for answer)



If yes:



"The reason I'm calling is we generate annuity leads from our own ad spend and we're looking for advisors who want more annuity clients."



"Is that something you'd be open to?"



If they say yes:



"Perfect. Let me grab your information so Max can send details."



Collect:



• Name

• Phone

•

• Company



Then send it to Max.



WHAT COUNTS AS A LEAD



A lead counts if:



• They sell annuities

• They say they are interested in leads

• They give contact information



Send:



Name

Company

Phone




PAY STRUCTURE



You are paid based on qualified interested advisors.



Qualified means:



• They sell annuities

• They want leads

• They give contact information



More qualified leads = more pay.



TEST PERIOD



New callers go through a performance test period.



During the test we measure:



• Calls per hour

• Call consistency

• Leads generated

• Work speed



IMPORTANT



This job is a numbers game.



Most people will say no.



That is normal.



High call volume = leads.



FINAL NOTES



Always:



• Use CloudTalk for calls

• Leave voi
s whenever possible

• Keep calls short

• Stay polite

• Move quickly to the next call



Your only job is to find advisors interested in annuity leads.



Max handles the rest.



Before continuing with the job application, please answer the following questions:



Are you able to consistently make 30 calls per hour without complaints, slowing down, or losing 
ntum?



This role requires staying focused and moving quickly from one call to the next for most of the day. Are you comfortable spending long periods simply calling, keeping conversations short, and maintaining a fast pace?



The job is very simple: ask advisors if they want annuity leads and connect interested ones with our lead generation team. Are you able to follow this exact process without adding unnecessary steps?



Are you able to find businesses to call using Google and Google Maps throughout the day, without needing pre-made autodialing lists?

title: Amazon PPC Specialist for CPG Brand (Skinny Gum)

title: Content Creator & Social Media Strategist | Insurance | Financial Service
description:
Content Creator & Social Media Strategist — US Financial Services Firm

Insurance, Employee Benefits & Wealth Management Industry

Company:  Financial and insurance employee benefits firm

Location: Remote (Philippines preferred)

Hours: 20-30 hours/week with potential to grow to full-time

Compensation: $8–$12/hour USD depending on financial services content experience

Schedule: Flexible — must overlap with US Eastern Time for at least 2-3 hours daily



This Is NOT a Generic Social Media VA Role

We are looking for someone who can THINK and WRITE about insurance, employee benefits, retirement planning, and financial strategy — not just schedule posts someone else wrote.

If you've worked for an insurance agency, financial advisor, benefits brokerage, wealth management firm, or any professional services company in the US market and you created the actual content (not just posted it), keep reading. This role is built for you.

If your experience is limited to e-commerce, dropshipping, or consumer brand social media, this is not the right fit.



About Us

We are a financial services firm based in New Jersey, USA, operating two brands:

 — Employee benefits consulting for businesses (group health insurance, dental, vision, retirement plans like 401(k), voluntary benefits, ACA compliance). We serve medical practices, homecare agencies, auto dealerships, and growing businesses across NJ and NY and other states.

 — Wealth management, retirement planning, cash balance plans, life insurance strategies, disability insurance, estate planning, and executive benefits for high-income professionals — especially physicians, dentists, and business owners.

We are aggressively expanding into multiple market verticals and need a content professional who can generate high-quality thought leadership content, manage our social media presence across both brands, and help us become the most visible financial advisor in our market.



What You'll Do

Content Generation (50% of your time)

This is the core of the role. You will generate original content — not just repost articles or schedule pre-written material. You will:



Write 8-10 LinkedIn posts per week for the founder's personal profile  — thought leadership on retirement planning, employee benefits strategy, physician financial planning, insurance insights, and industry trends

Write 4-6 LinkedIn posts per week for two company pages  — educational content, service highlights, case study summaries, event promotions

Draft monthly
 newsletter content for both brands (distributed via Zoho Campaigns)

Write
 drip sequence copy for prospect nurture campaigns (5-7
 sequences targeting physicians, homecare agencies, and general business owners)

Create content for landing pages on both websites when needed

Draft scripts for short-form video content (60-90 second educational videos for LinkedIn)

Develop content calendar 2 weeks in advance for both brands

Research industry trends, regulatory changes (NJ/NY retirement mandates, ACA updates, wage parity changes), and competitor content to inform our content strategy



You will use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, Jasper) to accelerate your content creation — we encourage this. But the output must be polished, human, and sound like a real financial advisor talking to business owners and physicians. AI-generated content that sounds robotic or generic is not acceptable. You are the editor, quality controller, and voice shaper.

Social Media Execution (30% of your time)



Post all content on schedule across LinkedIn (personal profile + 2 company pages)

Send 25-40 personalized LinkedIn connection requests per day to target prospects: physicians, practice managers, HR directors, homecare agency owners, dental practice owners, and business owners in NJ and NY and other states

Write personalized connection request messages (not the default LinkedIn message — custo
ssages that reference the person's role, company, or recent post)

Engage authentically on LinkedIn: comment on 10-20 target prospects' posts daily with thoughtful, value-adding comments (not "Great post!" — real insights)

Respond to all comments on our posts within 4 hours

Monitor LinkedIn DMs and route qualified inquiries to the sales team (you'll flag them in Zoho CRM or via WhatsApp to Alex)

Manage
 
 ad content (create ad copy variations, suggest audience refinements)

Coordinate posting on 
 and
 for local community engagement



Strategy & Reporting (20% of your time)



Track weekly metrics: LinkedIn impressions, engagement rate, follower growth, profile views, connection acceptance rate,
 open/click rates

Identify top-performing content themes and recommend doubling down on what works

Research what other financial advisors, insurance brokers, and benefits consultants are posting on LinkedIn — competitive intelligence

Suggest new content formats, topics, and campaign ideas based on performance data and industry trends

Prepare a weekly content performance report (Google Sheet) every Friday

Attend a weekly 30-minute strategy call with Principal to review performance and plan upcoming content





Industry Knowledge We Need

You don't need to be a licensed insurance agent or financial advisor. But you DO need to understand these concepts well enough to write about them credibly:

Employee Benefits :



Group health insurance (how employers buy health coverage for their staff)

Dental and vision insurance plans

Voluntary benefits: critical illness, a
 insurance, hospital indemnity, supplemental life

401(k) retirement plans and how they work for small businesses

ACA (Affordable Care Act) employer mandate basics

Open enrollment and employee benefits enrollment process



Financial Planning :



Retirement planning for high-income professionals

Cash balance plans and defined benefit plans (you'll learn this — it's our specialty product)

Life insurance as a wealth transfer and estate planning tool

Disability insurance (especially "own-occupation" coverage for physicians)

Buy-sell agreements and key person insurance for business owners

Basic estate planning concepts (trusts, wealth transfer, estate tax)



Regulatory/Compliance awareness:



NJ RetireReady mandate (state retirement savings requirement)

NY Secure Choice Savings Program (state IRA mandate)

NY Wage Parity Law for homecare agencies

SECURE 2.0 Act tax credits for retirement plans

General awareness that financial services content has compliance review requirements (FINRA) — you don't manage compliance, but you need to understand that content must be reviewed before posting and cannot make performance promises or guarantees



If you've worked for a US insurance agency, financial advisory firm, employee benefits brokerage, or wealth management company and you wrote content about any of the above — you are exactly who we're looking for.

If you haven't worked in financial services but you're a strong B2B content writer who learns fast and can research industry topics thoroughly — we're open to that too, as long as your writing samples demonstrate the ability to write credibly about complex professional topics.



Required Skills



Exceptional written English — your content goes out under the name of a financial professional. It must be polished, authoritative, and free of errors.

LinkedIn content creation experience — you've written LinkedIn posts for a professional services company or executive (not personal blogging — B2B thought leadership)

Understanding of LinkedIn algorithm basics — you know that engagement in the first hour matters, that personal profiles outperform company pages, that comments drive reach more than likes

Canva proficiency — create professional graphics for LinkedIn posts,
 headers, and marketing materials

AI content tool experience — you use Claude, ChatGPT, Jasper, or similar to accelerate your work (we view this as a strength, not a shortcut)

Self-directed work ethic — you manage your own content calendar and don't need daily reminders to post

Ability to write in multiple brand voices — Kandelaki Solutions (approachable, benefits-focused, employer-friendly) vs.  (premium, sophisticated, physician/executive-focused)



Preferred Experience



2+ years creating content for a US insurance agency, financial advisor, benefits broker, or wealth management firm

Experience with Zoho Campaigns or similar
 marketing platform (Mailchimp, ActiveCampaign, HubSpot)

Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator

Understanding of the US healthcare system (enough to write about group health insurance intelligently)

Experience writing for physician or medical practice audiences

Video content creation (scripting, basic editing with CapCut or similar)

Experience with Google Analytics or LinkedIn Analytics for content performance tracking





Compensation & Growth

Starting rate: $8–$12/hour USD



$8-$9/hour: Strong B2B content writer with some financial services exposure, willing to learn the industry

$9-$10/hour: Proven financial services or insurance content experience with LinkedIn portfolio samples

$10-$12/hour: 2+ years creating content for US financial advisors or insurance agencies with demonstrable results (follower growth, lead generation from content)



Hours: 20-30 hours/week to start, potential full-time for exceptional performers

Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise, Payoneer, or direct bank transfer

Quarterly bonus: $100-$300 based on content performance metrics (LinkedIn growth,
 engagement, content-attributed leads)

Growth path: As we scale, this role can evolve into a Marketing Manager position overseeing additional content creators and managing our complete digital marketing strategy across multiple verticals.



How to Apply

Send the following (applications without ALL items will not be reviewed):

1. Your resume — PDF format

2. Financial services content samples — provide ONE of the following:



Links to 3+ LinkedIn posts you wrote for a financial advisor, insurance agency, or professional services company

A PDF portfolio showing content you created for financial services clients

Links to blog posts or articles you wrote on insurance, retirement planning, or employee benefits topics

If you don't have financial services samples: provide 3 B2B content samples from any professional services industry (legal, accounting, healthcare, consulting) that demonstrate your ability to write about complex topics credibly



3. LinkedIn profile link — your personal LinkedIn profile so we can see your own professional presence

4. Writing test — complete these TWO tasks:

Task A: Write a LinkedIn post (
words) on this topic: "Why physicians who own their medical practice should consider adding a cash balance plan on top of their 401(k) to shelter $150,000+ per year from taxes." Write it as if you are a financial advisor speaking directly to doctors. Professional but conversational — not salesy, not academic.

Task B: Write a LinkedIn connection request message (under 300 characters — LinkedIn's limit) that you would send to the owner of a homecare agency in New Jersey. The goal is to get them to accept the connection and eventually visit our website for a free benefits review. Make it personal and specific, not generic.

5. Your availability — confirm hours per week and timezone overlap with US Eastern Time

6. Your expected hourly rate within the posted range



What We're NOT Looking For



Content spinners who rewrite articles from other websites

Social media managers whose experience is only consumer brands, influencers, or e-commerce

People who will use AI to generate everything and submit it without editing or quality control

Anyone who cannot write at a native English level (this is non-negotiable for a role where content goes out under a financial professional's name)

People looking for a short-term gig — this is a long-term team position





About Working With Us

We are direct communicators. We give clear, honest feedback — both when things are great and when they need improvement. We expect you to take ownership of content quality and social media performance as if your name were on it.

In return, we pay reliably and on time, respect your schedule and personal time, invest in your professional development, give you creative latitude to experiment and improve, and treat you as a valued tea
mber — not a replaceable task-doer.

If you're a talented content creator who wants to specialize in financial services marketing with a growing US firm that will challenge you and value your work, we want to hear from you.

title: Web Automation Bot Builder / Data Scraping Specialist
description:
We want to build automation tools that search the internet for public information that signals potential work opportunities.



These tools will automatically search approved websites, collect specific data, and log the information into our database for review.



?



Job Overview



We are looking for a technical Virtual Assistant or developer who can build and maintain web search bots / data scraping automation tools.



Your role is to create bots that:

 1. Search approved websites

 2. Extract specific information

 3. Clean the data

 4. Remove duplicates

 5. Log results into Google Sheets or Airtable

 6. Flag incomplete results for review



The system should be reliable, organized, and easy to maintain.



?



What You Will Be Building



The automation tools will monitor public online data such as:

 • government records

 • permit databases

 • public i
 reports

 • violation databases

 • public notices



The bot must automatically detect new records or updates and record them in a spreadsheet.



Example data fields we collect:

 • address

 • violation type

 • permit type

 • date issued

 • status

 • source link

 • notes



?



Your Responsibilities



You will be responsible for:



1. Research & Source Identification



Identify and document websites that contain relevant public information.



2. Manual Testing



Test the data collection manually first to verify the process works.



3. Bot Development



Build automation scripts that:

 • search websites

 • extract data

 • process results

 • store data



4. Data Processing



Clean and standardize the collected data.



5. Duplicate Detection



Ensure the same records are not logged twice.



6. Data Logging



Send all results into our master spreadsheet or database.



7. Maintenance



Monitor the bots weekly and fix issues if websites change.



?



Technical Skills Required



Applicants must have experience with at least one of the following:



Python automation using:

 • Playwright

 • Selenium

 • BeautifulSoup



OR automation platforms such as:

 • Apify

 • Browse AI

 • Puppeteer

 • 

 • Zapier



You must also understand:

 • HTML page structure

 • CSS selectors

 • web scraping techniques

 • data formatting

 • API usage (preferred)



?



Deliverables



Your final system should:



? Search websites automatically

? Extract specific data fields

? Store results in Google Sheets or Airtable

? Run automatically or on schedule

? Flag missing data

? Prevent duplicates

? Be documented so it can be maintained later



?



Tools We Currently Use



You may work with:

 • Google Sheets

 • Airtable

 • Python scripts

 • automation platforms



You should recommend the best technical solution for reliability and long-term maintenance.



?



Important: Application Test (Required)



To be considered for this role, you must complete the following small test task.



This helps us verify you actually understand web data extraction.



?



TEST TASK



Find 5 building violations in New York City from the public building database.



Use this site:



NYC Building Information System





Steps:

 1. Search for properties in the Bronx or Brooklyn.

 2. Open the Violations section for each property.

 3. Collect the following information:



 • property address

 • violation number

 • violation type

 • issue date

 • status

 • source page link



Create a small table like:

Address -Violation # -Type-Date- Status-Source



Bonus (Optional)



If you want to stand out, also include:

 • a short explanation of how you would automate collecting this information

 • what tools or programming language you would use

 • how the bot would store the data



?



What We Look For



Strong candidates will demonstrate:



? ability to analyze websites

? understanding of automation workflows

? clean data organization

? ability to build reliable scripts

? clear communication



?



How to Apply



When applying, please include:

 1. Your experience with web scraping or automation

 2. Tools or languages you are strongest with

 3. A link to any previous automation projects (if available)

 4. Your completed test task



Applications that do not complete the test will not be reviewed.



?



Opportunity for Long-Term Work



This position may expand to additional projects including:

 • monitoring public records

 • tracking permit filings

 • monitoring industry data

 • building multiple automation systems



Reliable candidates may receive long-term weekly work.

title: Video Editor & AI Content Creator ? Scale With a $1M+/Year Scandinavian Brand (Full-Time, $900-1200/mo + Bonuses)
description:
JOB DESCRIPTION:

Start your application with the word "Viking" or it won't be read.



Here's what's happening:

We're a Scandinavian e-commerce brand in pet health that crossed $1M+ in annual revenue in our first year. We have 25,000+ customers. Our ads are what built this — not investors, not luck, not partnerships. Direct response ads on Meta that convert cold traffic into buyers, every single day.

And we're just getting started.

Right now, our biggest bottleneck is creative. We need more ads, faster, better, and we need someone who can own that process alongside the CEO. Not just "edit videos." Actually understand why an ad works, build more of what wins, kill what doesn't, and constantly push the bar higher.

That's you.



WHY THIS ROLE IS DIFFERENT:

This isn't a "here's a brief, make it pretty" job. You'll see real numbers. You'll know which ads are printing money and which ones flopped. You'll understand the strategy behind every creative decision. And over time, you'll go from executing briefs to creating winning concepts on your own.

We want someone who grows into a Creative Strategist — not someone who stays a button-pusher forever.

Where you start:

Video Editor & AI Content Creator — executing briefs, editing ads, building assets.

Where you can go (6-12 months):

Creative Lead — concepting ads, directing UGC creators, owning the entire creative pipeline.

We've seen what happens when we find the right person and give them room to run. That's what we're offering.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO:

Week 1-4 (Onboarding):

Learn our brand, our customer (we'll share our full research), our ad library, and our workflows. Edit 3-5 video ads per week from existing footage and assets. Get familiar with our brand and content pipeline. Go through our editing training program.

Month 2+ (Full Speed):

Edit 5-10 short-form video ads per week 
, Instagram, TikTok). Create UGC-style and testimonial-style edits from raw footage. Build image and video assets using AI generation tools (Midjourney, Runway, Kling, CapCut AI — we'll train you on our specific stack). Repurpose winning concepts into new variations and formats. Experiment with new AI tools and workflows — then show the team what works. Assist with creative assets as needed 
 banners, thumbnails, simple motion graphics).

KPIs — How we measure success:

Ads delivered on time (deadline = deadline, no exceptions).

Creative hit rate — percentage of your ads that beat our control (we track this).

Volume — consistent output without quality dropping.

Proactivity — you flag problems, suggest ideas, and improve without being asked.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

You're a video editor who's already playing with AI tools because you're genuinely curious. Not because someone told you to — because you can't help it. You've tested Runway, Kling, Pika, Midjourney, CapCut AI, or similar tools on your own time. You understand that AI doesn't replace creativity — it 10x's it.

You also understand direct response. You know that the first 3 seconds of an ad d
 everything. You've watched breakdowns of winning ads. You notice hooks, transitions, pacing. Maybe you've edited ads before. Maybe you've just studied them obsessively. Either way, you get it.



Required:

Strong video editing skills (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut — tool doesn't matter, output does).

Experience editing short-form content (ads, Reels, TikToks).

Hands-on experience with at least 2 AI tools (image gen, video gen, or AI-assisted editing).

Good eye for typography, pacing, and visual hierarchy.

Solid written English for team communication.

Reliable internet and a setup that can handle video editing.

Bonus (will put you ahead):

You can show ads you've edited that actually ran as paid campaigns.

You understand hook ? story ? CTA structure.

Experience with Shopify, Canva, or Figma.

Motion graphics or animation skills.

Experience in pet, health, wellness, or DTC e-commerce.



COMPENSATION & GROWTH:

$900 – $1,200 USD/month base (depending on experience).

Performance bonuses on winning ads (ads that beat our control and scale = bonus for you).

13th month bonus after 1 year.

Salary review at 6 months — if you're performing, you'll be compensated for it.

Clear path from Video Editor ? Creative Lead as we scale.

Paid monthly via EasyPay or PayPal.



THE DETAILS:

Full-time, 40 hours per week.

Flexible schedule — but minimum 3-4 hours daily overlap with Central European Time (CET).

Long-term position — we're building a team, not hiring for a project.

You'll work directly with the CEO. No layers. No bureaucracy. Direct feedback, fast decisions.

Remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines.



HOW TO APPLY (READ CAREFULLY):



Applications that skip any of these steps will be deleted immediately.

Step 1: Start your message with the word "Viking."

Step 2: Send your portfolio OR 3 examples of short-form video content you've edited (ads, Reels, TikToks). If you've created anything using AI tools, include it — it will put you ahead.

Step 3: Answer these two questions (2-3 sentences each):

— "What AI tool have you experimented with recently, and what specifically did you use it for?"

— "What's a
 or Instagram ad you've seen recently that you thought was really well made? Why?"

Step 4: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself. Show your face, tell us who you are, why this role excites you, and what you'd bring. (If you don't know Loom — it's free at 
. This is part of the test.)



HIRING PROCESS:



1. Application review (we read every "Viking" application)

2. Portfolio review — does your work match our standard?

3. Top 5-6 candidates receive a paid test task ($20-30 USD) — a real brief, real footage, real deadline

4. Top 2-3 get a Zoom interview with the CEO

5. Offer + 2-week paid trial

6. Full-time hire



We keep this post active and review applications on a rolling basis. If you're reading this, we're still hiring. Apply now.

title: Customer Retention Specialist
description:
IMPORTANT: APPLICATIONS WILL ONLY BE CONSIDERED FROM CANDIDATES WITH PRIOR SAAS INDUSTRY EXPERIENCE IN RETENTION-FOCUSED ROLES.





ABOUT THE POSITION:

We are seeking a proactive and relationship-driven Customer Retention Specialist to support and nurture our growing customer base. In this role, you will focus on strengthening customer relationships, improving overall satisfaction, and promoting long-term retention.



The ideal candidate is highly organized, communicates clearly, and takes initiative in identifying ways to enhance the customer experience. You will work closely with customers to understand their goals, address concerns, and ensure they continue to receive value from our platform.



As the primary point of contact for assigned customers, you will build and maintain strong, long-term relationships while monitoring customer satisfaction and resolving concerns proactively. You will conduct regular check-ins to ensure customers are achieving their goals and identify opportunities to improve retention and engagement.



In addition, you will collaborate with internal teams to resolve customer issues effectively, assist with onboarding new customers, and maintain accurate records of all customer interactions. You will also track feedback, identify trends or recurring concerns, and support renewal efforts to help maintain long-term customer relationships.



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:

• Strong English communication skills — both written and verbal are REQUIRED

• Proven experience in a customer retention role is REQUIRED

• Strong interpersonal and relationship-building skills

• Strong problem-solving abilities and attention to detail

• Ability to collaborate effectively with internal teams

• Calm, professional, and solution-oriented when handling challenges

• Strong analytical thinking and ability to interpret customer feedback and trends



WORK SETUP:

• Remote

• Full-time

• 8 hours per day, 5 days per week



HOW TO APPLY:

     • Use “SUCCESS” as the subject line of your

     • Write a short cover letter about yourself and relevant experience

     • Include a link to your most updated resume/CV



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A RESUME OR RESUME LINK WILL NOT BE REVIEWED

title: Instagram Cold DM Setter / VA for Fitness Coaching Business
description:
I am looking for a motivated, reliable, and skilled VA to help assist me with Instagram cold outreach for my fitness coaching business.



What you will be doing:

You will be sending 80–100 cold DMs per day to potential clients using my outreach framework and following up with leads consistently.



This role is not just about copying and pasting messages. I need someone who knows how to start natural conversations, keep them going, ask probing questions, build rapport, and help move the conversation in the right direction.



What I’m looking for:



Previous Instagram cold outreach / DM setting experience



Experience in the fitness industry or strong familiarity with fitness coaching offers, fitness clients, and the types of struggles they deal with



Experience with sending completely cold DM's with an end without ads organically



Strong understanding of how to identify quality prospective clients



Someone who is an excellent conversationalist and can make interactions feel natural, engaging, and genuine



Ability to ask the right follow-up and probing questions to keep conversations moving



Hardworking, dependable, and able to consistently meet daily outreach requirements



Strong written communication skills



Someone who can follow instruction, stay organized, and represent my brand well



Compensation:



$300/month base pay



Bonus structure with the opportunity to make $1,500+ per month



Bi-weekly pay via PayPal or Wise



To apply:

To demonstrate your seriousness, please apply with the word “FIT” at the top of your application.



I will not review your application if you do not include this.



Please also attach in your portfolio or application any previous Instagram DM cold outreach experience, especially anything related to the fitness industry, if applicable.



I’m looking for someone who can come in, learn quickly, connect with people well, and become a valuable part of the team.



I look forward to hearing from you soon.

title: Senior Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant (Google Ads + Meta Ads + TikTok Ads + SEO)
description:
Job Title:  

Senior Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant (Google Ads + Meta Ads + TikTok Ads + SEO)



Job Type:  

Part-Time (Opportunity to become Full-Time)





---



### About Our Company



We are a fast-growing service company based in New York that specializes in:



- Junk Removal  

- Property Cleanouts  

- Construction Debris Removal  

- Demolition Cleanup  

- Estate Cleanouts  

- Hoarder Cleanouts  



Our goal is to build a top-tier digital presence that consistently generates leads and grows the company.



We are looking for a serious, experienced Digital Marketing Virtual Assistant who understands advertising, SEO, and website optimization.



This position is not for beginners.



We are looking for someone who has real experience managing ads and improving websites for lead generation.



---

- Organize and improve website structure

- Upload job photos and blog posts

- Improve website navigation and user experience

- Ensure all pages are properly optimized



---

- Improve local SEO rankings

Platforms we use:



- Google Ads

- Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)

- Creating and managing campaigns

- Tracking leads and campaign results



---



#### Lead Generation & Automation

- Ensure website forms are working properly

- Set up
 auto-responses

- Track incoming leads

- Improve conversion systems



---



### Requirements



Applicants must have experience with:



- Google Ads

- Meta Ads 
 / Instagram)

- TikTok Ads

- Website management (WordPress or similar)

- SEO optimization

- Google Analytics



Bonus experience:



- Local SEO

- Service business marketing

- Lead generation funnels



---



### What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who is:



- Experienced and capable

- Detail-oriented

- Proactive

- Focused on results

- Interested in long-term growth



This is not a testing position.



We want someone who is confident in their skills and ready to help grow the company.



---



### Work Schedule



10–20 hours per week initially.



Opportunity for full-time work as the company grows.



---



### Application Requirements



To be considered for this position, please include the following:



1. Examples of ad campaigns you have managed  

2. Platforms you have used (Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok Ads)  

3. Websites you have worked on

2. How would you improve a local service website to generate more leads?



3. What is the difference between optimizing for clicks vs optimizing for conversions?



4. What targeting strategy would you use for a local service business running
 or 
 ads?



Applicants who do not complete the skill test will not be considered.



---



### Final Note

If you are experienced, motivated, and confident in your digital marketing skills, we would like to work with you.
