title: Local SEO and AEO (LLM Search) Specialist
description:
Hello! 



Podcast Builders is looking for a highly driven SEO/AEO specialist to help us become the most visible podcast company in the western Chicago suburbs.



Our goal is not to “do SEO tasks.”

Our goal is to dominate search results.



When founders search things like:



• podcast studio near me

• podcast production company near me

• podcast marketing agency

• how to start a podcast for business

• Chicagoland podcast studio



Podcast Builders should consistently appear at or near the top of results.



We also want to appear in AI-generated answers from platforms such as:



• ChatGPT

• Gemini

• Claude

• Perplexity



This role is about building a strategy and executing it so Podcast Builders becomes the default company people discover when searching for podcast services locally.



Compensation



$800 USD per month 



This has the potential to be a long-term role with potential for growth based on performance and results. (Although it will start as a 3 month role 



The Objective:



Within the next 3-6 months we want Podcast Builders to become:



• One of the top results on Google for podcast-related searches in the western Chicago suburbs

• A top Google Maps result for podcast studios and podcast production

• A company that frequently appears in AI search results and recommendations



Success in this role means increased rankings, traffic, and leads from search.



What Success Looks Like



Examples of outcomes we want to achieve:



Ranking on page one for searches like:



• podcast studio near me

• podcast studio Chicago suburbs

• podcast production company near me

• podcast marketing agency near me



Showing up in AI answers and recommendations when people ask questions like:



• how do I start a podcast for my business

• what is the best podcast studio near Chicago

• should my company start a podcast



Increasing:



• organic website traffic

• Google Business profile visibility

• inbound leads from search



Your Role



Your job is to design and execute a strategy that improves our visibility across:



• Google search

• Google Maps

• AI search platforms

• blog and content rankings



You will identify the highest-value opportunities and implement strategies that move us toward the goal of becoming the top podcast brand discovered through search locally.



This may include:



• optimizing our Google Business profile

• improving website SEO

• developing content strategies

• building backlinks

• optimizing content for AI search engines



But the focus is always on results, not activity.



Skills Required



Strong experience with:



• Local SEO

• Google Business Profile optimization

• Keyword research and search intent

• On-page SEO

• Content SEO

• Backlink strategies



Bonus experience:



• AI search optimization (AEO / LLM search)

• Schema markup

• SEO tools like Ahrefs or SEMrush



Tools



Google Search Console

Google Analytics

Ahrefs or SEMrush

AI tools for research and optimization



How to Apply



Please include:



Your resume

Examples of websites you helped rank in Google search

The SEO/AEO tools you typically use



Podcast Builders is looking for someone who wants to win in search, not just complete tasks.



If you enjoy building strategies that lead to real visibility and real growth, we’d love to hear from you.



Looking forward to hearing from you! 



-Alex

title: Virtual Assistant – Digital Media & Creative Operations (Remote)
description:
If you love film, television, Hollywood, media content, and the entertainment industry, this may be the perfect opportunity for you.



We are seeking a reliable and detail-oriented Virtual Assistant based in the Philippines to support a creative professional in Los Angeles who works as an Actor, Writer, Director, and Producer.



This role supports multiple creative and business projects including social media, online coaching, voice-over work, digital products, drama education resources, and fil
dia production projects.



This is a beginning-level position with excellent potential for future growth in responsibility and salary as the business grows and becomes more successful. 



You will work directly with the business owner and help manage the operational side of a growing creative brand in the entertainment industry.





Responsibilities - 





Social Media & Content Support:



Schedule and publish social media posts for multiple accounts (Instagram, YouTube, TikTok)



Write captions and research hashtags



Upload short-form video content and organize media files



Track analytics and engagement metrics



Assist with content repurposing across platforms





Research & Business Growth:



Conduct online research for new business opportunities



Identify potential clients, collaborators, and marketing opportunities



Research entertainment industry contacts and opportunities



Find new ideas and strategies to help grow the business





Coaching & Workshop Promotion:



Assist in promoting online acting coaching sessions and workshops



Update website information and online listings



Manage signups and help organize workshop materials





Voice-Over & Media Support:



Help organize voice-over submissions and audition materials



Upload media content to platforms like YouTube



Assist with organizing digital media files and recordings





AI Tools & Digital Workflow:



Use AI tools to assist with content creation, research, and writing



Follow AI prompt workflows provided by the business owner



Help implement AI systems for efficiency and productivity





Film & Media Production Support:



Assist with research and coordination for film and media projects



Support development, pre-production, production, and post-production organization



Help organize scripts, documents, and production materials





Drama Education & Digital Products:



Assist with formatting and organizing drama education materials



Help prepare digital products such as PDFs and teaching resources



Upload and manage product files when needed





Administrative Support:



Conduct travel research and booking options



Help track travel points and loyalty programs



Update calendar appointments and scheduling



General administrative and organizational tasks





Required Skills:



Strong written English communication



Excellent organizational skills



Ability to conduct accurate online research



Detail-oriented and reliable



Comfortable using new software and online tools



Strong internet connection





Bonus Skills (Not Required but Helpful):



Canva or basic graphic design



Video editing or media organization



Social media management tools



Experience using AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.)



YouTube uploads or content scheduling tools





Work Schedule:



Remote position

Full-time or part-time available

Flexible schedule with consistent weekly hours



Compensation:



This position offers growth opportunities as the business expands, including potential increases in responsibility and compensation, as well as bonuses. This is a long-term position. 





Why This Is a Unique Opportunity:



You will be working directly with a creative professional in Los Angeles, gaining exposure to the entertainment industry, filmmaking, online media, and digital entrepreneurship.





This role is ideal for someone who is:



Interested in film and television



Curious about media production



Excited about working with creative projects



Motivated to grow with a small but expanding business



To confirm that you carefully read this job description, please include the word "Hollywood" in the first line of your application.

description:

description:
We are looking for a highly driven E-commerce Operational Manager who wants to grow into a long-term leadership role and potentially evolve into a key business partner. We need someone who can take ownership, build systems, and reduce chaos.



Responsibilities:

Oversee daily operations across multiple departments.

Coordinate between teams to ensure deadlines are met and priorities are aligned.

Identify operational bottlenecks and create solutions to prevent delays.

Support the business owner by handling critical operational tasks, allowing them to focus on growth and strategy.

Analyze workflows, processes, and systems to optimize efficiency.

Ensure quality control and maintain standards across all aspects of the e-commerce business.

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while staying adaptable in a fast-changing environment.

Proactively communicate challenges and opportunities to the owner.

3. What mindset would you adopt to ensure the owner can focus on growth and strategy without being bogged down in daily operations?

title: Social Media Marketing & Growth Specialist (B2B)
description:
Are you a LinkedIn & Social Media Marketing Expert? ArrowAvia is seeking a dedicated specialist with at least two years of experience to lead our professional presence on LinkedIn. Your mission is to build brand awareness and trust with high-end B2B prospects, moving them through a strategic funnel: Know > Like > Trust > Connect & Try.



What You Will Do:

•	LinkedIn Design: Create high-quality LinkedIn Posts, Article Covers, Carousels, and Single Image Ads.



•	Targeted Ads: Set up and manage LinkedIn Ad campaigns to reach specific companies and decision-makers.



•	Audience Insights (Social Listening): Use Reddit and specialized forums to monitor industry trends and turn customer pain points into engaging content topics.



•	Podcast Repurposing: Extract and edit engaging video snippets from Podcast sessions for LinkedIn.



•	Professional Networking: Use LinkedIn to coordinate and schedule Podcast guest appearances with industry leaders.



•	Content Leadership: Manage the Annual Content Calendar, ensuring all posts and campaigns are executed on time.



•	Lead Analytics: Track performance through KPIs (CTR, CPL) to generate actionable Leads.



•	Keep the Blogs page fresh and updated with new, relevant content that speaks to our B2B aviation audience.







Skills & Requirements:

•	Experience: Minimum two years of proven experience in LinkedIn marketing and B2B strategies.



•	B2B Psychology: Ability to write persuasive content that motivates professional decision-makers.



•	Design & Video: Proficiency in Canva and video editing tools for professional LinkedIn formats.



•	AI Tools: Proactive use of AI tools (ChatGPT/Jasper) to optimize content and research.



•	Remote Discipline: Must follow UAE business hours (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM GST – Dubai time).



Work Details:

•	Location: 100% Remote (Philippines preferred).



•	Reporting: Working within the Business Development Department.



•	Competitive base salary + Performance-based incentives for outstanding results and high-quality lead generation.

title: Entry-Level Healthcare Virtual Assistant (full/part-time)
description:
APPLICATION PROCESS:

1
 us your resume in PDF format only. Include all of the jobs you've worked at and the month + year. Do not leave anything off. Do not leave anything off.  You must provide an explanation of any gaps in your work history. Include the compensation you received for each job. Do not give us your hourly pay, only your annual compensation or total compensation.  If there is any gap in your resume without an explanation of the gap, you will be disqualified.



2.
 us a 60-second video of yourself answering the following question:

What are the 3 most important things that the company you work for MUST do to show you that they care about you? For example, if they don’t give me these 3 things then that means they don’t care about me. The video CANNOT EXCEED 60 seconds, or you will automatically be disqualified.



3. IMPORTANT: Please
 us at 
 to follow the above instructions will result in automatic disqualifications.  Do not DM us or call us or contact us in any other way.



ABOUT OUR COMPANY:

Achieve Integrative Health is the #1 rated Acupuncture & Wellness Clinic in the United States with over 760 five star google reviews. Our Mission is to help people restore their body’s God given ability to heal itself so that they can do what they love. Our vision is to equip and inspire one million people around the world to do what they love, when they want, with whom they want. 



WHY JOIN US?

• You’ll Achieve your Goals = our team provides all of the resources (information, training, opportunities) you’ll need to achieve all of your Professional, Financial and Personal Goals, as long as you are willing to put in the work and deliver results.



• Peace and Joy Team = we have a phenomenal culture of care for our patients and our tea
mbers. We are very strict with our rules, policies and core values in order to protect our culture of peace and joy.  Imagine being on a team where you don’t have to deal with people who talk behind your back and end up back stabbing you.  Imagine a team where all of your teammates want you to succeed in Life and they will do their best to help you achieve that.



• Be Highly Rewarded as a Side Benefit = imagine being able to do your Passion everyday and make a phenomenal living as a side benefit. The average "experienced" VAs in the Philippines/Indonesia make $5-$7 USD/hr, our entry-level VAs start off making $5/hr. We have a quarterly bonus program, where some of our tea
mbers have earned $500-$1,000USD per quarter, and this year 2025, because the team has performed so well, some tea
mbers were paid an 'additional' year end bonus of $2000-$3000 USD.



BENEFITS

• Competitive Total Compensation = $5-$12 USD/hr for graveyard shift only.

• Unlimited Opportunities for Growth = as long as you can generate more results for the company we will never limit your ability to grow within our company. Every tea
mber can also become a partner of the business if they desire.

• Other Benefits for qualified tea
mbers = paid-time off, premiu
dical insurance, Employee Savings Matching Program

• Work from Home = no more 2-4 hour commutes to work

• Wellness Initiatives = benefit from complimentary virtual health services from our medical providers, ensuring your well-being and your family’s well-being is always a priority.



JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

• Receive all inbound calls to close Leads wanting to receive treatments at our clinic

• Call,
, and use various communication forms to identify the validity and potential of the lead

• Receive all inbound calls to answer questions – fact find and qualify lead/route to appropriate tea
mbers

• Work with patients to ensure they are satisfied with the services provided

• Encourage happy patients to send us their success stories

• Share patient success stories during daily company meeting

• Implement our CARE system to follow-up with our patients to provide 5 star service

• Check-in and checkout patients

• Verify Insurance Benefits

• Other additional tasks may be added based on your strengths…



CHARACTER REQUIREMENTS & QUALIFICATIONS

• You must truly have a caring heart and truly want to help people improve their health, if you are mainly focused on how much money you can make, we are not the team for you

• You must speak Fluent English (ie. someone on the phone can understand what you're saying w/o straining)

• You must be organized and be able to handle multiple tasks and responsibilities everyday. If you’re looking to only do one or two tasks per day, we are the wrong team for you.

• You must be able to follow instructions exactly as written, if you don’t like reading or following instructions, we are not the right team for you

• You must have a good heart. If you like to gossip behind peoples back, please don’t apply.

• You must value Results over effort. If you like to be paid based on how many tasks you completed or how much responsibilities you have, we are not the team for you. We pay ONLY based on you meeting your KPIs, metrics, quotas.

• You must sleep the same schedule 7 days a week, as this is a graveyard shift, you cannot switch back to the Philippines/Indonesian time zone on the weekends as this destroys your health. Your Health is our priority, and if you don’t value your own health we don’t want you on our team.

• You must be honest and have integrity. If you are caught lying, you will be immediately terminated.

• You must want to EARN your pay (ie. base salary + bonuses) instead of being given a pay (ie. focused only on base salary) that you didn’t earn.

* we are not looking for experience, we prefer candidates who have no medical VA experience, as having experience hinders your success on our team.  We are looking for character, who you are as a person.



WORKSTATION REQUIREMENTS

• You must have a separate quiet room to work in. You can not have your children or anybody else in the room that you work as your screen will be displaying confidential information, no exceptions.

• There can not be any background noise in your room when you are making phone calls.

• You will be required to provide photos of your workspace

• We will also randomly ask you to show your workspace via your webcam, and if you are caught lying you will be fired immediately.



COMPUTER AND INTERNET REQUIREMENTS:

• Fast and reliable wired internet connection of not less than 100 Mbps

• Secondary and Tertiary Back up Internet of not less than 10 Mbps

• At least one Power Station Backup

• Dual Monitor

• Intel Core i3 or higher Operating System with at least 8gb RAM

• Excellent quality headset with microphone, and a working webcam



WORK SCHEDULE:

OPTION 1 > Full-time 8:00 - 18:00 (M-Th) 8:00-16:00 (F) U.S. Central Standard Time, 2-hr lunch breaks 

OPTION 2 > Part-time 7:00-13:00 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time 

OPTION 3 > Part-time 13:00-18:30 (M-F) U.S. Central Standard Time

title: Creative Director / Content Research VA (Reels + YouTube)
description:
We are looking for a Creative Director / Content Research VA who understands viral content, social media trends, and audience psychology.



This is not a basic VA role.

Your job is to study what works in our niche, generate winning ideas, and help us execute consistently.



If you are someone who constantly studies viral content, understands hooks, and knows how to turn ideas into scripts, this role is for you.



Your Core Responsibilities



1. Viral Content Research

Your primary job will be identifying high-performing content in our niche.



This includes:

Researching Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube daily

Finding viral videos in the trading / finance niche

Identifying patterns such as:

Hooks that stop the scroll

----Video formats

----Storytelling structures

----Topics that generate high engagement

----Logging viral ideas into a content idea database



Your goal is to bring winning ideas we can replicate and improve.



2. Script Creation Using AI



Once viral ideas are identified, you will:

Turn those ideas into high-quality scripts

Use AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with script writing

Structure scripts with:

----Strong hooks

----Clear value

----Simple explanations

----Calls to action



Scripts should be designed to maximize engagement and retention.



3. Content Scheduling

You will manage the scheduling of new content:



-Weekly responsibilities:

Schedule 5–6 new Instagram Reels

Schedule 1 YouTube video

Ensure content is posted consistently and on time



4. Repurposed Content Distribution

In addition to new content, you will:

Post 10–15 repurposed videos per week using Instagram Trial Reels

Help test older content to reach new audiences

Organize and track which videos perform best



Ideal Candidate



---You are someone who:

Understands how viral content works

Studies Instagram, YouTube, and TikTok trends

Can identify patterns behind high-performing videos

Has strong creative instincts

Is organized and reliable

Is comfortable using AI tools

Has experience scheduling social media content



---Bonus if you:

Understand the trading / finance niche

Have experience with Instagram growth strategies



---Tools You May Use

ChatGPT or AI writing tools

Google Docs / Sheets

Instagram scheduling tools

YouTube Studio



Expectations

You will be responsible for helping drive consistent content output and idea generation.



-----Weekly targets:

5–6 new Reels scheduled

1 YouTube video scheduled

10–15 repurposed trial reels posted

New viral content ideas documented

 application.

 to:

 Seconds to FIRE
 Page

ou will also help:

The goal is to maintain daily activity and grow the audience while ensuring all communication stays aligned with the brand voice.

Time Commitment

What I Am Looking For

• Attention to detail

• Ability to follow instructions carefully

Application Process

 page

The Goal of This Role

• Grow the audiences on 
 and

• Maintain consistent engagement

This allows me to focus on creating content and expanding the platform.

title: Senior Bookkeeper *Superstar Only*
description:
We are looking for two experienced bookkeepers to join our finance team and take ownership of expense categorization, transaction reconciliation, accounts payable, and invoice processing across multiple legal entities.



The bookkeepers will work closely with the CFO, ensuring that all financial transactions are accurately recorded, categorized, and reconciled on a regular basis. This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, organized, and comfortable managing financial data across multiple platforms — including Xero, Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and our custom CRM.



Key Responsibilities

- Categorize all expenses and transactions in Xero, ensuring accurate classification for reporting and compliance

- Reconcile transactions across multiple payment platforms, including Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRM tools

- Manage accounts payable, ensuring all invoices are properly reviewed, recorded, and scheduled for payment

- Assist with invoice processing, ensuring all vendor invoices are accurately documented and match purchase orders where applicable

- Work closely with the CFO to provide up-to-date financial records for monthly, quarterly, and annual reporting

- Ensure all financial data is accurate and properly organized to support compliance across multiple jurisdictions

- Flag discrepancies or unusual transactions for review by the CFO



What We’re Looking For

- At least 5 years of experience in bookkeeping and expense reconciliation

- Strong proficiency in Xero

- Experience working with Stripe, PayPal, Shopify, and custom CRMs

- Strong attention to detail and organizational skills

- Experience handling multi-entity, multi-currency financial data preferred

- Comfortable working in a remote-first environment

- Fluent in English, both written and spoken



Requirements for Effective Remote Work

- Reliable computer or laptop capable of photo and video editing

- Stable high-speed internet connection

- Conducive work environment



Working Schedule

- Full-time opportunity

- Remote work setup (Philippines-based applicants only)



Benefits

- Competitive pay

- Training and growth opportunities

- Opportunity to work with a fast-growing content-driven company



Salary range

- Php 50, 000 to Php 70, 000 (based on experience)



Application Instructions

Since this is a long-term position, there will be an in-depth qualification process. If you believe you have what it takes, here is what to do next:



Please go to the link below, review the questions carefully, and share the required information.






If you believe you meet our qualifications and requirements, we encourage you to apply now and become a valuable part of our rapidly expanding company.

title: Notion Systems Architect (Zapier/Make) — Build a Founder Operating System
description:
We are looking for someone who doesn’t just automate workflows, but can design and build the operating system behind them.



Systems Architect (Notion + Automation)



Luxure Lifestyle is a high-touch lifestyle and executive support brand entering a growth phase. We are building the internal systems required to support scale while protecting executive focus.



We are hiring a Systems Architect to design and build our founder operating system from the ground up.



This role is hands-on. You will personally architect and configure the systems that manage operations, reporting, and organizational visibility.



This is not a strategy-only position. You will design and build the system yourself.



---------------------
. Founder Operating System (Notion)

Design and build a centralized operating system including:

Relational databases for tasks, meetings, initiatives, KPIs, hiring, and SOPs

Clean database architecture and structured permissions

Connected workflows that eliminate fragmented tools

Scalable systems designed for long-term use



2. Automation & Workflow Infrastructure

Build systems that organize and route operational work:

Centralized intake from Gmail, Slack, and meeting outputs

Approval pipelines and structured review processes

Automation using Zapier or Make

Safeguards to prevent duplicate or missed requests



3. Executive Reporting & Visibility

Create systems that provide leadership with clear visibility:

KPI dashboards connected to measurable outcomes

Initiative tracking tied to company priorities

Automated reporting views

Monitoring logs for automation and workflow activity



4. Governance & Documentation

Ensure systems are usable and sustainable:

Clear escalation and decision pathways 

Documentation for non-technical teams

Operational infrastructure designed for scale

------------------------------------

Requirements



3–5+ years experience with Zapier or Make

Strong expertise in Notion relational database architecture

Experience building automation workflows and integrations

Experience building dashboards or KPI reporting systems

Ability to design systems for long-term scalability

Strong documentation and process design skills

------------------------------------

Engagement Structure



This role begins with a 90-day build and observation period.

During this period you will deploy the operating system and present a complete system walkthrough.

Long-term engagement will depend on system clarity, performance, and structural integrity.

-------------------------------------

Application Requirements



To apply, submit:



Resume

A portfolio, case study, or walkthrough showing a system you designed (Notion workspace, dashboard, or architecture overview).

By reading the job responsibilities, how can you help build the system architecture for the company? Generic answers will not be entertained.

title: Client Success Manager (CSM)
description:
We are Apartment locators who  helps renters secure apartments faster by matching them with the best options, booking tours, and guiding them through the application process. We move quickly, follow up consistently, and operate with tight systems so no lead falls through the cracks.



Hourly pay  + Bonus's 

Part-time

5 days/week

You must be available to respond to leads quickly during your shift.

Compensation

Competitive hourly 

Performance-based bonuses available after training (tours booked, apps submitted, leases confirmed)



Your Mission

Turn leads into leases by responding fast, following up consistently, booking tours, and keeping our CRM pipeline clean. This role is for someone who can execute daily.



Core Responsibilities (Daily)

1) Lead Follow-Up + Tour Booking (Top Priority)

Respond to new leads quickly and professionally

Follow up with warm leads until tours are booked or the lead is closed out

Collect key details: move date, budget, city, must-haves, unit preferences, income/approval needs

Book tours and confirm details with clients and properties when needed



2) CRM Pipeline Management (Daily hygiene)

Update stages correctly (New Lead ? Qualified ? Options Sent ? Tour Pending ? Tour Booked ? Applied ? Leased/Won)

Correctly label Ghosted vs Closed Lost

Tag leads properly, remove duplicates, and ensure notes are complete



3) Marketplace Lead Gen (Light but consistent)

Create 3
 Marketplace posts/day

Reply to messages at the start and end of your shift



4) Social Posting (Consistency)

Post at least 1 piece of content/day on Texas Apartment Finds IG or TikTok

Light/simple content is fine (leasing tips, quick slides, captions, reposts, basic reels)



5) Daily Reporting (Non-negotiable)

Update our Google Sheet “Daily Ops Command Center” at the end of every shift:

follow-ups sent

stage moves

tours requested/booked

apps started/submitted

SLA met (Y/N)

end-of-shift notes + blockers



Performance Standards (KPIs)

You will be measured on:

Speed-to-lead: New leads responded to within 10 minutes during shift (tracked Y/N)

Follow-ups: 15–25 follow-ups/day

Progression: leads moved forward daily (stage moves)

Tours: 1–2 tours booked/day or 5/week

Apps: at least 1+ app started/submitted weekly (goal increases as volume grows)

Clean, accurate CRM stages (no mislabeling)



Tools We Use

GoHighLevel (CRM + texting)

Google Sheets (daily scoreboard)

 Marketplace

Instagram + TikTok

Dropbox/Drive (light file access)

ASANA

You do not need to be a GoHighLevel expert, but you must be willing to learn quickly and follow SOPs.



Requirements

Strong written English (clear, professional, friendly)

Comfortable sending follow-ups daily (you cannot be shy about outreach)

Organized and detail-oriented (CRM accuracy matters)

Able to handle repetitive tasks with consistency

Fast learner + coachable

Reliable internet and quiet work environment

Bonus (not required):

Apartment locating/leasing/real estate admin experience

Customer support or inside sales experience

Experience booking appointments/tours



Training + Onboarding

Paid training period

SOPs provided

You’ll start with follow-ups + tour booking first, then add posting/content tasks



How to Apply (Required)

To apply, include:

A short intro + your relevant experience

Your internet speed + device type

Your availability (hours + timezone)

The phrase “TAF CSM – speed matters” in your subject line/message

Answer this scenario (2–4 sentences):

A lead says: “I need something downtown Austin under $2,000, moving in 3 weeks.”

Write your response to qualify them and move toward booking tours.

We will only interview applicants who follow instructions.

title: Remote Customer Support and Lead Management-Dental Practice

Position Overview



Twin Oaks Family Dental is a modern dental practice specializing in dental implants, smile makeovers, and full-arch restorations. We are looking for a remote Patient Coordinator who excels at phone communication and can professionally manage incoming calls and online leads from patients interested in dental implant treatment.

Documentation

Qualifications

Required

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

title: SENIOR MEDICAL BILLER
description:
SENIOR MEDICAL BILLER

Full-Time | 40 hours/week | 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST (Strictly Required)

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Rate: $7.00 USD/hour 

Benefits: 13th Month Pay (Pro-rated) | Paid Training | Performance-based increases



-SHIFT STABILITY REQUIREMENT-

This is a graveyard shift (US Daytime). We are only seeking candidates who have experience working these hours. You must have a proven, established household routine that allows for quiet sleep during the day and high energy during your shift. Please do not apply if you are new to working US hours or new to working from home.



-A SPECIAL NOTE ON PATIENT INTERACTION-

We are looking for a teammate who loves helping people! This is an interactive role which includes patient-facing written and phone comms. Beyond the technical billing work, you will be the billing voice of our practice, helping postpartum mothers understand their insurance, deductibles, and balances via phone and text.



 - Voice Clarity: A neutral or near-accentless North American accent is essential so our sleep-deprived mothers can understand you with ease.



 - Heart for Service: We value warmth, patience, and clear, empathetic communication.



ABOUT US

Atlanta Lactation is a patient-centered, insurance-supported practice providing home visits and telehealth across Georgia. We are an all-female, fully remote healthcare team. We take pride in our stability; our core Filipino tea
mbers have been with us for over 5 years. We value longevity and treat our team like partners in care.



TIME OFF & HOLIDAYS

 - Paid U.S. Holidays: Christmas Day, New Year’s Day, and U.S. Thanksgiving are paid days off. We typically work other U.S. holidays.

 - Flexibility: Unpaid time off is available for Philippines holidays, family events, or medical appointments with advance notice.

 - Support: We are an understanding and flexible team; your health and well-being matter to us!



POSITION OVERVIEW

 - You will manage the full billing cycle: claims submission, denial analysis, and appeals. As a patient liaison, you will be the primary expert helping families navigate their coverage with confidence and clarity.



TECHNICAL EXPERTISE & KEYWORDS

 - Carriers: Aetna, Cigna, UnitedHealthcare (UHC), UMR, and BCBS.

 - Note: We do NOT handle Medicaid or Medicare.

 - Specialized Billing: DME Billing (Durable Medical Equipment), Outpatient Professional Claims.

 - Coding: ICD-10 and CPT code proficiency.



REQUIREMENTS

 - Experience: 3–5+ years of U.S. medical billing. Experience with payer-side (Zelis, Optum, etc.) and private practice is highly preferred.

 - Professional Standards: We value clear, structured communication. We encourage the use of modern tools (AI/spell-checkers) to help your written work stay polished and professional.

 - Technical Resourcefulness: You should be comfortable managing your own home office tech (internet, logins, etc.). Our in-house tech support is wonderful and helpful, so we look for someone who troubleshoots the basics but knows to reach out to us early if they need a hand!

 - Hardware: Reliable high-speed internet, noise-canceling headset, and a quiet home office.

 - Software: We use Office Ally and TriZetto. We provide specific paid training on our internal systems.

 - Eligibility: Female candidates only (due to sensitive communication with postpartum mothers).



HOW TO APPLY (We can’t wait to hear from you!)

 - We want you to succeed! To help us get to know your unique strengths, please message us here on OJP with your Resume link and a 1–2 minute voice recording (audio or video). Both are required. To help us hear your clarity right away, please BEGIN your recording by reading the script below FIRST:

...."Hi, this is [Name] from Atlanta Lactation. I’m calling to follow up on your insurance claim. I noticed a small discrepancy with the deductible, but I’ve already contacted the payer to ensure your benefits are applied correctly so you can focus on your recovery. Please let me know if you have any questions!"

....Your Story: After the script, we’d love to hear:

....Your U.S. medical billing background and the systems/EMRs you’ve mastered.

....Where you are currently working and why you are looking for a new long-term role with our team.

....Your experience with the payer side versus private practice.

....A quick mention of your home office setup and your experience staying tech-ready while working remotely.



We prioritize applications that follow these steps, as it helps us ensure a perfect fit for our professional, self-sufficient team!

title: Meta Ads Creative Strategist
description:
TO APPLY, please fill in application form here: 



We're looking for a systematic Meta Ads specialist who can build Meta ads that consistently hits ROAS targets and scales profitably.



This role is for a data-driven marketer who can own our entire Meta ads system—from scripting to scaling—and deliver measurable results.



You'll receive clear targets (ROAS, budget, CPA) and build a system that delivers these metrics consistently through systematic testing and optimisation.



We want to hire a strategist who can:



- run full-funnel Meta ads (prospecting + re-engagement + retargeting)

- consistently hit ROAS, CPA, spend, and scale targets



You will manage:

- scripting

- concepting ideas

- creative testing

- production workflows

- performance scaling





Who this role is NOT for:

- people who rely on “trends”

- people who only run ads for clothing, beauty pages, or aesthetic reels

- people who managed < 5kusd / mo

- people who can’t articulate why an ad works in data terms (CTR, CPM)

- people who never created video ads





You’ll thrive here if:

- you understand the logical flow of selling - how to build attention, interest, desire and action in a short-form video.

- You build systematic workflows e.g. 5 hooks x 3 lengths x 2 formats = 30 test variations

- You can write high-converting scripts using AIDA, PAS, and other direct-response frameworks

- You have created or scripted over 30 video ads.

- You analyse every metric (CTR, CPM, CPC, AOV) and know exactly why ads win or fail

- You are excited to learn, grow, and eventually lead a team as the company scales 80%+ year on year.





Must-Have Skills:

- Explain how CTR, CPM, CVR influence CAC

- Break down a funnel and identify bottlenecks e.g. what to fix when CPC rises

- Build a systematic creative testing framework e.g. 5 hooks x 3 angles x 2 lengths = 30 videos

- Script value-based, conversion-driven videos





Responsibilities:



- Strategic Ad Creative System – Build a machine delivering 5-10 weekly video ad creatives tailored to different customer pain points and awareness levels



- End-to-End Script Development – Write data-backed scripts using proven frameworks, and develop creative briefs for creators to execute



- Creator Management – Coordinate creators in the US and Australia with precise briefs, manage production timelines, quality control all content, and build repeatable templates for consistent output



- Performance Scaling Framework – Launch structured tests with statistical significance, scale winners systematically, kill losers fast, and document winning patterns



- Data Analysis & Optimisation – Monitor daily performance metrics, conduct weekly creative refreshes to combat fatigue, deliver monthly reports with actionable insights, and continuously refine the formula



- Budget & ROAS Management – Take full ownership of scaling profitably, maintaining target ROAS while increasing spend, and building predictable growth models





What We’re Looking For:

- 3+ years scaling Meta ads for DTC eCommerce brands

- Proven track record of managing 5k USD /month profitably

- Expert-level understanding of Meta Ads Manager and creative testing methodologies

- Strong copywriting skills with direct-response marketing principles

- Advanced analytical ability to interpret data and make systematic improvement

Why Join Crafti?

Crafti is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. We are headquartered in Singapore and operate remotely across 4 countries.



In the last 4 years, we’ve grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% YoY growth. As we scale towards 8 figures, we’re looking for driven individuals who want to learn, grow, and advance quickly alongside the company.

title: Google Ads | Meta Ads | SEO Specialist
description:
Google Ads | Meta Ads | SEO Specialist

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. — Winnipeg, MB (Remote-Friendly)



About QVM Digital Marketing

QVM Digital Marketing Inc. is a Winnipeg-based agency helping businesses and non-profits grow through SEO, paid advertising, and web development. We work with clients across Canada, delivering real results with a close-knit, highly collaborative team. We move fast, we care about quality, and we're looking for someone who takes ownership of their work.



The Role

We're looking for a driven and well-rounded digital marketing specialist who can confidently run paid ad campaigns on Google and Meta while also contributing to SEO strategy and execution. This is a single, blended role — not three separate jobs. You'll collaborate directly with our founder and work across multiple client accounts.



What You'll Do

Google Ads



Plan, launch, and optimize Search, Display, Performance Max, and Remarketing campaigns

Conduct keyword research and develop bidding strategies aligned to client goals

Write compelling ad copy and continuously A/B test for performance

Monitor budgets, pacing, and ROAS — and proactively flag issues

Produce clear, client-ready performance reports



Meta Ads



Build and manage campaigns across
 and Instagram (awareness, lead gen, conversions)

Develop audience segments, lookalikes, and retargeting funnels

Collaborate on creative briefs and ad assets — copy, imagery, video direction

Monitor campaign health and optimize based on data, not guesswork

Stay current on Meta algorithm changes and best practices



SEO



Support on-page SEO: meta tags, headings, internal linking, content optimization

Conduct keyword research for organic strategy and blog content planning

Assist with local SEO including Google Business Profile (GBP) management

Run basic technical SEO audits and communicate findings to the dev team

Contribute to monthly SEO reporting and strategic recommendations





What We're Looking For



2+ years of hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns (agency experience preferred)

1+ year of experience with Meta Ads Manager

Working knowledge of SEO fundamentals — enough to execute and contribute strategically

Google Ads certification is a strong asset

Comfortable working across multiple client accounts simultaneously

Strong analytical mindset — you understand what the numbers mean and what to do about them

Clear communicator who can explain performance to non-technical clients

Self-managed, detail-oriented, and accountable





Nice to Have



Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or similar CRM/marketing platforms

Familiarity with Google Analytics 4 (GA4) and Google Tag Manager

Basic understanding of WordPress or web platforms





What We Offer



Competitive compensation based on your experience

Remote-friendly work environment

Direct collaboration with leadership — your ideas matter here

Diverse client portfolio across industries including non-profit, construction, legal, and more

A team that values quality, communication, and growth

title: Content Executive (Part-Time, with path to Full-Time)
description:
Content Executive (Part-Time, with path to Full-Time)



Location: Philippines

Type: Initially part-time, with potential to move into a full-time role

Reporting to: Content Marketing Manager / Service Delivery Team

Company: Bristow & Hardy



About Bristow & Hardy



Bristow & Hardy is a specialist marketing agency for recruitment businesses. We help recruitment agencies attract more clients, strengthen their brand, and create better marketing systems across content,
, social, websites, assets, and campaigns.



We are looking for a reliable, detail-driven Content Executive based in the Philippines to support our growing client delivery team. This role will begin on a part-time basis, with the opportunity to become full-time as responsibilities expand.



The Role



This is a hands-on content production role. You will support the creation, editing, formatting, and quality-checking of marketing content for recruitment agency clients.



This is not a purely creative "blank page" role. We need someone who can take briefs, follow structure, adapt to different brand tones, produce clean first drafts, and reduce the amount of revision required internally.



You'll work across a mix of written and content-support tasks, helping the team produce high-quality deliverables efficiently and consistently.



Key Responsibilities



- Write and adapt content for different recruitment agency clients

- Produce first drafts for: LinkedIn posts, website copy, blogs, guides / lead magnets, brochures / PDFs,
 copy, landing page copy

- Repurpose long-form content into shorter pieces across channels

- Follow brand guidelines, messaging documents, and client tone of voice

- Carry out self-proofing and QA before submitting work

- Make amendments based on internal feedback

- Help format and polish documents so they are client-ready

- Support content research for client assets and campaigns

- Work from briefs, templates, examples, and internal processes

- Keep work organised and communicate clearly on progress, blockers, and deadlines



What Success Looks Like in This Role



- Content is submitted on time and in the right format

- First drafts require minimal rewriting

- Tone of voice is followed accurately across multiple clients

- Internal revision time comes down

- The wider team can trust the work to be accurate, clean, and usable

- You become a dependable part of the delivery engine and can take on more ownership over time



Who This Role Would Suit



This role would suit someone who is strong at structured writing and production, enjoys working from briefs, and takes pride in detail. It is ideal for someone who wants to grow into a larger content role over time, rather than someone who only wants high-level creative direction work.



Essential Skills and Experience



- Strong written English

- Experience writing marketing or business content

- Strong attention to detail

- Ability to follow a brief closely

- Ability to write in different tones of voice

- Comfortable receiving feedback and making revisions

- Strong organisation and time management

- Able to work independently and communicate clearly remotely



Preferred Experience



- Experience working with agencies or multiple brands

- Experience writing B2B content

- Experience in recruitment, staffing, or professional services marketing

- Familiarity with Canva, Google Docs, Google Sheets, ChatGPT, or similar tools

- Experience formatting lead magnets, guides, or sales enablement assets



Important Traits for This Role



- Reliable

- Proactive

- Detail-focused

- Fast learner

- Low ego, high standards

- Process-friendly

- Commercially aware



Working Arrangement



- Starts part-time

- Opportunity to grow into full-time based on performance, quality, and business need

- Remote role

- Some overlap with UK working hours preferred for communication and handovers



What We Want From the Right Person



We are not looking for someone who simply writes words. We are looking for someone who can make the content team more efficient by producing quality work, following process, and helping us maintain standards across multiple clients.



The right person will be someone we can trust with more responsibility over time.

title: Social Media Growth Manager
description:
TO APPLY, please fill up the application form: 



We're looking for a social media creative strategist with systematic thinking who can turn scroll-stopping content into profitable
 & Instagram (Meta) ads. 



This role is for someone who understands what makes people stop, watch, and buy on social platforms—and can build a repeatable system to produce that content at scale.



You'll create content that doesn't look like ads but drives measurable results: ROAS, conversions, and profitable growth. You will work with our video editor and designer to create these content.



We Want Someone Who Can:

- Create thumb-stopping social content that sells (not traditional ads)

- Build systematic content production workflows

- Think in pipelines: ideation ? scripting ? production ? testing ? scaling

- Learn Meta ads strategy and apply creative thinking to performance marketing

- Analyse what works and turn wins into repeatable systems



You Will Manage:



- Content ideation and scripting

- Creator briefing and coordination

- Production workflows and quality control

- Creative testing frameworks

- Performance analysis (with our guidance on media buying)



Who This Role is NOT For:



- people who are not interested in numbers, testing and optimization

- people who only want to make aesthetic content without thinking of conversion

- people who never scripted or produced video content at scale



Who this role is for:



You'll thrive here if:



- You have taste. You know what content stops the scroll and makes people feel something.

- You understand persuasion. You can explain why a piece of content makes someone want to buy— even if you don't know the technical marketing terms yet.

- You think in systems. You naturally build workflows: 5 hooks × 3 angles × 2 formats = 30 test variations.

- You can script compelling stories. You've written 30+ video scripts that drove engagement.

- You let data sharpen your creative instincts. You are excited to learn how performance data can reveal which hooks work, which angles convert, and how to systematically improve your creative strategy.

- You're hungry to learn. You're excited to apply your content skills to performance marketing and eventually lead a team as we scale 60–80% year on year.



Responsibilities:



- Content Production System: Build a pipeline that delivers 5-10 weekly video creatives that feel native to social platforms but drive conversions.



- End-to-End Script Development: Write scroll-stopping scripts based on customer pain points, brand voice, and platform best practices. Develop creative briefs for execution.



- Creator Management: Coordinate creators in the US and Australia with precise briefs, manage timelines, ensure quality control, and build templates for consistent output.



- Systematic Testing Framework: Launch structured creative tests to test how the content convert - scale winners, kill losers fast.



- Performance Analysis: Monitor daily creative performance (we'll teach you the metrics), conduct weekly refreshes to combat fatigue, deliver monthly reports, and refine the system.



- Learn & Scale: Work closely with the CEO to learn Meta ads strategy, apply your creative thinking to media buying, and take increasing ownership of budget and ROAS targets over time.





What We're Looking For:



- 3+ years creating social content that drove measurable results (sales, leads, or high engagement)

- Portfolio of 30+ short-form videos you've scripted or produced

- Proven ability to build workflows and manage production pipelines

- Strong writing skills for scripts, hooks, and direct-response copy

- Willingness to learn performance marketing and data analysis

- Experience managing creators or production workflows (preferred but not required)





Details:

- Location: Remote (Philippines-based)

- Remuneration: 80,
,000 PHP/month (based on experience)

- Commitment: Full-time, Monday to Friday, 9.30am - 6.30pm (GMT+8)





Why Join Crafti?



- Work on Products That Sell Themselves: Our wellness and lifestyle products are genuinely exciting to market. You'll create content for products that improve people's lives, with authentic customer stories that make compelling material.





- Direct Impact & CEO Access: You'll report directly to the CEO with full ownership of our content-to-conversion system. Your creatives directly drive revenue—when you win, the company wins.





- Rapid Career Growth: We're scaling from 7 to 8 figures, and you'll grow with us. Strong performers can progress from Content Lead to Head of Growth within 12-18 months.





About Crafti



Crafti is a fast-growing Direct-to-Consumer health and wellness brand with sales in the USA and Singapore. We are headquartered in Singapore and operate remotely across 4 countries.



In the last 4 years, we've grown to 7 figures in annual revenue with 60–80% YoY growth. As we scale towards 8 figures, we're looking for driven individuals who want to learn, grow, and advance quickly alongside the company.

title: Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound)
description:
Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound)



Starlight Marketing is looking for a reliable and confident Appointment Setting Assistant (Outbound) to support our outreach efforts by scheduling qualified calls for the team.



In this role, your main responsibility is to connect with potential prospects, introduce our services using a provided script, and book appointments for interested individuals. You will not be closing sales — your focus is on starting conversations and securing scheduled meetings.



What your day will look like:

? Making outbound calls to assigned leads

? Following a structured script to introduce our services

? Answering basic questions and handling simple objections

? Booking qualified prospects into the calendar

? Logging call outcomes accurately in the tracking system

? Meeting daily or weekly booking targets



Availability Requirement:

? Must not have any current full-time employment

? Must be fully available during assigned working hours

? No overlapping remote jobs while working with the company



Technical Requirements:

? Must have your own laptop or desktop computer

? Minimum 8GB RAM

? Stable internet connection with at least 30 Mbps speed



Experience in appointment setting, telemarketing, or outbound calling is a plus but not required. Training and scripts will be provided for the right candidate who is coachable and motivated.



This is a remote, long-term opportunity with stable hours and performance-based growth potential as Starlight Marketing continues to grow.



If you’re confident on the phone, fully available, and motivated by booking appointments and hitting targets, we’d love to hear from you.

mber.

title: WFH: Remote Digital Support Assistant
description:
At Starlight Marketing, a lot of important work happens quietly in the background. This role exists to support those daily operations by keeping information organized, tasks updated, and systems running smoothly—without phone calls or voice work.



As a Digital Support Assistant, your day is structured but not overwhelming. You’ll work through written tasks at a steady pace, follow clear instructions, and make sure nothing important is overlooked. The role is designed for focus and consistency rather than multitasking or decision-making.



Your responsibilities will include:

-Reviewing assigned tasks or inboxes at the start of each shift

-Updating internal tools, trackers, or records based on instructions

-Sorting or tagging information so it’s easy for the team to access

-Flagging anything unclear, incomplete, or missing for review



Most of the work is system-based and repetitive in a good way. Templates, checklists, and step-by-step processes are always provided, so you’ll never be guessing what to do next. Communication is done internally through chat or task tools only.



This role is ideal for someone who prefers non-voice work, enjoys structured routines, and is comfortable working independently. Attention to detail and reliability matter more than speed or experience.



This is a fully remote, long-term position with stable responsibilities and opportunities to grow into coordination or administrative roles as Starlight Marketing continues to expand.

WHAT I WILL GIVE YOU

title: ***AMAZING Video Editor For E-Commerce Business Needed ASAP***
description:
We are a dynamic and fast-growing e-commerce company seeking an experienced Video Editor to join our team on Upwork. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in creating, editing, and optimizing video content for e-commerce brands. If you're passionate about crafting visually compelling stories that drive engagement and thrive in a collaborative, fast-paced environment, we want to hear from you!



Responsibilities:

Edit and produce high-quality videos tailored for various digital platforms, including social media ads, pro duct launches, and customer testimonials.

Work closely with the marketing and design teams to ensure video content aligns with overall business goals and brand guidelines.

Develop creative video strategies to enhance engagement, drive sales, and improve customer retention.

Implement feedback and revisions quickly while maintaining high-quality standards and meeting tight deadlines.

Use video editing software such as Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar tools to produce and refine content.

Incorporate sound design, color grading, motion graphics, and effects to enhance video quality and storytelling.

Stay up-to-date with the latest video trends and techniques, ensuring content remains fresh and cutting-edge.

Requirements:

Proven experience as a Video Editor with a portfolio showcasing your work in e-commerce or related industries.

Fluent in English, with excellent communication skills to interpret briefs and collaborate with cross-functional teams.

Proficiency in video editing tools such as Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, After Effects, or similar platforms.

Strong understanding of visual storytelling, pacing, and design principles.

Ability to work in a fast-paced environment, manage multiple projects, and meet deadlines.

Analytical mindset with a data-driven approach to optimizing video performance.

Preferred Qualifications:

Experience in the e-commerce industry, especially with Direct-to-Consumer (DTC) brands.

Familiarity with AI tools and platforms for video editing or optimization.

Knowledge of social media platforms and how to create content for specific channels 
, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube).

Understanding of basic color correction, motion graphics, and sound editing techniques.

Experience with A/B testing and optimizing video content for improved engagement and conversion rates.



We are looking towards your application and we appreciate you taking the time to complete your application for this position. 



All the best, and good luck.



Thank you.

title: Wedding Photo Editor Culler Retoucher
description:
Hello there,



Hope you are having an amazing day.



My wife and I are a husband and wife wedding photography team based in Canada. We photograph refined, emotionally weddings for couples who care deeply about storytelling, culture, and elevated aesthetics. We are currently growing and looking for a skilled wedding photo editor to join us long term.



We are not looking for someone who simply applies presets. We are looking for someone who understands light, skin tones, polish, and consistency. Our work leans clean, crisp, true to life, and high end. Attention to detail is everything for us.



You must have previous experience editing weddings and portraits. Strong proficiency in Lightroom and Photoshop is required. We need someone who can cull efficiently and intelligently from 6000 to 10000 images down to a powerful storytelling gallery of 600 to 1000 images. Retouching skills such as blemish removal, subtle dodge and burn, fabric cleanup, bra strap removal, smoothing wrinkles, and refining distractions are extremely important.



We are detail oriented and value consistency, communication, and growth. We want someone who is coachable, learns quickly, and does not repeat the same mistakes. We are easy going but hold a high standard for the final product.



This role can be structured monthly or project based depending on season. Our busy season runs May through December and volume will vary each year. We are ideally looking for someone who wants to grow with us year after year and become part of our long term team. We are open to doing a per photo on-going contract or monthly.



We are hoping to start with a $300 Canadian Dollar monthly pay for 8-9 months of the year. Per project basis for the off season months whenever jobs come in.



If you love weddings, storytelling, and refining images until they feel timeless and intentional, we would love to hear from you.



Thank you so much for applying.

title: LinkedIn Social Media Manager (US Executive Clients)
description:
We are looking for a talented LinkedIn Social Media Manager to support our growing client portfolio of entrepreneurs, founders, and business leaders in the United States.



You will be responsible for managing and growing LinkedIn pages and personal brands for executives by creating high-quality, professional content that resonates with a U.S. business audience.



This role requires someone who understands LinkedIn thought leadership, storytelling, and professional branding not just basic social media posting.



You must have at least 2 years of experience managing LinkedIn accounts for U.S.-based clients.



This is a remote contractor role with long-term opportunity for growth as we expand.



Responsibilities



• Manage LinkedIn accounts for executives, founders, and entrepreneurs

• Write engaging LinkedIn posts focused on leadership, entrepreneurship, and industry insights

• Schedule and publish posts consistently

• Repurpose ideas, articles, podcasts, and insights into LinkedIn content

• Design simple visuals or carousels using Canva when needed

• Monitor engagement and respond to comments when required

• Ensure content reflects the professional voice and brand of each client

• Stay up to date on LinkedIn trends and best practices



Requirements



Required Experience



• Minimum 2 years experience managing LinkedIn accounts for U.S. clients

• Experience writing content for entrepreneurs, founders, or professionals

• Strong English writing and grammar skills

• Ability to write clear, professional, thought-leadership style content

• Experience using LinkedIn scheduling tools and Canva



Preferred Experience



• Experience working with personal brands or executives

• Experience creating LinkedIn carousel posts

• Familiarity with content repurposing strategies



What We’re Looking For



The ideal candidate:



• Understands the tone of LinkedIn for U.S. professionals

• Can write content that sounds natural, thoughtful, and insightful

• Is detail oriented and highly organized

• Can manage multiple client accounts at once

• Takes initiative and brings creative ideas

title: *RARE & EXCITING OPPORTUNITY* Operations Lead — Elite UK Career Advisory (Remote)
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory based in Mayfair, London. We help ambitious candidates land offers at Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, White & Case, Freshfields, Kirkland & Ellis, and other elite law firms and investment banks across London, New York, and Hong Kong.



We have:

- 153+ documented client outcomes at the world's most competitive firms

- Six trademarked career frameworks used by thousands of candidates globally

- A 2,800+ member community on Skool

- A fast-growing YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram presence

- A founder who has delivered sessions for MBA student clubs at Harvard Business School, MIT Sloan, and Yale School of Management



We are hiring an Operations Lead to run the day-to-day operations of the business so our founder can focus entirely on content creation and premium client delivery.



This is not a task-following VA role. You will be the operational backbone of the business — managing content shipping, lead response, client onboarding, and team coordination. Everything operational flows through you.



This role has a clear path to COO as the business scales.



RATES AND PROGRESSION:



- Starting salary: $800 - $1,200 USD/month depending on experience

- 90-day review: Salary increase for strong performers

- 12-month target: COO title and compensation package as team grows to 6-8 people

- This is a full-time long-term role — we are not looking for someone between jobs



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Content Shipping (Priority #1)

- Receive edited videos from our video editor

- Quality check all content before posting

- Schedule and post content via GoHighLevel to TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and LinkedIn

- Ensure weekly targets are hit: 1 YouTube + 5 TikToks + 5 Reels + 3 LinkedIn posts

- Chase the video editor if deliverables are late

- Nothing ships late. You own this.



Lead Response

- Respond to all inbound leads within 2 hours (DMs,
s, enquiries)

- Qualify leads and schedule calls with the founder

- Follow up with non-responders

- Update CRM pipeline in GoHighLevel at all times



Client Onboarding

- Send contracts and process payments via Pensight

- Set up client folders and welcome materials

- Schedule first sessions

- Collect testimonials after client wins



Calendar and Inbox Management

- Manage the founder's calendar

- Protect deep work and filming blocks

- Triage
 and draft responses

- Flag urgent items immediately



Community Management

- Moderate Skool community (2,800+ members)

- Welcome new members

- Answer basic questions

- Flag complex questions for founder



Team Coordination

- Coordinate with video editor and 2 interns

- Assign tasks, set deadlines, review work

- You are the hub — everyone reports through you operationally



DAILY RHYTHM:



- First thing: Check all inboxes. Respond to urgent items. Flag for founder.

- Morning: Respond to leads. Schedule calls. Update CRM.

- Midday: Content shipping. Coordinate with editor. Post via GoHighLevel.

- Afternoon: Community management. Client admin. Team coordination.

- End of day: Send daily update to founder. No exceptions.



WEEKLY TARGETS:



- Lead response time: Under 2 hours

- YouTube posted: 1 per week

- TikToks posted: 5 per week

- Instagram Reels posted: 5 per week

- LinkedIn posts: 3 per week

- Daily founder updates sent: 5 per week

- Zero inbox: Daily



REQUIRED SKILLS:



- 3+ years experience as VA, EA, Operations Manager, or Project Manager

- Experience with GoHighLevel OR a comparable CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

- Experience scheduling and posting content to social media platforms

- Excellent written English — you will communicate directly with UK-based premium clients

- Proactive communicator — you flag problems before they escalate, not after

- Detail-oriented — nothing falls through the cracks, ever

- Comfortable managing a small team (editor + interns)

- Available for at least 4 hours overlap with UK timezone (GMT/BST)



NICE TO HAVE:



- Experience in coaching, education, or professional services

- Experience with Skool community platform

- Experience with Pensight or similar booking and payment tools

- Basic video editing skills as backup

- Experience working in founder-led businesses



TECH STACK:



- GoHighLevel (CRM and content scheduling)

- Pensight (payments and booking)

- Skool (community)

- Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar, Gmail)

- TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn



WHO YOU ARE:



- You take ownership. You do not wait to be told what to do.

- You communicate proactively. If something is stuck, you say so immediately.

- You are reliable. When you say something will be done, it gets done.

- You are detail-oriented. You catch mistakes before they go out.

- You can manage others. You are comfortable assigning tasks and holding people accountable.

- You want to grow. This role becomes COO as the business scales.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE:



In 30 Days:

- Content shipping at full rhythm without founder involvement

- All leads responded to within 2 hours

- Daily updates flowing every working day

- Founder has zero admin tasks



In 90 Days:

- Business running smoothly without founder in operations

- 10+ new testimonials captured

- Salary reviewed upward for strong performers



In 12 Months:

- £500K+ revenue year

- Team grown to 6-8 people reporting to you

- COO title and package



HOW TO APPLY:



Apply here



Your application must include:



1. A brief introduction — 2 to 3 sentences about who you are and why this role suits you specifically.

2. Your experience with CRM tools — name the specific platforms you have used.

3. Your experience with social media scheduling and posting — name the platforms and tools.

4. Your experience managing a team — even a small one counts.

5. Your available hours and timezone.

6. Your expected monthly salary in USD.

7. Answer this in 100 words or less: Look at 
 TikTok or YouTube channel. What is one operational or content improvement you would make in the first 30 days and why?



Bonus: Record a 60-second video introducing yourself and why you want this role. This is not required but candidates who do it go to the top of the review pile immediately.

title: SETTING CALLER - EARN $1,000-$1,500 PER WEEK (MALE VOICE ONLY)
description:
PLEASE READ THE "HOW TO APPLY" PART BEFORE SENDING A MESSAGE



THE OPPORTUNITY:

We're hiring full-time callers to contact existing clients about pre-funded trading accounts. You handle initial outreach via text and phone, then book them with our closer who finalizes the sale.

This is NOT cold calling. These are warm leads who already use our service and trust us.

Your job: Qualify interest, book the appointment. Our closers handle the pressure.



FINANCIAL COMPENSATION

Base salary $
per week + commission



YOUR DAILY WORKFLOW:

TEXTING (30% of your time):

Morning: Send outreach messages to existing clients about the pre-funded account offer Throughout day: Follow up with those who don't immediately reply After calls: Send booking confirmation texts and appointment reminders

You're using
 to contact warm leads (our existing bot users). These people know us and trust us. Response rates are high.

PHONING (70% of your time):

One call per interested prospect. Your goal: explain the offer briefly, qualify their interest, and book them for a call with our closer.

Average call length: 15 minutes. You are NOT closing the sale. You're setting the appointment. The closer handles all objections, pricing negotiations, and final sale.

Conversion rate: 40%+ of people you call end up buying.

This is extremely high because:

-They're already customers (warm audience)

-The offer is valuable

-It's an upsell (they already trust the main product)

-You follow a proven script



WHY THIS ROLE IS LOW PRESSURE:

- No cold calling (everyone knows us already)

- No closing (someone else handles that part)

- No rejection handling (closer deals with objections)

- Script provided (proven framework you follow)

- Warm leads (high response and conversion rates)

You're the bridge. You educate, qualify, and book. The closer does the heavy lifting.



WORK SCHEDULE:

Full-time: 40 hours per week Flexible within 9:00 AM to 11:00 PM CET (Central European Time) You choose your 8-hour window, but must have minimum 6 hours overlap with CET business hours

Example schedules that work:

3:00 PM - 11:00 PM Manila Time (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM CET)

4:00 PM - 12:00 AM Manila Time (10:00 AM - 6:00 PM CET)



NON-NEGOTIABLES (MUST HAVE ALL):

1. FLUENT O
 ENGLISH (Speaking + Writing) You'll be calling and texting international clients. Must be clearly understood on the phone. Fluency is required. We will test this with a voice/video sample.

2. FULL-TIME COMMITMENT This is a 40-hour/week role. No side jobs, no part-time. We need consistency and focus.

3. STABLE INTERNET CONNECTION No frequent disconnections. You'll be on calls and need reliability. Backup internet solution required (mobile data as backup).

4. QUIET, PROFESSIONAL WORKSPACE You need a dedicated space where you can make calls without background noise. No crying babies, traffic sounds, or interruptions during calls. Professional environment essential.

5. QUALITY PHONE + HEADSET Clear audio is critical. You need a reliable smartphone or computer with a microphone/headset that produces crystal-clear sound. We will test audio quality before hiring.

6. PROVEN PHONE EXPERIENCE We need someone who has done phone-based sales, customer service, or appointment setting before.



WHAT MAKES YOU STAND OUT:

Previous experience in high-ticket sales or financial services

Experience with WhatsApp Business,
, or CRM systems

Track record of 50%+ appointment show rates as a setter

Comfortable discussing trading, investing, or prop firms (we'll train you, but prior knowledge helps)

Self-starter who can work independently with minimal supervision

Organized and detail-oriented (tracking follow-ups, updating CRM)



HOW TO APPLY:

Send the following to us on 
 or on whatsapp at 
. VOICE SAMPLE (REQUIRED) Record a 90-second video or audio telling us:

Your name and location

Your phone sales experience (specific results/numbers)

Why you want this role

Why you think you'll be good at it

This tests your English fluency and communication skills. Applications without voice samples will be automatically rejected.



2. INFRASTRUCTURE CONFIRMATION Confirm you have:

- Stable internet (speed test screenshot)

- Quiet workspace (describe your setup)

- Quality phone/headset (brand/model)

- Backup internet solution



3. AVAILABILITY Confirm you can: ? Start within 7 days if selected ? Work full-time (40 hours/week) ? Overlap with CET business hours (9 AM - 11 PM CET window)



RED FLAGS (DON'T APPLY IF):

- You're not truly fluent in English (we will test this)

- You don't have a quiet workspace (background noise = instant disqualification)

- You have unreliable internet (we track call quality metrics)

- You're looking for part-time or side work (this is full-time only)

- You've never done phone sales before (we need proven experience)

- You can't commit to the CET time overlap requirement



WHY WORK WITH US:

- Warm leads only (no cold calling grind)

- High conversion rates (40% vs industry average of 5-10%)

- No closing pressure (you set, closer handles sale)

- Monthly bonuses with real chances to win (only 4 people competing)

- Possible base salary after 3 months (financial stability kicks in)

- Remote flexibility (work from anywhere in your timezone)

- Real support (weekly training, daily check-ins, not left alone)



FINAL NOTE:

This role rewards consistency and quality. Our top caller last month made $6,800. Our lowest made $3,200. We’re scaling fast and you can grow fast with us as well/

If you're methodical, coachable, and genuinely good on the phone, you'll thrive here. Contact us on
 
 or whatsapp at

title: Post-Production Editor
description:
Juming Delmas Studios (JDS)

Position Overview

The Post-Production Editor is responsible for transforming raw footage into compelling, high-quality content that reflects the storytelling and production standards of Juming Delmas Studios. This role focuses on editing podcast episodes, promotional videos, and digital content in a way that enhances the narrative, maintains audience engagement, and aligns with the brand vision of each client.

At JDS, we treat podcasts like television productions. Editors are expected to move beyond simple cuts and transitions and actively shape the story through thoughtful pacing, visuals, graphics, and sound design.



Key Responsibilities

Video Editing & Story Development

Edit full podcast episodes, interviews, and video content.

Cut short-form clips for social media platforms (Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, etc.).

Structure edits to enhance storytelling, pacing, and viewer engagement.

Select and integrate appropriate B-roll, graphics, and visual elements.

Audio & Visual Quality

Clean and balance audio to ensure clarity and professional sound quality.

Color correct and grade footage to maintain visual consistency.

Ensure all videos meet JDS production quality standards.

Motion Graphics & Visual Enhancements

Incorporate motion graphics, titles, and captions when appropriate.



Use overlays, callouts, and visual elements to reinforce key 
nts in the content.

Create dynamic intros and outros based on JDS templates.

Collaboration

Work closely with the Production Team and Creative Director to meet project goals.

Participate in review meetings and incorporate feedback into revisions.

Maintain clear communication about project timelines and deliverables.

Organization & Workflow

Maintain organized project files and folders.



Follow JDS editing templates and naming conventions.

Ensure projects are completed by the assigned deadlines.

Deliverables

The Post-Production Editor may be responsible for producing:

Full podcast episodes

Short-form social media clips

Promotional video content

Client marketing videos

Highlight reels

Branded intros and outros

Required Skills



Proficiency in video editing software (Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve).

Strong understanding of pacing, storytelling, and audience engagement.

Basic motion graphics and text animation knowledge.

Experience with audio cleanup and sound balancing.

Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.

Preferred Qualifications



Experience editing podcasts or interview-based content.

Familiarity with YouTube and social media content formats.

Understanding of digital marketing and audience engagement strategies.

Work Expectations

All editing work must meet the quality standards of Juming Delmas Studios.

Editors are expected to follow feedback and continuously improve production quality.

Work must be completed within established project timelines.

Clear communication with the production team is required.

About Juming Delmas Studios



Juming Delmas Studios is an award-winning production company that has won over 15 film awards and has been selected in 40+ festivals worldwide. JDS specializes in podcast production, video editing, and digital marketing services, helping creators and businesses produce high-quality content that connects with audiences.

Our mission is to run podcasts like television shows, delivering professional production and storytelling that elevates our clients’ brands.



If you'd like, I can also help you create a second document that will actually protect JDS from bad editors called:

“Post-Production Editor Performance Standards & Disciplinary Policy.”

It will outline things like:

audio cleanup requirements

B-roll expectations

revision limits

deadlines

quality standards
