title: Operations Assistant (Lead Gen + Social Media + Admin)
description:
Hours: Full-Time (8 hours/day)



About Metaone Group:

We are a Toronto-based AI-First Lead Generation Engine. We replace slow, manual digital marketing with high-speed, automated AI systems to provide local businesses with a constant stream of leads. We operate a global production cycle and are looking for a highly versatile tea
mber to join our Philippines hub.



The Role:

We are looking for a hybrid AI Growth & Operations Assistant. This is not a standard virtual assistant role. We need a tech-savvy problem solver who can hunt for leads, mass-produce social media content using AI, and keep our day-to-day digital office highly organized. If you love using technology to work smarter and faster across multiple devices, this is the role for you.



Key Responsibilities:



Lead Searching & Hunting: Find and extract high-intent local business leads from platforms like
, Instagram, and Xiaohongshu.



AI Content Generation: Act as an AI prompt engineer to generate high volumes of localized social media content. You will use tools like ChatGPT Plus, Midjourney, and Canva to create daily posts, graphics, and copy for our campaigns.



Cross-Device Execution: Seamlessly switch between desktop platforms (for heavy data/admin work) and mobile phone apps (to execute manual social media engagement or bypass desktop restrictions on apps like IG/Xiaohongshu).



Day-to-Day Administration: Serve as the organizational backbone of your projects. You will manage our Google Workspace (Drive, Calendar, Sheets), organize raw lead files, and ensure the daily handoffs between tea
mbers run smoothly.



Requirements:



Computer & Mobile App Proficiency: You must be highly tech-savvy and extremely comfortable navigating, troubleshooting, and operating both desktop software (web browsers, Google Workspace, web apps) and mobile phone applications (social media apps, mobile workflows).



AI-First Mindset: You must be highly proficient with modern AI tools. If a task can be done by AI, we expect you to automate it.



Organization Skills: Exceptional attention to detail. You know how to build clean folder structures and keep digital workspaces flawless.



Reliability: A strong internet connection and the ability to join our daily 8:00 AM PHT voice syncs via our virtual office space.

mber to join our Philippines hub.

title: Remote Golf Video Editor

About

We are a growing media brand dedicated to golf. Our mission is to entertain and engage golf fans by curating timeless, high-quality short-form content that celebrates the sport. We focus on evergreen golf clips that can be enjoyed by fans at any time, not just recent highlights or news.

If you are passionate about golf and skilled at editing engaging short-form videos, we’d love to hear from you!

title: Marketing Strategist/Growth Hacker
description:
We’re a growing entertainment management and marketing company based in the US ( NYC ), focused on scaling emerging talents in music, podcasts, and comedy. We have strong connections to MTV, Revolt, labels, Apple Music, and Spotify playlists, and we’re starting with one flagship artist (Jon) to prove our model before expanding.

We’re looking for a talented Marketing Strategist/Growth Hacker to help build audience and engagement for our creators. This is a remote, flexible role (10-20 hours/week to start, potential to grow). You’ll work closely with our founder to create data-driven strategies that turn raw talent into pitch-ready brands for deals and partnerships.

Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and execute growth plans for social platforms (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Spotify) to increase followers and engagement (e.g., aim for 20% monthly growth).

• Run targeted ads (Meta, TikTok, Google) on a budget, optimizing for ROI.

• Analyze metrics using tools like Google Analytics, Chartmetric, or Instagram Insights; provide weekly reports and recommendations.

• Optimize content for virality (e.g., trends, SEO, A/B testing) in US entertainment niches (music tracks, podcast clips, comedy sketches).

• Collaborate on playlist pitching and cross-promotions using our industry connections.

Requirements:

• 3+ years in digital marketing or growth hacking, with proven results (e.g., case studies showing audience growth for creators or brands).

• Experience with US pop culture and trends in music, podcasts, or comedy (must provide examples).

• Proficient in tools: Meta Ads Manager, Google Analytics, Hootsuite/Buffer, Chartmetric (bonus).

• Strong English communication skills (written and spoken) for US-facing work.

• Self-starter who can work independently in a startup environment (time zone overlap with US EST preferred).

• Bonus: Certifications like Google Analytics or HubSpot; experience with entertainment creators.

What We Offer:

• Competitive pay: $8-15/hour (based on experience; paid via PayPal/Wise).

• Opportunity to grow with us as we expand to more talents.

• Flexible hours and remote work.

• Access to exciting industry connections for your portfolio.

To apply, reply with:

• Your resume/portfolio.

• 2-3 examples of past growth campaigns (e.g., “Grew a podcast’s IG from 5K to 15K in 3 months via Reels and ads”).

• A quick 1-paragraph idea for growing a musician’s TikTok audience using trends.

Only serious applicants—include “Wave Entertainment” in your subject line. We’re excited to build something big—let’s chat!

mber to generate AI-enhanced visual assets for property listing videos.

Important



This role requires consistency.

?

title: Female Cold Caller to Match Existing Audio Materials - Real Estate
description:
About the Job

We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on 
 or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi, I’m calling about the property on Thomas Street. Is this the owner?” 



My name is (Your name). I help someone who buys houses in the area. 



Would you ever consider selling that property? 



Okay, thanks for letting me know. 



Can I ask a quick question — is the property currently occupied or vacant? 



What is prompting you to consider selling it? 



Would the property need any repairs or updates?  



That’s helpful. The buyer usually likes to speak directly with owners who may consider selling. 



What would be the best time for him to give you a call? 



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: E-Commerce Reporting & Finance Specialist (Part-Time)
description:
What we're looking for

We're looking for a hands-on e-commerce data and finance specialist to help keep a fast-growing 7-figure Shopify business sharp. This is not a strategic or advisory role — we need someone who works with data daily, builds solid dashboards, and genuinely understands the numbers.

What you bring:



- Deep, hands-on expertise with Shopify reports, dashboards, and the Shopify interface — this is non-negotiable

- 3+ years of intensive experience analyzing data within Shopify businesses

- Proven experience with VAT compliance and reporting for European markets

- Strong experience managing multi-currency transactions and converting them into a base currency for accurate financial reporting

- ~15 hours per week availability



What you'll do:



- Build and maintain daily, weekly, and monthly financial reports and dashboards

- Identify and communicate trends in revenue, margins, and key performance metrics

- Support growth decisions with clear, actionable data insights

- Handle multi-currency reconciliation and European VAT reporting



You're a great fit if you:



- Think in numbers but communicate in plain language

- Work independently and move fast

- Know your way around EU VAT rules and cross-currency financials

- Are comfortable fully owning the financial reporting of a scaling e-commerce brand

title: Procurement Manager
description:
Position Summary



The Procurement Manager is responsible for managing the organization’s purchasing strategy, supplier relationships, and procurement processes to ensure cost efficiency, quality, and timely delivery of goods and services. This role oversees sourcing, vendor negotiations, contract management, and procurement compliance to support operational and strategic objectives.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Procurement



Develop and implement procurement strategies aligned with company objectives.



Identify cost-saving opportunities and improve procurement efficiency.



Conduct market analysis to identify reliable suppliers and pricing trends.



Vendor & Supplier Management



Source, evaluate, and onboard vendors and suppliers.



Negotiate pricing, contracts, and service agreements.



Maintain strong relationships with key suppliers to ensure reliability and quality.



Purchasing Operations



Oversee purchasing activities including requisitions, purchase orders, and deliveries.



Ensure timely procurement of materials, equipment, and services.



Monitor supplier performance and delivery schedules.



Cost Control & Budget Management



Monitor procurement budgets and spending.



Implement cost control measures and negotiate favorable pricing.



Track savings and procurement performance metrics.



Contract & Compliance Management



Review and manage supplier contracts and agreements.



Ensure procurement processes comply with company policies and regulatory requirements.



Maintain procurement documentation and audit records.



Inventory & Supply Chain Coordination



Collaborate with inventory, warehouse, and operations teams to ensure proper supply levels.



Monitor stock levels and forecast procurement needs.



Prevent shortages or excess inventory.



Team Leadership



Supervise procurement staff and purchasing specialists.



Provide training and guidance on procurement policies and systems.



Establish procurement KPIs and performance targets.



Qualifications

Education



Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Logistics, or related field



Experience



5–10 years experience in procurement, purchasing, or supply chain management



2–5 years in a supervisory or managerial role



Required Skills



Strategic sourcing and vendor negotiation



Contract management



Cost analysis and budgeting



Supply chain and inventory management



Procurement systems (ERP, SAP, Oracle, etc.)



Strong analytical and problem-solving skills



Leadership and team management



Excellent communication and negotiation skills



Preferred Certifications



Certified Professional in Supply Management (CPSM)



Certified Supply Chain Professional (CSCP)



Certified Purchasing Manager (CPM)



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



Cost savings achieved through procurement initiatives



Supplier performance and delivery reliability



Purchase order processing time



Procurement budget adherence



Inventory availability and stock optimization

title: UGC Video Editor for Meta & TikTok Ads (Short Form Content)
description:
Hello,



I am looking for a video editor experienced in editing short-form UGC style videos for Meta and TikTok ads.

Looking for a long-term collaboration if the quality is good.

title: Music Management and Entertainment Growth Assistant
description:
Job Posting: 

Location: Remote (Philippines)







Focus: Exclusive Support for a Professional Recording Artist



About the Artist: You will be working directly for [Artist Name], a rising [Genre, e.g., Pop/Country/Soul] recording artist. With a signature sound described as [Vibe, e.g., "emotive, powerhouse vocals with a modern edge"], the brand is currently at an exciting tipping point. Having already achieved [Mention 1-2 wins, e.g., 50k monthly listeners / a sold-out local residency / a new album release], we are now focused on scaling the performance schedule and expanding the digital fanbase. We need a "growth engine" to help take this career to the next level.



About the Role: As the Music & Entertainment Growth Assistant, you aren't just handling admin—you are driving the business forward. Your mission is twofold: ensure the artist’s digital presence is flawless and fill the calendar with high-value performances. This role requires a mix of creative marketing, meticulous organization, and the "hustle" to make sales calls and close deals with talent buyers.



Key Responsibilities:



Marketing, Relationship Mgmt, Bookings & Business Development : You will proactively research venues, festivals, and corporate events. You will be responsible for making outbound sales calls and sending personalized pitches to secure paid performances.



Social Media Management: You will plan and schedule content across social media platforms like TikTok, Instagram, YouTube staying on top of music trends and engaging with fans to build a tight-knit community.



 Marketing: You will manage the artist’s mailing list, designing and sending weekly/monthly newsletters to announce new music, merchandise drops, and tour dates.



Relationship Nurturing & CRM: You will maintain our database of industry contacts, ensuring we follow up with talent buyers and past clients to keep the artist "top of mind."



Admin & Logistics: You will update the official website, manage the master calendar, and ensure the Electronic Press Kit (EPK) is always updated for high-stakes opportunities.



Requirements:



Exceptional Verbal English: You must be confident, clear, and persuasive on the phone with US-based venues and organizers.



Sales Mindset: You enjoy the challenge of outreach and are motivated by hitting booking targets and earning bonuses.



Marketing Savvy: Proficient in Canva,
 platforms (like Mailchimp), and social media scheduling tools.



Proactive & Reliable: You don't wait to be told what to do; you look for opportunities to grow the brand. You must have a stable, high-speed internet connection.



How to Apply (Mandatory)

To be considered, we require a 1–2 minute video introduction. Applications without a video link will be automatically disqualified. Please include:



Experience: A quick summary of your background in sales or digital marketing.



The "Why": Why does the music industry excite you?



The Live Pitch: Spend 30 seconds pretending I am a festival organizer. Pitch me on why I should book Marionna for my event.



The Link: Upload your video to Loom, Google Drive, or YouTube (unlisted) and include the link with your resume.

title: Video Editor - FB + IG ads
description:
We’re looking for a talented video editor to join our team and help us create high-converting, engaging ad creatives. This is a long-term opportunity with lots of ongoing work — we have plenty of videos ready for editing right now.





We need someone who:



- Has a strong eye for storytelling and pacing.

- Can follow a script and make visuals match the message.

- Understands how to edit content that resonates emotionally (not just fast cuts and effects).

- Has experience editing short-form video ads, ideally for social media 
, TikTok, etc).





What You’ll Be Doing:



- Editing direct-response style ads from scripts and AI voiceovers.

To be considered for this role, before you are hired, you will be required to complete a trial task. Send us a message either by

This task will help us see how you approach editing and understand if you’re a good fit for the team. We just want to assess your skills.

title: Facebook Ads Media Buyer / Campaign Manager
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a highly organized and experienced
 Ads Media Buyer to join our team. Your primary responsibility will be the day-to-day management and execution of our
 ad campaigns, ensuring new creatives are tested efficiently and data is tracked flawlessly.



We operate at a high scale, so strict adherence to our standard operating procedures (SOPs) and meticulous data tracking are non-negotiable.



Key Responsibilities

- Campaign Execution: Uploading and launching new ad creatives into our test campaigns exactly as outlined in our SOPs.

- Daily Reporting: Conducting end-of-day check-ins detailing total spend, ROAS, and explicitly noting which ads were turned off.

- Meticulous Tracking: Updating our master tracking sheets daily.

- Data Organization: Cataloging every single ad in our database, ensuring all required fields are filled out accurately (e.g., creative angle, link to our Notion board, and the live ad link).



Requirements

- High-Spend Experience: You must have a proven track record of managing at least $5,000 to $10,000+ in daily
 Ad spend.

- Fluent English: Impeccable English comprehension and speaking skills are strictly required for team communication and reporting.

- System-Oriented: You must be highly organized, comfortable working heavily in spreadsheets and Notion, and able to follow precise instructions without deviation.



How to Apply

To be considered for this role, you must submit a brief Loom video with your application. In the video, please:

- Introduce yourself and explain your previous media buying experience.

- Provide screen-share proof of the ad accounts you have managed, specifically demonstrating experience with $5k-$10k+ daily spends.



(Note: Applications without a Loom video will not be reviewed.)

title: Customer Service Specialist – Luxury E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a full-time Customer Service Specialist to serve as the primary point of contact for our customers. This is a 100% remote role, with working hours from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM PST, Monday through Friday. You will be helping with order management, returns, and providing high-end styling advice. We need someone who is polished, empathetic, and possesses exceptional written English skills.



Top Responsibilities:

 Management: Respond to customer inquiries in a timely, professional, and "unhurried" brand-aligned manner.

Order Support: Provide accurate updates on order status, shipping timelines, and delivery tracking via Shopify.

Returns Processing: Guide customers through the return and exchange process using Loop Returns.

Styling Guidance: Offer thoughtful, informed styling advice based on a deep understanding of the Auter product range.

Issue Resolution: Manage and resolve customer concerns with empathy and discretion, escalating complex issues when necessary.

Data Integrity: Maintain accurate records of all customer interactions and follow-ups within Shopify.



Requirements:

Must-Have: Previous customer service experience, ideally for a luxury, fashion, or lifestyle brand.

Must-Have: Proficiency with Shopify (navigating orders and customer profiles) and Loop Returns.

Must-Have: Exceptional written English and communication skills with the ability to maintain a sophisticated tone.

Nice-to-Have: Experience with Klaviyo, Desposco, or similar e-commerce fulfillment software.

Nice-to-have: Experience with Website Management.

Trait: High attention to detail and the ability to work independently in a PST timezone.



Perks & Pay:

Pay: $4.00 – $5.00/hour (based on experience).

13th-Month Pay: Included.

Bonuses: Performance-based incentives for high production and revenue impact.

Growth: Opportunity to grow within a high-end, scaling fashion brand.

About Us:

We are a luxury fashion brand dedicated to providing a polished and warm experience for our clientele. We value quality over speed and strive to make every customer interaction feel personal and elevated.



To Apply:

Change the subject line to: “I’m a hard worker [Insert the name of the CEO of Klaviyo]”

(Label this 1.) Why are you interested in this position? (2–3 sentences max) 

(Label this 2.) What relevant experience do you have with Shopify and Loop Returns? (3–5 sentences)

 (Label this 3.) Can you work 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST hours Monday–Friday? 

Label this 4: Based on the job description, what are the three specific areas of customer inquiry you will be addressing via
?

Do not write more than requested. Applications that don’t follow the format will be ignored.

title: Ecommerce Assistant
description:
Applicants must score in the 90th percentile or higher on the test below to be considered for the position. If you are a high caliber professional who has what it takes, we want to work with you! The test takes about 30 minutes and we are willing to pay for excellence. 




/s/vd2hv2cq



MORE ABOUT THE ROLE: 



You'll be the operational backbone of our business and take ownership over your domain of work.

You'll handle everything from customer communication and supplier coordination to QuickBooks invoicing, product research, Shopify catalog management, and documentation creation. You'll also manage our social media presence (~1 hour daily), keeping our brand active and engaging across platforms. You'll manage timelines, track tasks, anticipate needs, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.

In 6 months, you'll likely be managing a small virtual team and taking on higher-level operational projects. In 12 months, you could be leading entire operational domains with significantly higher compensation.



What You'll Actually Do



- Support daily operations across customer service, vendor coordination, and order management

- Manage product sourcing, procurement research, and catalog updates (Shopify, Amazon, eBay)

- Handle QuickBooks invoicing and transaction support

- Manage social media accounts — daily posting, engagement, and community management (~1 hour/day)

- Coordinate team communication, track hours, and manage internal workflows

- Create and maintain SOPs, documentation, and process systems

- Use tools like Notion, ShipStation, Google Workspace, Clockify, and BitWarden

- Anticipate problems before they happen and solve them before they're asked

- Handle whatever else needs handling—because in a growing company, priorities shift fast





Who You Are

Non-Negotiables:

- 2+ years of virtual assistant experience (ecommerce experience is a major plus)

- Exceptional English — writing, speaking, and comprehension at a native or near-native level

- Available to work EST business hours full-time (40 hrs/week)

- Proactive critical thinker — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Relentless problem solver — "no" is just the beginning of the conversation

- Highly intelligent and detail-obsessed — nothing gets past you

- Outstanding customer service skills — you communicate with clarity and care

- Social media savvy — you know how to create engaging content and build community



What Sets You Apart:



You've used QuickBooks, Shopify, or ecommerce platforms before

You've managed social media for a business (not just personal accounts)

You're tech-savvy and learn new tools quickly

You thrive in fast-paced environments where no two days are the same

You take ownership like it's your own business

You want to be challenged, not coddled





Why Work Here?



Most VA jobs treat you like a task robot. We treat you like a strategic partner.

- Growth Path: Manage a team within 6 months. Grow your responsibilities and compensation as you prove yourself.

- High-Caliber Team: Work alongside sharp, driven people who will push you to level up.

- Real Impact: Your work directly affects business outcomes. You'll see the results of your decisions.

- Investment in You: We want to develop your skills, challenge your thinking, and help you become exceptional at what you do.

- Meritocracy: Performance = opportunity. We reward excellence, not seniority.



Details



Schedule: Full-time (40 hours/week), EST business hours

Compensation: $6–8/hour USD depending on experience

Location: Remote (Philippines-based candidates only)

Start Date: ASAP

title: SUPPLY CHAIN MANAGER
description:
Job Title: Supply Chain Assistant (Shopify Dropshipping) – Part Time



We are looking for a detail-oriented Supply Chain Assistant to join our team and help manage order issues for our Shopify dropshipping stores. Your main responsibility will be to ensure that all orders are fulfilled correctly, suppliers are followed up with, and customers receive updates when necessary.



This role is important for keeping our operations running smoothly and ensuring a good customer experience.



Position Details:

Part-time position

$4 per hour

Remote work



Main Responsibilities:



• Monitor all Shopify orders daily and ensure they are fulfilled within the correct timeframe

• Identify and resolve order issues such as out-of-stock items, variant issues, or supplier delays

• Communicate with suppliers to follow up on unfulfilled or delayed orders

• Track shipments using Parcel Panel and update the order status when needed

• Send
s to customers regarding order issues using provided templates

• Process refunds when necessary and keep records updated in the tracking sheet

• Update internal Google Sheets that track open orders, order issues, and inventory

• Make sure no order remains unresolved or unfulfilled without being tracked in the system

• Perform quality checks on products together with the supplier to ensure items match the listing and meet our standards

• Work with the supplier to learn product details, sizes, and variants so issues can be handled quickly

• Help identify products that may need updates or corrections in the store

• Report daily updates on open orders, issues resolved, and tasks completed



Requirements:



• Good written English communication

• Strong attention to detail

• Ability to follow SOPs and structured workflows

• Comfortable working with Google Sheets

• Experience with Shopify or ecommerce is a plus (but not required)

• Ability to work independently and stay organized



Tools we use:



• Shopify

• Parcel Panel (tracking)

• Google Sheets

• Supplier communication platforms



Important:

When applying, please start your message with the word strawberry so we know you carefully read the job description.



We are looking for someone reliable who wants to grow with the team and learn more about ecommerce operations.

 Ads and Google Ads for real estate acquisition

What We’re Looking For

• Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience running
 & Google Ads for real estate

• Proven track record in real estate lead generation and acquisition

• Strong understanding of buyer/seller funnels and local market targeting

• Experience with high-spend accounts and scaling winning campaigns

What Success Looks Like

If you are a real estate paid ads expert who knows how to drive acquisition—not just clicks—we want to hear from you.

title: Part-Time Shopify E-Commerce Manager
description:
PART-TIME SHOPIFY E-COMMERCE MANAGER

Soft Wash Technologies | Remote | ~10 hrs/week |$3.53 - $6.67 /hour



You know what a great Shopify store looks like — and more importantly, you know what a broken one looks like.



We sell pressure washing and soft washing equipment to professional contractors across the US. Our store is the business. When it's sharp, clear, and easy to buy from, contractors trust us. When it's not, they leave.

We're looking for one person to own the site.





A TYPICAL WEEK LOOKS LIKE THIS:



You log in, check the store, and notice the homepage banner is still promoting last month's sale. You swap it. You see a product description that reads like a spec sheet — you rewrite it so a contractor actually understands why they need it. You check Microsoft Clarity and spot that mobile visitors are dropping off on a collection page. You dig in and fix it. You publish a blog post you've been working on that targets a keyword you found during research. You update two FAQ answers that were outdated. You resize and optimize a few product images that were loading too slow.

Then you hop over to our Amazon and eBay listings — we only cross-post a handful of products there, but you make sure the inventory counts match, the images look right, and the descriptions aren't stale. It's not a huge lift, but if something's off, you catch it.

That's the job. Nobody tells you to do most of this. You just see it and handle it.





YOU'LL USE:



Shopify (daily), Amazon Seller Central, eBay Seller Hub, Canva, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, Notion, and GoHighLevel (we'll train you on GHL).





YOU'RE THE RIGHT PERSON IF:



You've actually managed a Shopify store — not just "set one up once." You've touched Amazon or eBay seller accounts enough to keep listings clean and accurate. You write product copy that sounds like a human talking to another human, not a keyword-stuffed robot. You can do basic image editing without being asked. You understand on-page SEO well enough to do it, not just talk about it. And you don't need someone checking in on you every day to make sure the work got done.





TO APPLY:



Take a look at 
. Send us a short message that includes one specific thing you'd change on the site and why. Include a link to a Shopify store you've worked on, or screenshots.

That's it. No novel. No generic cover letter. Just show us you looked.

title: YouTube Video Editor & Motion Graphics Designer
description:
Elite Careers Strategy (ECS) is a premium career advisory based in Mayfair, London. We help candidates land offers at Goldman Sachs, Blackstone, White & Case, Freshfields, Kirkland & Ellis, and other elite law firms and investment banks across London, New York, and Hong Kong.



Our YouTube channel 
 is growing fast and we need a long-term video editor to own our post-production pipeline. This is not a one-off project. We currently publish 5 videos per month and are scaling to 10 per month. The right person will have consistent, growing income working with a brand they can be proud of.



RATES AND VOLUME:



- Starting rate: $80 USD per long-form video

- After 60 days (strong performers): $95 USD per long-form video

- Volume: 5 videos/month now, scaling to 10 videos/month within 90 days

- Short-form clips: Paid separately on top of the base rate

- Thumbnails: Paid separately on top of the base rate

- Commitment: Long-term ongoing role only



TOTAL EARNINGS POTENTIAL:



- Month 1-2 at 5 videos: $400/month base + short-form and thumbnail add-ons

- Month 3+ at 10 videos on upgraded rate: $950/month base + add-ons

- Total realistic monthly package at full volume: $1,100 - $1,300+ USD

- This places you at the top of the experienced tier for this role type in the Philippines market

- We are building a long-term relationship, not cycling through freelancers



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



- Edit long-form YouTube videos (10-30 minutes) from raw talking-head footage to final export

- Colour grade, audio mix, pacing, and graphics overlay on every video

- Design and animate motion graphics: lower thirds, chapter cards, framework animations, kinetic text sequences

- Cut 5 short-form clips (60-90 seconds) per long-form video for TikTok and Instagram Reels

- Create thumbnail designs for every video (3 variations per video)

- Build reusable motion graphics templates (.mogrt) so the brand stays consistent at scale

- Add stylised captions and subtitles — not auto-generated defaults

- Implement B-roll inserts, chapter markers, and proof-of-outcome visual sequences

- Deliver files within agreed turnaround windows and follow our YouTube Production Bible



REQUIRED SKILLS:



- Adobe Premiere Pro — primary NLE, non-negotiable

- Adobe After Effects — motion graphics and animations, non-negotiable

- Adobe Photoshop — thumbnail design and asset creation

- Motion graphics templates (.mogrt) — building reusable brand assets

- Short-form editing — vertical 9:16 cuts for TikTok and Reels with strong hook-first pacing

- Audio editing — noise removal, EQ, compression, music ducking, broadcast-quality output

- Colour grading — consistent premium look using LUTs or manual grade

- Stylised captions with brand typography

- Thumbnail design with a proven high-CTR approach



NICE TO HAVE:



- Adobe Illustrator

- DaVinci Resolve

- CapCut or Descript

- Notion for workflow tracking



THIS IS NOT THE RIGHT ROLE IF:



- You are looking for one-off projects

- You use generic templates with no brand customisation

- You cannot consistently meet deadlines

- You need heavy direction on every decision — we provide a full Production Bible and clear briefs, after that we need your judgment, not your questions



HOW TO APPLY:



Respond to this ad.



Your application must include:



1. Links to 3 examples of your best work. At least one must include motion graphics. YouTube links preferred.

2. At least one example of short-form content (TikTok, Reels, or YouTube Shorts) that you edited from a longer source.

3. Answer this in 200 words or less: Watch any video on 
 YouTube channel. What would you change in the edit, what motion graphic would you add, and why would it improve retention?

4. Your software stack and current availability.

5. Confirmation you are available for consistent long-term work.



Applications without a showreel will not be considered.

Applications that skip question 3 will not be considered.

We review in batches. Templated applications will not receive a response.

title: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor
description:
Scope of Work: Social Media Content Creator and Advisor



1. Project Overview

Bomani Resort, located in Kikambala, Kilifi County, Kenya, is a unique boutique resort and 12-acre working farm offering a blend of Culture, Comfort, and Connection. The resort provides diverse accommodations, including stone cottages and glamping tents, and serves as a gateway to authentic Kenyan traditions, village life, and nearby beaches.



The objective of this engagement is to hire a Social Media Content Creator and Advisor to elevate the resort's digital presence, increase brand awareness, and drive bookings through strategic storytelling and high-quality content curation. Applicants are encouraged to review the resort's website at 
 for a comprehensive understanding of our brand and offerings.



2. Roles and Responsibilities

The selected professional will act as both a creative executor and a strategic advisor. The primary focus will be on transforming raw assets into compelling narratives that resonate with local and international audiences.



Category Description of Responsibilities

Content Creation Edit and curate unedited video and photography provided by the resort. Create engaging Reels, TikToks, and static posts that highlight the "farm-to-resort" lifestyle.

Strategic Advisory Develop a monthly content calendar aligned with seasonal trends and resort promotions. Advise on platform-specific strategies (Instagram,
, TikTok).

Community Management Monitor and respond to comments, messages, and inquiries. Engage with relevant travel influencers and local community accounts to expand reach.

Brand Consistency Ensure all digital communication reflects the resort’s core values: Culture, Comfort, and Connection. Maintain a consistent visual aesthetic and tone of voice.



3. Key Deliverables

The Consultant is expected to deliver the following items on a recurring and project-basis:



• Monthly Content Calendar: A detailed schedule of posts, stories, and reels across all active platforms, submitted for approval 7 days before the start of each month.

• Edited Visual Assets: A minimum of 3 high-quality Reels/Videos and 5 static/carousel posts per week, utilizing the provided raw footage and photography.

• Platform Optimization: Complete audit and optimization of Instagram and
 profiles, including bio updates, highlight covers, and SEO-friendly descriptions.

• Monthly Performance Report: A concise summary of key metrics (reach, engagement, follower growth) and actionable insights for the following month.



4. Content Themes and Pillars

To ensure a diverse and engaging feed, the content should revolve around the following pillars:



The Farm-to-Resort Experience: Showcasing the 12-acre working farm, fruit trees, and the unique tranquility of staying on a scenic agricultural property.



Authentic Kenyan Culture: Highlighting village walks, local food tasting, and excursions to historical sites that offer guests a deep connection to the region.



Diverse Accommodations: Creating specific features for the Langi Langi cottage, glamping tents, and studios to show the range of "comfort meets nature."



Guest Stories & Testimonials: Utilizing existing and new reviews to build trust and social proof among potential visitors.



5. Project Timeline and Logistics

• Contract Duration: Initial 3-month pilot period with the option for long-term renewal based on performance.

• Asset Handoff: The resort will provide raw, unedited video and photography via a shared Google Drive or Dropbox folder on a weekly/bi-weekly basis.

• Communication: Weekly 30-minute check-in calls to discuss upcoming events, promotions, and content performance.



6. Qualifications and Requirements

The ideal candidate should possess:

1 Proven experience in travel and hospitality social media management.

2 Advanced skills in mobile video editing (CapCut, Adobe Premiere Rush, etc.) and graphic design (Canva, Photoshop).

3 A deep understanding of the Kenyan tourism landscape and current social media trends.

4 Excellent written English and the ability to craft evocative captions.

5 Submission of a short (approx. 30-second) sample reel demonstrating their creative approach to promoting a boutique resort, utilizing provided or self-sourced visuals.



7. Proposed Compensation

Compensation will be structured at $5 per hour, for an estimated 10 hours per week. Candidates are invited to submit their proposals based on the deliverables outlined in Section 3.



Prepared by: Bomani Resort Management     Date: March 6, 2026

description:

Job Description

title: Credit Bureau Call Specialist (Customer Service – Credit Repair Industry)
description:
Credit Bureau Call Specialist – Customer Service (Excellent English Required)



EXPERIENCE WITH READING A CREDIT REPORT AND WORKING AT A CREDIT REPAIR COMPANY OR BUREAU



Job Description

We are a growing U.S. credit consulting company looking to hire Customer Service Call Specialists who will assist our team by contacting credit bureaus on behalf of our clients.

This role does NOT require creating disputes. Your primary responsibility will be calling the credit bureaus to request updates, verify information, and communicate with representatives regarding client accounts.

You must have excellent English speaking skills and be comfortable speaking with U.S. representatives on the phone.

Basic knowledge of credit reports and credit repair is required so you can properly understand what you are discussing during the calls.

This is a long-term, full-time work-from-home opportunity with a fast-growing company.

Responsibilities

• Call credit bureaus on behalf of our clients

• Follow scripts and instructions from our internal team

• Ask questions regarding credit report accounts and dispute status

• Communicate clearly with bureau representatives

• Document call results in our system

• Review credit reports to understand accounts being discussed

• Provide updates to our team after each call

Requirements

• Excellent spoken English (very important)

• Comfortable speaking on the phone daily

• Customer service or call center experience

• Ability to understand and read a credit report

• Basic knowledge of credit repair or credit reporting

• Strong communication skills

• Attention to detail when documenting calls

• Reliable internet connection

• Quiet work environment

Preferred Experience

• Experience speaking with U.S. credit bureaus or financial companies

• Credit repair industry experience

• Call center background

• Experience reviewing credit reports

Work Details

Full-Time Position

Work From Home

Long-Term Opportunity

To Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself

Your experience with customer service or call centers

Your experience with credit reports or credit repair (if any)

Your internet speed test

To confirm you read the entire job description, start your application with the words: "Credit Specialist Ready."

title: Virtual Assistant — CEO's Right Hand Full-Time | Remote | Beauty Startup
description:
About the Role

We're a fast-moving beauty startup looking for a highly organized, proactive Virtual Assistant to support our CEO. This is a true jack-of-all-trades role — no two days look the same, and you'll be plugged into nearly every part of the business. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment, take ownership without being asked twice, and love checking things off a list, this role is for you.

This is a full-time, 8-hour-a-day position. Availability must flex across both West Coast and East Coast hours depending on where the CEO is working from.



Examples of What You'll Own



CEO Calendar Management: Own and maintain the CEO's calendar end-to-end — scheduling, rescheduling, and making sure nothing falls through the cracks.



Follow-Up Management: Track open threads and ensure timely follow-ups across all ongoing conversations and commitments.

Creator & Influencer Outreach: Manage UGC creator and influencer outreach, including sending contracts, coordinating communications, and keeping workstreams on track.



Recap
s: Send clear, concise recap
s following meetings and calls.



Customer Outreach: Draft and send customer-facing
s with a polished, on-brand voice.

Operational Support: Jump in wherever needed to support day-to-day business operations — this list is a starting point, not a ceiling.





What We're Looking For



Strong written and spoken English — you'll be representing the CEO in communications

Highly responsive and available via Slack during working hours

Extremely organized with strong attention to detail

Comfortable with ambiguity and able to prioritize in a fast-paced environment

Prior experience supporting a founder, executive, or CEO preferred

Experience in beauty, fashion, or creator economy a plus





This Role Is NOT For You If:



You need a lot of hand-holding or direction

You're not comfortable wearing multiple hats

You're not available across time zones when needed

title: Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)
description:
Paid Media Specialist (Google Ads & Meta Ads)



We are currently looking for a Paid Media Specialist to join our team and help manage and improve paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta platforms 
 & Instagram). This role focuses on using data-driven strategies to increase leads, conversions, and overall campaign performance.



Key Responsibilities

 & Instagram)

• Conduct research on target audiences, keywords, and competitors to improve advertising strategies

• Work with design and content teams to test and improve ad creatives including headlines, visuals, and formats

• Manage advertising budgets carefully to achieve the best possible return on investment

• Set up and maintain tracking using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Tag Manager, Meta Pixel, and conversion tracking systems

• Prepare regular campaign reports and provide insights for performance improvements

• Keep up with updates, trends, and best practices in digital advertising platforms

• Collaborate with internal teams to ensure advertising strategies support overall marketing goals



Requirements



• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, or a related field is preferred

• At least 1–3 years of experience in Paid Media or Digital Advertising

• Experience working with Google Ads and
/Instagram Ads platforms

• Strong analytical thinking and ability to interpret campaign data

• Familiarity with analytics, tracking tools, and reporting systems

• Ability to manage multiple campaigns and meet deadlines

• Good communication skills and ability to work well within a team



Preferred Qualifications



• Experience with lead generation or e-commerce campaigns

• Knowledge of A/B testing, remarketing, and funnel optimization

• Experience handling medium or large advertising budgets

• Certifications related to Google Ads or Meta advertising platforms



Benefits



• Competitive salary with performance-based incentives

• Opportunity to work with different industries and projects

• Opportunities for learning and professional growth

title: VA / Project Manager / Product Operations Assistant
description:
JustWatch is the world’s leading streaming guide for movies and TV shows, with over 40 million users across 120 countries. Our platform allows users to search more than 100,000 movies and TV shows to find out where they can legally watch them across hundreds of streaming services.



We are looking for a new team member to support the Product side of our operations, helping us manage workflows, user feedback, and internal product processes.



Compensation & Schedule

Starting Rate: $5/hour

Automatic Raise: $7/hour after successful completion of the probation period

Hours: 20–40 hours per week (flexible depending on workload)

Schedule: Flexible, aligned primarily with Philippine working hours



Key Responsibilities



Virtual Assistance / User Communication



-First and Main Responder: Act as the central voice for all JustWatch product issues, handling user feedback tagged for the product team from understanding the problem to confirming having solved the issue. 

-Smart Templating: Create, update, and use macros to ensure swift replies—while keeping responses personalized and avoiding a “robotic copy/paste” feel.

-Resolution & Escalation: Keep our “time to solved” metrics low, and proactively escalate complex tickets to our internal communication channels for advice. 





Project Management / Product Operations



-Bug Tracking: Report, manage and maintain our active bugs in a Kanban board.

-Feature Backlog: Track and organize user feature requests coming from our support system and our social channels.

-Bi-weekly Support Reports: Dropping support issue / feedback summaries twice a week

-Weekly Bug Report: A high-level overview of our current bug list and resolutions.

mbers and provide great support and a stable income.

title: Female Cold Caller to Match Existing Audio Materials - Real Estate
description:
About the Job

We are currently seeking a female voice for this recording project to match the tone and style of our existing audio materials.



We are looking for a reliable cold caller to contact property owners and ask if they may be interested in selling their property.

This position also involves recording short phone scripts for use in calling campaigns.



You will follow a structured script and collect basic information from interested sellers. Training will be provided.

This position begins with a 30-day trial period and may become a long-term opportunity based on business growth.



We value consistency, professionalism, and clear communication.

________________________________________

Responsibilities

• Call property owners using a provided call list

• Follow a structured script when speaking with property owners

• Ask basic questions when the owner shows interest

• Determine whether the owner may be open to selling their property

• Record call results accurately in the CRM system

Calling tools such as CallTools, BatchDialer, or similar CRM systems will be used.

________________________________________

Requirements

• Clear and easy-to-understand English speaking ability

• Comfortable making outbound cold calls

• Ability to handle rejection professionally

• Ability to follow instructions and scripts closely

• Reliable and consistent work habits

• Strong listening and communication skills

• Quiet workspace and stable internet connection

• USB headset required

________________________________________

Schedule

• 3–4 days per week

• 4 hours per day

• Total: 12–16 hours per week

Calling hours will fall between:

10:00 AM – 8:00 PM U.S. Eastern Time

________________________________________

Pay

$3 per hour

________________________________________

Training

Training and scripts will be provided before starting calls.

________________________________________

Application Instructions/Script to Read

To apply, please record the script below on 
 or another means and send it to us preferably by a link. If not by a link you can send it by a download.

 

Script to record:

Hi, I’m calling about the property on Thomas Street. Is this the owner?” 



My name is (Your name). I help someone who buys houses in the area. 



Would you ever consider selling that property? 



Okay, thanks for letting me know. 



Can I ask a quick question — is the property currently occupied or vacant? 



What is prompting you to consider selling it? 



Would the property need any repairs or updates?  



That’s helpful. The buyer usually likes to speak directly with owners who may consider selling. 



What would be the best time for him to give you a call? 



Okay. Thanks. It was nice talking to you. Bye. (or you can say whatever closing you want to do that feels natural to you.)

title: Shopify Technical SEO / Google Merchant Center Developer
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Shopify Technical SEO / Google Merchant Center Developer to join our team on a long-term basis.



This is not a basic Shopify design role. We need someone who can identify and fix technical, backend, crawl, rendering, structured data, and policy-related issues that may affect store performance and Google Merchant Center compliance.



Our store is already live, and we want a strong developer who can help us solve technical Shopify issues, improve site quality, support Google Merchant Center / Google Ads related requirements, and work with our team long term.



Main responsibilities:

- Audit and fix Shopify technical issues

- Check crawlability, rendering, structured data, schema, and Search Console signals

- Fix broken links, policy visibility issues, and data inconsistencies

- Review product data, product pages, and backend settings

- Help diagnose Google Merchant Center issues, suspensions, disapprovals, and website quality flags

- Work with our team on ongoing technical improvements



Required experience:

- Strong Shopify development experience

- Strong technical SEO knowledge

- Experience with Google Merchant Center

- Experience solving website quality, suspension, disapproval, or feed-related issues is a big advantage

- Comfortable working with a team and explaining findings clearly



Important:

Please only apply if you have real experience with Shopify technical debugging and Google Merchant Center related issues.



To apply, include:

1. Your Shopify technical SEO experience

2. Your experience with Google Merchant Center

3. Examples of similar issues you solved

4. The word BERRY at the top of your application

title: YouTube Video Editor (Product Review Channel)
description:
Summary

We are seeking a creative and skilled video editor to join our team and help elevate our YouTube product review channel. Our videos range from 10 to 30 minutes in length, and while we currently produce roughly 2 videos per month due to limited manpower, we plan to increase our output in the near future.



Responsibilities

-Footage Editing: Organize, trim, and arrange raw footage to create a compelling, well-paced narrative.

-Enhancing Visual Appeal: Incorporate transitions, effects, graphics, and text overlays to elevate the video’s quality and viewer engagement.

-Audio Management: Sync voiceovers and sound effects to ensure clear and balanced audio.

-Color Correction & Grading: Enhance the visual quality through effective color correction and grading if needed.

-Collaboration & Revisions: Work closely with our team to integrate feedback and ensure consistency with our brand guidelines.

-Timely Delivery: Adhere to deadlines and manage project timelines efficiently.



Qualifications

-Proven experience as a YouTube video editor, ideally with a portfolio that includes product review content.

-Proficient in video editing software such as Final Cut Pro (preferred), Adobe Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

-Excellent sense of timing, narrative structure, and visual storytelling.

-Ability to work under deadlines, manage projects independently, and communicate effectively with the team.



Long-Term Opportunity: We’re looking for a partner who can grow with our channel as our production needs increase.



If you’re passionate about video editing and have experience creating engaging, high-quality content, we’d love to see your work. Please include samples of your previous projects, particularly any product review videos, along with your estimated turnaround time for a 10–15 minute video.

title: AI-POWERED MARKETING & SEO SPECIALIST
description:
Core Responsibilities

1. AI-Powered SEO & Content Engine

• Use ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude AI (including advanced features and workflows) to perform keyword research, create SEO content briefs, generate optimized blog posts, and build topic clusters with internal linking strategies

• Develop scalable AI-driven content systems that produce consistent, high-quality output

2. Lead Generation & Conversion Systems

• Build AI-assisted landing pages and funnels

• Write high-converting
 sequences and newsletters

• Research target audiences and pain points; create messaging frameworks focused on conversion

• Integrate automation tools and CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, Mailchimp, GoHighLevel)

3. Creative & Ad Development (AI-Enhanced)

• Design creatives using Canva and AI tools

• Create short-form videos (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) using CapCut or similar

• Write hooks, scripts, captions, and ad copy

• Analyze ad performance and optimize accordingly

4. Research & Competitive Intelligence

• Scrape and analyze competitor content and ads

• Reverse-engineer high-performing campaigns

• Track engagement and performance data; provide optimization recommendations

5. Website & Automation

• Build and edit websites (WordPress, Shopify, Webflow, etc.)

• Connect landing pages to
 systems and CRMs

• Automate repetitive marketing tasks using AI and tools like Zapier or Make



Required Skills & Experience

Must-Have

• Advanced use of ChatGPT (prompt engineering & workflow design)

• Working knowledge of Gemini and Claude AI (must understand full feature capabilities)

• SEO knowledge: on-page optimization, keyword research, content structuring

• Canva proficiency for marketing creatives

• Video editing experience (CapCut, Canva Video, or similar)

• Social media marketing knowledge across major platforms

• Website building experience (WordPress, Shopify, or Webflow)

• Strong English communication (written and verbal)

• Analytical mindset – you make decisions based on data, not guesses

Nice-to-Have (Bonus Points)

• Experience with GoHighLevel, HubSpot, or ActiveCampaign

• Familiarity with Google Analytics, Search Console, and SEMrush/Ahrefs

• Experience with Zapier, Make, or n8n for automation

• Copywriting training or background (e.g., AWAI, direct response)

• Prior experience working with international clients remotely



What We Offer

We value Filipino talent and have structured this role with benefits that matter to you:

• Competitive Salary: PHP 30,000–60,000/month depending on skills and test performance

• 13th Month Pay: Guaranteed, as required by Philippine labor standards

• Performance Bonuses: Monthly or quarterly bonuses tied to KPIs

• HMO / Health Allowance: Health coverage support for you (and family, depending on tenure)

• Paid Time Off: Vacation leaves, sick leaves, and Philippine holidays observed

• 100% Work From Home: No commuting. Work from anywhere in the Philippines.

• Equipment Allowance: Assistance for internet or hardware upgrades (discussed during onboarding)

• Skill Development: Access to AI tools, courses, and resources to grow your career

• Long-Term Growth: This is not a gig. We want someone who grows with the company.

• Respectful Culture: Clear expectations, no micromanagement, results-focused environment



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Your performance will be measured on:

• Organic traffic growth (month-over-month)

• Number of qualified leads generated

• Conversion rate improvements across funnels and landing pages

• Engagement metrics (social media,
 open/click rates)

• Automation efficiency – time saved through AI workflows



Hiring Process (Paid Test Required)

Shortlisted candidates will complete a paid test project to demonstrate real ability. This is not free labor – your time is compensated.

Test Assignment

You will be given a sample niche and asked to:

1. Create a 30-day AI-powered content + lead generation strategy

2. Show the exact prompts used inside ChatGPT, Gemini, and/or Claude

3. Build one SEO-optimized blog outline

4. Create one landing page wireframe (mockup acceptable)

5. Provide one short-form video script and Canva creative concept

We Are Evaluating

• Strategic thinking – Do you understand the big picture?

• AI workflow efficiency – Can you use AI tools as a multiplier, not a crutch?

• Conversion-focused messaging – Does your work drive action?

• Quality of execution – Is the output polished and professional?

• Clarity of thinking – Can you explain your reasoning?

Compensation: The test will be paid. Details will be provided to shortlisted candidates. Only candidates willing to complete the test will be considered for long-term hire.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

1. AI Experience: A paragraph explaining your hands-on experience with ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude AI. Be specific – what have you built or accomplished with these tools?

2. Portfolio: Links to SEO content, marketing campaigns, or related work samples.

3. Creative Samples: Canva designs, video edits, or ad creatives you have produced.

4. Strategy Brief: A short explanation (3–5 sentences) of how you would use AI to build a lead generation engine.

5. Expected Salary: Your expected monthly rate in PHP.

6. Paid Test Confirmation: Confirm that you are willing to complete a paid test assignment.

title: Admin Support and Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an Administrative Agent to help support our sales and recruiting teams. This is an entry-level position that is eligible for promotion after 12 months of tenure.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********



You will fail the application process if you don't read the entire job description.



***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********

***********MAKE SURE YOU READ THE ENTIRE JOB DESCRIPTION********





About Us



Started in 2017, and we're growing like crazy.

We expect to hire at least 4 salespeople, 3 admins, and 3 marketers in 2026.

Growing FAST - We sold 2663 lessons in 2025, and we're on pace to sell 3328 lessons in 2026

A small team of 1 American and 10 Filipinos.

We sell manual transmission driving lessons in the United States. Yes, really.

100% inbound leads from Organic Search (SEO). We don’t do cold calling.

No competition - in 90% of the markets we serve, we have no competitors. Because of this, our sale is pretty easy to make.





Compensation and Benefits

Competitive commission package - $3.50 per hour

Paid 5 Sick Days - Effective on day 1

Paid 10 days vacation - Prorated

Paid 14 Bank holidays - (Legal and religious Holidays are country-specific)

Paid Birthday Off - you pick a day off

Business Continuity Plan - In cases of calamity $40 hotel accommodations are permitted to ensure work will continue



Type of Employment

Full Time

40 hours per week

Schedule - 9 AM to 5 PM EST



Benefits to be provided after completion of 3 months:

Health Insurance

Office equipment, home office furniture, and anything else you need for work

Learning books, courses, training, or coaching that you want



Benefits to be provided after completion of one year:

Paid two weeks off for the Christmas Season



Entry Level Details

Note that this is an entry-level job.

We do NOT expect you to have any prior sales experience.

If you’re looking to switch careers and get your foot in the door, this could be great for you.

This is a great opportunity for anyone with a background in any of the following areas: Customer Service, VA Admin, Admin Data Processing, Clerk,
 Communications, General VA, Admin Support, Sales and Admin Specialist, Administrative Support, Operations Admin, Executive Admin Assistant, Sales Assistant.





Duties and Responsibilities

New Orders - Processing Product Order (Gift Certificate)

New Orders - Initial Order Confirmation (Level 3)

Instructor Onboarding, Offboarding and Reonboarding

Reactivate Unavailable Instructor

Secret Message: When you apply, under the section that says "Is there anything else you'd like to write or include?", write the word PINK ELEPHANT. This will show us that you read the entire job description.

Duplicate Record Check

Updating the "Daily Tracking" Process

CTM Prospect Staging





Qualifications

At least 2-3 years of minimum work experience in a relevant or equivalent role

Comprehensive background in Customer and Administrative support

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Excellent English communication and comprehension

Proficiency in using and managing Google applications - Gmail, Calendar, Documents, Drive

Preferably with knowledge in using cloud-based CRM

Organized and has careful attention to detail

Ability to multitask, prioritize, and manage time effectively

Strong Problem-Solving skills

Customer Service Oriented and the ability to adapt/respond properly to different types of scenarios

Equipped with good skills in office/admin management, and can suggest process improvements

Must have your own computer, reliable high-speed internet, and a good quality headset and microphone.





What's Hard About This Job

Working Remotely - We're a remote-first company, and we never want to have an office. This is great if you like working by yourself in the quiet, but it can be terribly painful if you need the energy of coworkers nearby.

Our Cultural Values - We're an American company with an incredibly unusual culture. Even by American standards, our 7 cultural values are highly unusual. Our culture is challenging for people accustomed to corporate culture and especially difficult for people who grew up in Confucian cultures. It's a great culture for people who speak directly and have a great deal of self-confidence and ownership. If you identify as a misfit, you'll do well.

Multiple Software Systems - You're going to need to learn how to use 12 different software systems. This is great if you want to get exposed to and experience lots of technology, but it can be tough if you have a hard time learning technology. Secret Message - When you apply, you'll see a box that asks if you want to add anything else. Type in PINK ELEPHANT in all capital letters exactly as we've shown it here.





Cheat Code for getting a job with us:

1) Our application comprises the majority of our recruiting process. Because of that, we suggest that you give us thoughtful responses and rich stories. We typically only interview applicants who give rich and detailed answers to our questions. If you write short responses so that you can hurry up and finish the application, you will not get interviewed.

2) Tell us stories about how your actions match your beliefs and values. For example, if I say I value health and fitness, you don't know if I'm telling you the truth or if I'm just telling you what sounds good. But, if I tell you things I've done, I can illustrate my values of health and fitness with proof. For example, I go to the gym 4 days per week, I've done 6 triathlons, including an Ironman, and I can swim 3000 meters in one hour. My examples of things I've done prove that my actions match my values system.

3) Be vulnerable and honest. We take very detailed notes during the interview process, and we conduct extensive background checks. If the stories you tell about yourself don't match what your references say, we will not hire you. We'd rather hire a C student who is honest about being a C student than someone who is a C student but tries to pass themselves off as an A student. Remember, this is an entry-level job. We're not looking for perfect. We're looking for an excellent cultural fit.

/work-opportunities/administration-agent

title: GoHighLevel Expert — Custom Systems & Webhook Integrations
description:
About Us

We run a growing digital marketing agency that helps contractors and tradespeople in the Netherlands get more leads and manage their business online. Our tech stack is built around GoHighLevel for CRM, automation, and client communication — and we use tools like Lovable to spin up client websites fast.



We're a small, no-nonsense team. We build practical systems that work, and we move quickly. If you like figuring out smart solutions without overcomplicating things, you'll fit in well here.



What You'll Be Working On

We need someone who can take GoHighLevel further than the out-of-the-box setup. Specifically:

- Building and maintaining custom automation workflows (lead follow-up, missed call triggers, pipeline management)

Setting up and troubleshooting custom webhooks to connect GHL with external tools — particularly Lovable and other web apps

- Creating reliable two-way data flows between GHL and third-party platforms

- Configuring pipelines, opportunity management, and CRM structure for multiple client accounts

- Occasional work on sub-accounts, snapshots, and white-label setup





What We're Looking For

Must-haves:



- Proven hands-on experience with GoHighLevel (not just theoretical, show us what you've built)

- Strong understanding of webhooks, API calls, and how to connect GHL to external systems

- Comfortable with JSON, HTTP requests, and debugging webhook payloads

- Experience with workflow automation inside GHL (triggers, actions, conditionals)

- Reliable communicator, you keep us updated and flag issues early



Nice-to-haves:



- Experience with Lovable or similar low-code/AI website builders

- Familiarity with Zapier, Make, or n8n as middleware

- Background in agency setups (sub-accounts, snapshots, SaaS mode)

- Experience with WhatsApp automation via GHL





How to Apply

Send us a short message with:



1. A brief description of a GHL system you built — what the problem was, what you built, and how it worked

2. One example of a custom webhook integration you set up (what tools were connected, what it did)

3. Your rate and availability

4. A short loom introduction about yourself and why we should hire you!

title: Real Estate Facebook & Google Ads Specialist
description:
About the Companies

 Ads and Google Ads for real estate to take full ownership of our paid acquisition funnel.



The Role



We are hiring an experienced Real Estate
 & Google Ads Specialist with at least 5 years of proven experience running paid acquisition campaigns in the real estate industry.



This role is for someone who understands real estate buyer and seller psychology, knows how to build high-converting marketing funnels, and can consistently optimize campaigns for Cost Per Lead (CPL), Cost Per Acquisition (CPA), and overall deal quality.



This is not an entry-level position. We are looking for a strategic operator who can plan, execute, and scale campaigns—not just someone who launches ads.



Key Responsibilities



Plan, launch, and scale
 Ads and Google Ads campaigns for real estate acquisition

Generate qualified buyer and seller leads, not low-quality traffic



Continuously optimize campaigns for CPL, CPA, ROAS, and lead quality



Create and test high-converting ad creatives, copy, and audience targeting

Analyze campaign performance and make data-driven optimization decisions

What We’re Looking For



Minimum 5 years of hands-on experience running
 Ads and Google Ads for real estate

Strong understanding of buyer and seller funnels and local market targeting

What Success Looks Like

Clear reporting and transparency on campaign performance



Direct contribution to closed deals and revenue growth



Why Work With Us

Long-term opportunity for the right candidate



Full ownership of the paid advertising channel



A results-focused environment with no micromanagement



If you are a real estate paid ads expert who knows how to drive real acquisition—not just clicks—we want to hear from you.

title: Digital Ads Manager (Automotive Dealerships)
description:
Full-Time | Remote | USA-Based Creative Marketing Agency

Salary: $1,500–$2,000 USD/month



Most ad managers simply place campaigns. In this role, you’ll place high-quality creative — cinematic video, professional photography, and polished design — in front of the right audience for automotive dealerships across the United States.



If you enjoy the craft of paid media and want to work with creative assets that truly deserve a strong media strategy, this role may be the right fit for you.



About Us



We are a full-service creative marketing agency based in the United States. Our team produces premium creative content, including cinematic video, professional photography, and high-end graphic design for clients across multiple industries such as automotive, home services, finance, legal, construction, and non-profit organizations.



Our automotive clients include new car franchise dealerships, and they invest heavily in high-quality creative. This position exists to ensure that this creative content reaches the right audience at the right time through well-executed paid media campaigns.



The Role



We are looking for a Digital Ads Manager to work full-time with our team. You will report directly to our Paid Media Manager and play a key role in executing paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



This is a hands-on execution role. You will be actively working inside advertising platforms daily — building campaigns, optimizing performance, analyzing results, and managing creative assets across Meta, Google, and TikTok for multiple clients.



Automotive dealership experience is required. You must have direct experience running paid advertising for new car franchise dealerships, including tools and campaign types such as:



Google Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs / Google Vehicle Ads)



TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs)



Google Performance Max campaigns



Dealer tools such as vAuto, VinSolutions, DealerSocket, or similar platforms



We also value candidates who use AI and automation to improve efficiency — whether through workflow automation, reporting automation, scripts, or AI-assisted analysis. We are not looking for someone who simply pastes prompts into AI tools; we want someone who deeply understands the platforms and uses technology to enhance that expertise.



Work Schedule



Hours: Monday – Friday

Time: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Central Standard Time (CST)



This role requires real-time overlap with our US-based team and clients, so this schedule is fixed.



Commitment:

This is a full-time, exclusive position (40 hours per week) dedicated to our agency. We use proprietary time-tracking software where team members log hours by client throughout the day.



If you are currently managing multiple clients or freelance projects and are not ready to commit exclusively to one team, this role may not be the right fit.



Day-to-Day Responsibilities

Meta Ads 
 & Instagram)



Build, launch, and optimize campaigns daily in Meta Ads Manager across multiple client accounts



Manage Advantage+ Shopping campaigns and catalog-based Automotive Inventory Ads



Ensure correct creative placement formats (vertical for Stories/Reels, horizontal for Feed/In-Stream)



Modify PSD creative files when needed for different placements and dimensions



Implement and troubleshoot Meta Pixel, Conversions API, and event tracking



Google Ads



Manage Search, Display, YouTube, and Vehicle Listing Ads (VLA) campaigns



Build and optimize Performance Max campaigns with automotive inventory feeds



Connect dealer inventory feeds to Google Merchant Center for VLA campaigns



Configure conversion tracking using Google Tag Manager and GA4



Manage bid strategies, negative keywords, and audience targeting



TikTok Ads



Build and manage campaigns in TikTok Ads Manager



Set up Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) including catalog and inventory feed integration



Install and troubleshoot TikTok Pixel and Events API



Ensure all creative assets follow vertical-first formatting



Reporting & Creative Management



Compile weekly and monthly performance reports across all ad platforms



Work within automotive platforms such as vAuto, VinSolutions, and DealerSocket when needed



Place finished creative assets correctly across ad platforms (format, placement, and dimensions)



Upload final video assets to YouTube with proper metadata and tags



Schedule and boost social media posts while monitoring engagement



What We’re Looking For



Minimum 2 years of paid ads experience for new car franchise dealerships



Direct experience setting up Google Vehicle Listing Ads (VLAs) with inventory feeds



Experience with TikTok Automotive Inventory Ads (AIAs) or willingness to learn quickly



Strong proficiency in Meta Ads Manager, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads Manager



Experience with vAuto and at least one of the following: VinSolutions or DealerSocket



Experience with Google Tag Manager and GA4



Adobe Photoshop skills for modifying PSD ad creative files



Strong attention to detail for creative placements and aspect ratios



Strong written English for daily communication with our US-based team



Reliable internet connection (minimum 25 Mbps) with backup power/internet if possible



Willingness to use our time-tracking system during working hours



Bonus Points



Google Ads certifications (Search, Display, or Video)



Meta Blueprint certification



Experience with automotive CRM platforms (CDK Global, Reynolds & Reynolds)



Experience with Looker Studio / Data Studio for reporting dashboards



Experience building automation tools, AI workflows, scripts, or custom reporting systems



Compensation & Benefits



Salary: $1,500 – $2,000 USD/month depending on experience



Payment Schedule: Paid twice monthly (15th and 30th)



Long-term stability: We are looking for someone who wants to grow with our team



Mentorship: Work directly with our Paid Media Manager and learn our internal strategies



Premium creative: You will be working with high-quality video and photography — not stock templates



Paid Philippine holidays



How to Apply



We receive many applications for this role, so we ask all candidates to answer the following questions in their application message:



Name one new car dealership you have managed paid ads for. What OEM brand(s) did they sell? What was their approximate monthly ad budget? How long did you manage the account?



If you noticed a dealer’s Meta Ads spend tripled over the weekend without a proportional increase in leads, explain step-by-step what you would check first inside Ads Manager.



What time zone are you currently in? Confirm that you can work 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST. If this means working overnight in your location, explain your schedule.



Are you currently working with any other employer or clients? If yes, confirm you will end those engagements before starting.



Have you built or used any AI tools, automations, or workflows to improve ad campaign management? Describe one example if applicable.



Finally, at the end of your application, tell us the name of a restaurant near your home that you would recommend and what you would order there. This helps us confirm you read the entire job posting.



Please send your CV and your answers to the questions above to:

title: Technical Support Specialist (CS)

title: Digital Marketing Specialist (E-commerce & Performance Marketing)
description:
