Dr. Ora is a fast-growing beauty supplement brand dedicated to creating clean, science-backed formulations that deliver real results. Our mission is to help women glow from within through effective products, transparency, and a strong commitment to quality.



As we continue to expand, we are looking for a Digital Marketing Specialist to join our team and help drive growth across both e-commerce and retail channels through performance-focused campaigns and content-driven strategies.



Key Responsibilities

1. Paid Performance Marketing



Plan, launch, and optimize digital advertising campaigns across Meta, TikTok, Google, and Shopee Ads



Manage advertising budgets and monitor ROAS, CPA, and overall campaign performance



Run A/B tests to identify and scale high-performing creatives and campaigns

title: Remote U.S. Registered Nurse (USRN)
description:
Remote U.S. Registered Nurse (USRN)

Clinical Documentation, Compliance, Onboarding & Case Management RN

Remote – Philippines | Supporting U.S. Healthcare Operations



Position Overview

A U.S.-based healthcare organization is seeking a Philippines-based Registered Nurse who holds an active U.S. RN license to support clinical operations remotely.



Applicants must hold either:

1. an active Nurse Licensure Compact (NLC) RN license, or

2. an active State of Georgia RN license



This role supports patient onboarding, case management coordination, clinical documentation review, and audit-ready chart management for a U.S. healthcare organization.



The nurse will work closely with the clinical and operations teams to ensure that all patient documentation, care plans, and onboarding records remain complete, compliant, and audit-ready at all times.



This position involves remote clinical coordination and documentation support only. No hands-on nursing care is performed.



Core Responsibilities

Patient Onboarding

1. Review new patient intake documentation for completeness and regulatory compliance

2. Ensure all consents, intake forms, service plans, and required documentation are completed prior to service initiation

3. Identify documentation gaps and coordinate corrections with internal staff



Clinical Documentation & Compliance

1. Maintain audit-ready patient charts

2. Review clinical documentation for accuracy, completeness, and regulatory compliance

3. Ensure records meet U.S. healthcare documentation standards and HIPAA requirements

4. Track missing documentation and ensure timely correction



Case Management Support

1. Assist with care coordination and ongoing case management documentation

2. Monitor care plans and ensure documentation reflects current services

3. Track physician orders, follow-ups, and documentation updates

4. Support communication between clinical staff, caregivers, and patients



Chart Audits & Quality Control

1. Perform routine chart audits and documentation reviews

2. Prepare records for internal quality reviews and regulatory readiness

3. Maintain documentation standards that support survey and compliance readiness



Operational Clinical Support

1. Support EMR documentation workflows

2. Monitor chart completion and documentation timeliness

3. Assist with internal documentation quality monitoring



Required Qualifications

Active U.S. Registered Nurse License (USRN)

     -Nurse Licensure Compact (NLC) OR

     -Active Georgia RN License

Currently residing in the Philippines

Experience supporting U.S. healthcare providers or organizations

Strong knowledge of U.S. clinical documentation standards

Familiarity with HIPAA compliance and patient privacy requirements

Strong written and verbal English communication skills

High attention to detail and strong documentation discipline



Preferred Experience

Experience in any of the following areas is strongly preferred:

1. Home care or home health operations

2. Case management or care coordination

3. Clinical documentation review or chart audits

4. Telehealth support

5. EMR systems such as:

     - AxisCare

     - Epic

     - Athena

     - eClinicalWorks

     - similar platforms



Technical Requirements

Applicants must have:

     - Reliable high-speed internet

     - Quiet professional workspace

     - Computer capable of running EMR platforms

     - Professional headset for phone and video communication



Work Schedule

This role supports U.S. healthcare operations.



Applicants must be able to work:



U.S. daytime business hours

(or overlapping hours with U.S. operations)



Compensation

$1,000 – $1,300 USD per month



Compensation is based on:

     - USRN license status

     - experience supporting U.S. healthcare providers

     - documentation and compliance experience



Licensing Verification

All applicants must hold an active U.S. RN license.

The company will perform full license verification through the issuing state board of nursing prior to employment.

Applicants who misrepresent license status will be immediately disqualified.

title: WP Funnel Designer & Builder (CRO Focused) – Zentra Digital
description:
WooCommerce Funnel Designer & Builder (CRO Focused) – Zentra Digital



Zentra Digital is looking for an A player WooCommerce Funnel Designer & Builder to join our team.



We build high converting ecommerce funnels in the health niche, and we are looking for someone who understands conversion psychology, clean design, and performance driven funnels.



This is not a basic web design role. We want someone who understands how to build funnels that actually convert, not just how to make pages look good.



Responsibilities



- Design and build high converting WooCommerce funnels

- Create landing pages, product pages, upsells, downsells, and checkout flows

- Build funnels using Elementor together with CartFlows or FunnelKit

- Design layouts using Figma, Canva, or similar tools

- Implement advertorial pages and presell flows

- Improve conversion rate optimization across funnels

- Work with the team to test and improve funnel performance



You will primarily work with Elementor together with CartFlows or FunnelKit to build scalable funnels. Experience with Figma, Canva, or similar design tools is important, since you should be comfortable designing layouts before building them.



Part of your role will also include implementing advertorial pages and presell flows that support paid traffic campaigns. Attention to detail is extremely important in this role. As a small note to confirm applicants actually read the description carefully, please include the words Orange Whale somewhere in your application message.



Because our funnels operate in competitive ecommerce environments, understanding conversion rate optimization and direct response marketing principles is essential.



Requirements



- Strong experience with WooCommerce

- Strong experience with Elementor

- Experience with CartFlows or FunnelKit

- Design skills using Figma, Canva, or similar tools

- Understanding of CRO and ecommerce funnel strategy

- Experience with advertorial funnels or presell pages is a strong advantage

- Ability to create clean, modern, high converting layouts

- Strong attention to detail



Who we are looking for



We are looking for A players only.



- Proactive and takes ownership of their work

- Thinks about performance and conversions, not just design

- Comfortable working in fast moving ecommerce environments

- Wants to grow with a serious team



If you simply execute tasks without thinking about conversion and performance, this role is likely not the right fit.



What we offer



- Long term opportunity with Zentra Digital

- Opportunity to grow with our team and boost your career

- Performance based bonuses and incentives

- Work on high scale ecommerce funnels



How to apply



Please send:



- Examples of funnels or landing pages you built

- A short introduction about your experience

- The tools and builders you are comfortable with



Only applications with relevant examples of previous work will be considered.

title: Executive Assistant to the Physician-CEO
description:
I am a US-based physician with an active clinical practice and several business ventures in the healthcare space. My work spans patient care, online education, and health technology — and I need reliable, organized support to keep everything running smoothly.



I need a highly organized, intelligent, and proactive Executive Assistant who can serve as the operational backbone of my professional life — someone who takes ownership, thinks ahead, and gets things done without needing to be micromanaged.



This is not a typical EA role.

You will support a busy physician across both clinical and business operations — handling communications, documentation, research, and scheduling across multiple concurrent projects. If you thrive in a fast-paced environment and enjoy bringing order to complex work — this role is for you.



Core Responsibilities

This is a full-time, long-term remote position. You will handle a wide range of administrative and operational tasks across both clinical and business activities. You must be comfortable managing multiple priorities simultaneously and working independently with minimal supervision.



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage calendar, scheduling, and appointments across multiple time zones

Handle
 correspondence via Gmail — draft, send, and organize on behalf of the principal

Organize and maintain files in Google Drive (documents, reports, contracts, protocols)

Transcribe and format voice-dictated notes into polished Google Docs

Track tasks and action items across concurrent projects and follow through on deadlines

Coordinate with contractors, vendors, clinical staff, and external partners

Conduct research tasks — medical, regulatory, business, and administrative

Assist with formatting presentations, business documents, and one-pagers

Monitor and triage inboxes; flag priority items and respond to routine inquiries

Support light bookkeeping and expense tracking in Google Sheets

Assist with social media scheduling and basic online presence tasks



REQUIREMENTS

Excellent written and spoken English (C1 or above)

Expert-level Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Drive, Calendar

Strong transcription and document formatting skills

Prior experience as a VA or EA supporting a business owner or executive

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive

Able to handle confidential medical and business information with discretion

Reliable internet connection and a dedicated, quiet workspace



NICE TO HAVE

Background in healthcare administration or medical settings

Experience with research tasks (PubMed, regulatory, market)

Familiarity with Canva, slide design, or basic content tools

Experience with project tools such as Asana, Notion, or ClickUp



CONFIDENTIALITY NOTE

A signed Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) is required before work begins. This role involves access to protected health information (PHI), confidential business materials, and sensitive legal documents. You must be comfortable handling all such information with strict discretion. Confidentiality obligations apply during and after employment.



Note: I am looking for the best of the best you must be competent and efficient.

We are a fast-growing fintech team delivering flexible payment solutions, including Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, that help customers manage their everyday payments with ease. Our team thrives on collaboration, innovation, and a customer-first mindset.

What You’ll Do

As a Customer Operations & Collections Agent, you’ll be the trusted point of contact for our customers - helping them manage their payments, resolve account issues, and stay on track with repayments. You’ll handle everything from contacting customers to settle accounts, guiding them through repayment options, and supporting debt recovery efforts.

IMPORTANT: Please carefully read the responsibilities below to ensure you're a good fit, and follow the instructions on how to apply at the bottom.



Compensation:

* Competitive salary: $1,300 – $1,500 USD per month (depending on experience)

* Opportunity to grow into a Team Lead/Manager position (with a raise) as the support team expands



Benefits:

* 100% Remote - work from anywhere in the Philippines.

* 15 days paid leave

* Bi-weekly salary payouts

* Paid time off and Philippine public holiday, listed here

* Supportive, startup-style culture where your ideas matter

* Clear growth path and strong learning opportunities in fintech





Working Hours:

* Shift during onboarding 6pm - 1am PH, Monday to Friday. After onboarding a fixed schedule will be provided depending on business needs.

* Must be willing to work during weekends

* This is a full time role only (40 hours per week)



Core Responsibilities

* Deliver exceptional multi-channel support (chat,
, and phone) with a focus on first-contact resolution and high customer satisfaction.

* Uphold brand standards by communicating clearly, consistently, and professionally in all interactions.

* Actively manage brand reputation by professionally responding to all customer reviews and public feedback.

* Handle and resolve customer complaints with empathy and efficiency, knowing when and how to appropriately escalate complex issues.

* Oversee customer repayments and collections by assisting with payment management, rescheduling, and account oversight with professionalism and care.

* Protect the business by proactively identifying, investigating, and escalating suspicious activity and potential fraud cases.

* Leverage AI-driven tools to streamline workflows, optimize response times, and enhance the quality of support delivered.

* Drive continuous improvement by gathering and sharing actionable customer insights with product and internal teams to enhance offerings and processes.



You’re Perfect for This Role If You

* Have proven experience in customer service, ideally within fintech, payments, or * lending (BNPL experience a plus).

* Understand fraud detection, repayments, and collections, with empathy for customers’ financial situations.

* Communicate effectively across chat,
, and phone, adapting tone and approach to each channel.

* Are tech-savvy and comfortable using AI tools and automation to streamline work.

* Thrive in a fast-paced, customer-first startup environment where priorities shift quickly.

* Are an empathetic problem solver with strong attention to detail, professionalism, and integrity.



How to Apply:

* Click the link below to submit your application and let's get started:

title: Content Strategist and Creative Producer
description:
JOB OPPORTUNITY

Content Strategist & Creative Producer

Dental Industry | Remote | Base Salary + Performance Bonuses



We're building an in-house content machine for a growing group of dental practices and we need the

person who makes it all run.

This isn't a "post on social media" job. You're the creative engine. You research what's working in the

market, develop ideas, write scripts using AI tools, brief the team on exactly what to film, and then

manage the content through editing and publishing. You own the pipeline from idea to live.



WHAT YOU'LL ACTUALLY DO

• Research competitors weekly using Meta Ads Library and spot trends before they peak

• Generate ad concepts and organic content ideas constantly, always testing new hooks and angles

• Write detailed scripts and shot briefs using AI, so the clinic team knows exactly what to film with

zero guesswork

• Coordinate content through the full workflow: filming team, video editor, ad specialist, and organic

posting schedule

• Develop a steady stream of content across formats: UGC talking videos, patient testimonials,

before/after reveals, educational tips from the dentist, behind-the-scenes clinic 
nts, staff

culture clips, and offer ads



YOU'RE A FIT IF

• You're fluent with AI tools and use them to move faster, not as a crutch

• You think like a media company, not a social media manager

• You're organized enough to manage a multi-step content workflow across a team

• You understand what makes people stop scrolling, specifically in health and service industries

• You've worked in paid social, content strategy, or a creative production role before



WHAT'S ON OFFER



Base salary + performance bonuses based on content output and results. This role grows with the

team. If you can build something that works, there's a real opportunity here.



To apply, send your portfolio or examples of content you've ideated, scripted, or managed.

title: Bankruptcy Petition Preparer
description:
We are seeking an individual with experience preparing Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy petitions on "Best Case" software. The candidate we hire must possess the following skills:



1. Familarity with Best Case software, including creating new cases, importing credit reports, and reviewing pay information to prepare budgets.

2. Familarity with both state and federal exemptions (though we will teach NYS exemptions as needed)

3. Familiarty with Means Testing calculations.



Candidate will access data by logging into our CRM database remotely.



Approx volume of petitions will be 70-90 per month. 



Unfortunately, we cannot train a candidate without actual experience in the US consumer bankruptcy field.  This is a very specific legal specialty, and we require someone who can start this position with little training.

title: SALES & MARKETING MANAGER (Part-Time, Remote)
description:
We are a UK commercial cleaning and facilities company building a remote outbound sales team. We need an experienced Sales & Marketing Manager to lead two Philippines-based VAs — one running cold
 sequences via Instantly, one handling calls and bookings.

This is a leadership role. You own the team’s results.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Lead, motivate and train both VAs daily

• Review daily reports and send written feedback every morning

• Monitor and manage Instantly cold
 campaigns

• Audit lead quality and coach the team to hit targets

• Send a weekly pipeline report to the CEO

• Be the single point of contact between the CEO and the VA team



PAY & BENEFITS

• $7.50/hr base ($6.50/hr for 30-day trial period)

• Up to $150/month KPI bonus based on team performance

• 2% revenue bonus on every client contract signed — uncapped

• Hours increase to 20–30 hrs/week as we grow the sales team

• Paid weekly via Wise (USD), every Friday



YOU MUST HAVE

• 3+ years in B2B sales management or outbound marketing management

• Experience managing and coaching a remote sales or outreach team

• Hands-on experience with Instantly, Lemlist, or a similar cold
 tool

• Strong CRM skills (Zoho, HubSpot, or similar)

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Available 09:00–13:00 UK time, Monday–Friday (Manila: 16:00–20:00 BST / 17:00–21:00 GMT)



HOW TO APPLY



Send a message that includes all three of the following. Applications missing any of these will not be reviewed:

• A short intro explaining your experience managing a cold outreach or sales team

• Your answer to this: “A Sales VA is making 25 calls per day against a target of 40. What do you do?”

• Confirmation you are available 09:00–13:00 UK time, Monday–Friday



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



• You manage by weekly check-ins only — this role needs daily engagement and daily feedback

• You are not comfortable giving direct, honest feedback to people you manage

• You have never personally used a cold
 tool like Instantly or Lemlist

• You treat reporting as your main output — results are your main output

• You are looking for a passive or low-effort part-time role

title: Social Media Lead Generation Specialist for Apartment Locating Brand
description:
Compensation:

Hourly base + performance-based bonuses



About the Role

We are hiring a highly skilled Social Media Lead Generation Specialist to help grow an apartment locating business through Instagram and TikTok.



This is not a basic social media posting job. We are looking for someone who knows how to create content that brings in real leads, not just likes or views.



You will be responsible for managing social media content across our apartment locating pages, editing videos, creating Canva graphics, posting consistently, responding to engagement, and helping turn content into inbound leads.



We already have content. Some of it is edited and some of it is raw. We need someone who can organize it, edit it well, post strategically, and improve our social media presence so it generates leads at scale.



What You’ll Be Doing



Manage content posting across Instagram and TikTok



Edit short-form videos for reels and TikTok



Create Canva graphics, story content, and social media visuals



Repurpose existing content into multiple posts



Write captions, hooks, on-screen text, and lead-focused calls to action



Help generate inbound apartment leads through social media content



Respond to comments and initial DMs during your shift



Track what content is performing well and what is generating leads



Submit weekly reports with top posts, leads generated, and recommendations



Keep content organized and easy to reuse



Daily Content Expectations



TikTok: 5 posts per day



Instagram: 3 feed posts or reels per day across active pages



Stories: 5 to 10 story frames per day



Community management during shift



Daily lead/source tracking



What We’re Looking For



Strong video editing skills for short-form content



Strong Canva design skills



Experience growing Instagram and TikTok pages



Ability to create clean, polished, engaging content



Understands how to create content that drives DMs, inquiries, and leads



Strong English communication skills



Organized and able to work independently



Fast turnaround and consistent execution



Able to follow direction but also bring ideas and recommendations



You Are a Great Fit If You



Know how to turn raw footage into strong short-form content



Understand hooks, CTAs, captions, and content formatting



Can make social media content look polished and professional



Care about results, not just posting for the sake of posting



Have experience with lead generation, local service brands, or real estate-related content



Bonus if You Have Experience With



Real estate content



Apartment locating content



Local lead generation



Instagram Reels strategy



TikTok growth strategy



Content repurposing systems



Compensation Structure



Hourly base pay



Performance-based bonuses tied to qualified leads and results



Opportunities for growth based on performance



How to Apply

Please send the following:



A short introduction about yourself



Your experience with Instagram, TikTok, video editing, and Canva



Links or samples of pages/content you have worked on



Examples of videos you have edited



Tell us how you would use social media to generate leads for an apartment locating business



Include the word LEADS in your application so we know you read everything





Please answer this in your application:

If you were hired to grow an apartment locating brand on Instagram and TikTok, how would you turn content into real leads instead of just views?

title: SEO Content Specialist
description:
To apply, visit 



=======



About Us:

Blume is a digital marketing company that builds websites and runs SEO campaigns for service businesses across the United States. We are looking for a dedicated, detail oriented SEO Content Specialist to join our team and help scale our content production across multiple clients.



What You'll Be Doing:

You will be responsible for creating city and state level service pages and "areas we serve" pages for our clients on a monthly basis. Each client serves a different market, so you will need to research the right keywords, write unique content, and ensure every page is properly optimized before it goes live.



Day to Day Responsibilities:

- Use Semrush to research and identify target keyphrases for each service and location page. 

- Write unique, SEO optimized service pages tailored to specific cities and states. 

- Write unique "areas we serve" pages for each client's target locations. 

Source and upload unique images for every page. No duplicate images across pages. 

- Write unique, descriptive alt text for every image on every page. 

- Follow on page SEO best practices including title tags, meta descriptions, header structure, internal linking, and keyword placement. 

- Manage and prioritize page creation across multiple clients simultaneously. 

- Maintain a consistent publishing schedule and communicate progress regularly.



Requirements:

- Proven experience writing SEO content, specifically location based service pages. 

- Hands on experience with Semrush or similar SEO tools for keyword research. 

- Strong understanding of on page SEO fundamentals. 

- Ability to source relevant, unique images and write proper alt text. 

- Experience working with WordPress & Elementor. 

- Excellent attention to detail. You will be working across many clients and locations, so nothing can be copy and pasted or duplicated carelessly. 

- Strong written English skills. Reliable internet connection and ability to work full time hours.



Preferred but Not Required:

- Experience working with home service businesses (roofing, plumbing, HVAC, etc.). 

- Familiarity with Google Search Console and Google Business Profile. 



=======

About Us

You will be supporting the CEO of Innovative Global Entities (IGE) — a multifaceted enterprise managing 16 active brands including Get Biz Credit, Reimagine iT Inc., Excel Media Group, Affluential Magazine and the Mind Your Business Podcast.



The flagship initiative you’ll primarily support is Fundable Futures — a 12-month program launching in 2026, designed to help 1,000 minority, women, and veteran-owned businesses in Atlanta qualify for $100K–$250K in business credit with no personal guarantee. You’ll help coordinate logistics, outreach, and reporting as we prepare for national scale.

Key Responsibilities



- Campaign Support & Task Coordination:

• Assist in managing timelines and tasks across Fundable Futures campaign phases

• Support communications with sponsors, cohorts, and partners

• Track deliverables from internal tea
mbers and partners

• Help document progress for reports and dashboards



- Administrative Management:

• Organize and update files across Google Drive, SharePoint, and Dropbox

• Maintain digital records and prepare reports or summaries fro
etings

• Schedule Zoom calls, prepare agendas, and track meeting outcomes



- Communications Support:

• Draft
 templates for outreach (Sendiio)

• Coordinate follow-up messages, reminders, and cohort instructions

• Monitor shared inboxes and support light customer service inquiries



- Systems & Brand Support:

• Help QA and organize brand materials across our 16 IGE brands

• Ensure SOPs and forms are updated in MS Teams, Google Sheets, or our CRM

• Assist in maintaining project management boards for current initiatives



You Must Be:



- Detail-oriented and highly organized — can manage multiple priorities calmly

- A fast learner — you pick up tools like Zapier, Google Workspace quickly

- Excellent communicator — written English must be clear and professional

- Tech-savvy — comfortable navigating CRMs, cloud drives, and automation tools

- Self-motivated — you manage your time well and take ownership of tasks

- Team-player — you work well under a visionary CEO who moves fast



Requirements



- At least 2 years of experience as a VA or Admin Assistant

- Must have a reliable laptop/PC and fast internet

- Must be comfortable working between 10 AM – 4 PM EST (or overlapping hours)

- Proficient with Google Workspace, MS Teams, Photoshop, Google Sheets

- Familiarity with ChatGPT and/or AI agents is a must

- Familiarity with workflow automation using Zapier or Sendiio is a plus

- Must be comfortable using our proprietary CRM system



Compensation & Benefits



- $5/hour USD (paid bi-weekly via Payoneer or PayPal)

- Paid holidays after 90 days (for Full-Time)

- Performance-based full-time promotion

- Annual performance review and raise eligibility

- Training and mentorship from a high-performing executive team

- Work with purpose across 16 brands with global impact



Deadline to apply: March 14, 2025

Start date: March 30, 20255



How to Apply: FOLLOW ALL INSTRUCTIONS BELOW



Create a Google Drive folder titled

and make sure sharing is set to

 to a potential sponsor introducing the Fundable Futures program and requesting a short meeting.

title: Real Estate Cold Caller (Lead Generation Specialist)

Compensation

• Performance bonuses for qualified leads and appointments

• Long-term opportunity with room for growth

title: REMOTE OPERATIONS ASSISTANT
description:
REMOTE OPERATIONS ASSISTANT

CRM • Client Communication • Fulfillment Coordination



We are a U.S.-based supplement manufacturing and fulfillment company looking for a reliable Remote Operations Assistant to join our team long-term.



This role supports our Operations Lead in managing client communication, CRM updates, order tracking, and operational follow-ups.



You will help ensure that no leads, orders, or production updates fall through the cracks.



This is a full-time, long-term opportunity for someone who is organized, professional, and responsive.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



• Update and manage CRM pipelines (Zoho or similar systems)

• Follow up with leads and existing clients by

• Track production and fulfillment timelines

• Coordinate updates between operations, warehouse, and clients

YOU MAY BE A GOOD FIT IF YOU HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH:

WHAT WE VALUE MOST



We care more about your work ethic and professionalism than the exact tools you have used.



The right person will be:



• Organized and detail-oriented

• Responsive during working hours

WORK DETAILS

TO APPLY

IMPORTANT



In your application, please include the word **“Structure”** in the subject line so we know you read the full description.

We are building a strong long-term team and look forward to meeting motivated candidates who want to grow with us.

title: Sales Representative
description:
A Virtual Assistant Sales Representative is a remote professional responsible for contacting and engaging with warm leads that have already expressed interest in a company’s products or services. The primary goal of this role is to follow up with potential customers, build rapport, answer questions, and help guide prospects through the sales process.

Schedule appointments, consultations, or demos when needed.



Maintain accurate records of conversations and updates in the CRM system.

Maintain a professional, friendly, and persuasive communication style.

Strong phone communication and interpersonal skills.



Experience in sales, telemarketing, or customer service is preferred.



Ability to build rapport quickly and handle objections confidently.

The goal of the Virtual Assistant Sales Representative is to convert warm leads into qualified prospects or customers by providing timely follow-ups and excellent customer communication.

title: Grant Writer & Research Specialist (Part-Time | Nonprofit)
description:
Hours: 20 hours per week

Location: Remote

Organization: Winding Branch Ranch (Texas, USA)



Winding Branch Ranch is a farm animal rescue and agricultural education nonprofit located in the Texas Hill Country. Our mission is to rescue, revive, and rehome farm animals in need while educating communities about humane, ethical, and sustainable farming practices.



We are seeking an experienced Grant Writer and Research Specialist to work approximately 20 hours per week identifying funding opportunities and writing compelling grant applications that support animal rescue, education programs, and capital campaigns.



This role requires excellent written English and proven experience writing successful grants.



Responsibilities



• Research foundations, corporations, and grant opportunities aligned with our mission

• Maintain a database of grant opportunities and deadlines

• Write grant proposals, letters of inquiry, and applications

• Assist with capital campaign and program funding proposals

• Gather statistics and impact data to support applications

• Track submitted grants and reporting deadlines

• Assist with donor and foundation research for future funding prospects

• Edit and refine written materials for clarity and impact



Requirements



• Proven experience writing grants for nonprofits or foundations

• Exceptional written English skills (this is critical)

• Strong research ability

• Ability to write clearly, persuasively, and creatively

• Organized and able to manage multiple deadlines

• Experience with nonprofit fundraising or development preferred



Bonus Experience



• Experience writing grants for animal welfare, education, agriculture, or environmental organizations

• Experience with capital campaign funding

• Familiarity with US-based foundations and philanthropic giving



To Apply Please include:

A brief introduction about your grant writing experience

Examples of grants you have written (or excerpts)

A short writing sample explaining why humane animal care and agricultural education matter

Applications without writing samples will not be considered.

title: Experienced Book Formatter & Copywriter for Amazon KDP (AI Book Software Experience Preferred)
description:
.Job Description:



I am looking for a highly experienced book formatter and copywriter to prepare a completed book for Amazon KDP publishing. The book is already written, and all pages, chapters, charts, and workbook materials are complete. Your role will be to combine all chapters into one cohesive manuscript, maintain consistent formatting, and prepare the final files for Amazon Kindle Direct Publishing (KDP).



This book also includes charts and workbook-style pages, so experience formatting instructional books or workbooks is very important.



I am specifically looking for someone who understands modern publishing tools, book formatting software, and AI-assisted book production tools to ensure a professional, clean final layout.



Responsibilities:



Combine all provided chapters, pages, charts, and workbook sections into one complete manuscript



Ensure consistent formatting throughout the entire book



Maintain the original structure and style, while improving layout where needed



Perform light copyediting or copywriting adjustments if necessary for clarity and readability



Format the book according to Amazon KDP publishing standards



Prepare final print-ready and Kindle-ready files



Assist with uploading and preparing the book on Amazon KDP



Required Skills & Experience:



Proven experience formatting books for Amazon KDP



Strong knowledge of book layout, typography, and manuscript structure



Experience working with charts, worksheets, and structured workbook content



Excellent attention to detail and ability to follow instructions carefully



Experience maintaining consistent formatting across long manuscripts



Software & Tools Experience (Important):

Candidates should have experience using professional book formatting and publishing tools, including some of the following:



Adobe InDesign



Microsoft Word Advanced Formatting



Atticus Book Formatting Software



Vellum



Scrivener



Canva Book Layout



Kindle Create



AI-assisted book formatting tools



ChatGPT or other AI tools used to assist with editing or formatting workflows



Bonus Skills (Preferred):



Experience formatting workbooks, instructional books, or self-help books



Experience with Amazon KDP upload process and publishing setup



Knowledge of AI-assisted publishing workflows



Project Status:



Book content: 100% complete



All chapters, pages, charts, and workbook materials: Provided



Goal: Professional formatting and KDP publishing preparation



To Apply, Please Include:



Examples of books you have formatted for Amazon KDP



The software and tools you use for formatting



Your timeline to complete the project



Any experience with AI-assisted publishing tools



I am looking for a detail-oriented, experienced book formatter who understands both traditional publishing tools and modern AI-assisted workflows to help bring this book to publication professionally.

title: Cold Caller - 50 calls Per Hour Minimum
description:
Abed,



This message contains the **full cold calling system, SOP, expectations, and payment rules**. Read everything carefully. This is the exact system we follow.



---



**OVERVIEW**



Your role is simple:



Call companies that **sell annuities** and offer them **annuity leads**.



The goal of every call is **ONE thing only**:



Get them to say **YES they are interested in buying annuity leads**.



Once they say yes, we collect their **name + phone number +
** so Max can follow up.



Do not overcomplicate the conversation.



---



**WHAT WE SELL**



We sell:



• Annuity leads

• Exclusive leads

• High-intent prospects

• Leads generated from our own ad spend



The advisor buys leads and then sells annuities to the client.



You are **NOT selling the leads**.

You are only **finding interested advisors**.



---



**WHO WE CALL**



Only call companies that:



• Sell annuities

• Sell retirement products

• Are financial advisors

• Are insurance agents

• Are retirement planners



Examples:



• Financial advisors

• Insurance agencies

• Retirement planners

• Wealth advisors

• Independent agents



---



**WHERE TO FIND THEM**



Use:



• Google search

• LinkedIn

• Google Maps

• Insurance directories



Search examples:



“annuity advisor near me”

“retirement planner”

“insurance agent annuities”

“financial advisor retirement planning”



---



**CALL SCRIPT**



Keep it extremely simple.



Example script:



"Hi, quick question. Do you currently work with annuities?"



(wait for answer)



If yes:



"Got it. The reason I'm calling is we generate **annuity leads from our own ad spend** and we're looking for advisors who want more annuity clients."



"Is that something you'd be open to?"



If they say yes:



"Perfect. Let me grab your information so Max can send details."



Collect:



• Name

• Phone

•

• Company



Then send it to Max.



---



**VOI
 SCRIPT**



If they don't answer, leave a voi
.



Example:



"Hi, this is calling about annuity leads. We generate annuity clients for advisors and are looking for partners who want more annuity business. Call or text back if interested."



Leave voi
s whenever possible.



Voi
s are important because **people listen later and call back**.



---



**CALL SPEED EXPECTATION**



Minimum pace:



30 calls per hour



Example daily output:



10 hours = about 300 calls



Faster is better.



---



**IMPORTANT RULES**



Do NOT:



• Explain too much

• Talk about pricing

• Talk about close rates

• Talk about sales cycle



Just say:



"We generate annuity leads."



That is enough.



Max will handle the rest.



---



**WHAT COUNTS AS A LEAD**



A lead counts if:



• They sell annuities

• They say they are interested in leads

• They give contact info



Send:



Name

Company

Phone




---



**PAY STRUCTURE**



You are paid based on **qualified interested advisors**.



Qualified means:



• They sell annuities

• They want leads

• They give contact information



More qualified leads = more pay.



---



**TEST PERIOD**



New callers go through a **performance test**.



Purpose:



To verify speed and quality.



During the test we measure:



• Calls per hour

• Leads generated

• Work consistency



---



**COMMON OBJECTIONS**



If they say:



"We already have leads"



Response:



"No problem, some advisors use us to add extra volume. Would you be open to looking at additional annuity clients?"



---



If they say:



"We are not interested"



Response:



"Totally understand. If you ever want more annuity clients feel free to reach out."



Then move on.



---



**IMPORTANT**



This job is a **numbers game**.



Most people say no.



That is normal.



What matters is **volume**.



High volume calls = leads.



---



**FINAL NOTES**



Always:



• Leave voi
s

• Call fast

• Keep calls short

• Stay polite



Your only job is to find advisors who want annuity leads.



Max handles the rest.



---



If you have any questions, ask before starting.
